subject: Early voting starts TOMORROW in Wisconsin!

Peter —
Early voting in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election starts tomorrow, and right now, this race is tied 47-47.
We know exactly what’s coming: Elon Musk and right-wing billionaires have already poured $10 million into this race to elect Brad Schimel, a Trump-aligned extremist who will rubber-stamp their agenda from the bench.
But here’s the thing: Musk’s bloated ad campaigns can’t ensure turnout.
But we can.
GOTV PAC is running one of the most cost-effective voter turnout programs in the country—and right now, we need to keep our paid phone banks fully funded to turn out every possible Democratic voter as the polls open.
But we need to move fast. Every hour of voter outreach matters.
Donate right now to keep our phone banks running at full speed as early voting begins: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3172025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

REMEMBER: This election will decide:
✔️ Whether Wisconsin Republicans get to gerrymander themselves into power permanently
✔️ Whether abortion rights are protected or stripped away
✔️ Whether we have a check on Trump’s policies—or a court that rubber-stamps his agenda
Republicans have dark money and billionaires. We have people power and the most effective organizing operation in the state.
Let’s go!
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3172025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3172025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. ## ****NATIONWIDE TRUMP ALERT****

**DEADLINE:** Friday!
**ALERT:** President Trump is requesting ONLY AMERICAN CITIZENS to answer two questions by Friday.
**HERE THEY ARE:**

Friends, Trump and Elon Musk are deliberately wrecking our economy to enrich themselves. And now they are actively working to plunge millions more Americans into poverty by first destroying Social Security, and then privatizing it. Once they have eroded public confidence in programs like Social Security by gutting them internally, the path to selling it off to their billionaire buddies (and themselves) will be much smoother. Musk is hoping we won’t notice, or won’t care, that he wants to return America to a dark time when over 99% of people in this country toiled endlessly to benefit the top 0.1% like himself. This has to stop—but the MAGA Republicans who control the House won't lift a finger to help working people. **That's why winning this special election is so important: if we win, we can stop Musk and Trump from ruining our economy and save working families.** [**This special election is a must-win if we are to flip control of the House to Democrats. Voters are paying attention to Trump's deception and are angry and ready for change. HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Cancer remains one of the leading health challenges of our time, affecting millions of lives across the nation
Co-presidents Elon Musk and Donald Trump are taking an axe to our nation’s efforts to find a cure for cancer. They have illegally cut billions of dollars for research, jeopardizing years of progress in the fight against this devastating disease
We cannot sit idly by while vital research is at risk. Every dollar invested in cancer research brings us closer to breakthroughs that can save lives and provide hope to patients and their families
**At Able Dems, we are fighting back with billboard campaigns calling out Trump and the Republicans for cruel cuts that threaten the health and well-being of ALL of us.**
****[**Please join us and sign the petition calling for Congress to RESTORE funding for cancer research.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOax3uqqMP4hvoN4WTTEzIveBTuH3KIEZi0_lBnymBKiYLnAWxV2QOeKsFz25ItVmdwyWFQiRHLU0JKTYDyPaT4i567VVX3Tiy7tO0igyLAoQsBHbHcoyfuzmi2yj5nQpILmPCiCeabLSGYvOLyZR9H56bDmOVJVMWSvbo82LQq1hMalNZRl-zgKdQOQZx9TRdzxtcw2TYZwc_2BgpXO_8BrEZd8OmFbJw41v643JegTxZuXKKvMvH4h3wcamIZa1G2XWpYtIAm1fmFLHm8pXdaENvzCUTavUnsQCyGwOSbeLJYSy4i6Y37lesN-aYwDaolGyw8Bq7OkATLsA8zhGUB83mnyV8rLd_NyRaF_nd_zcKJQsNyCLYJ1YmyNhHW9mM55/4ew/Squk6bJWTUe45qmTuXzItQ/h2/h001.6R9kDCYeNyZ2ud6zu5n0eRIhswqnql5FWhhoQ6SN4z8) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOax3uqqMP4hvoN4WTTEzIveBTuH3KIEZi0_lBnymBKiYLnAWxV2QOeKsFz25ItVmdwy9CRdURPjxFYn-UANEuL9authOOS_umDAYUXFrkZq2jM3gDVE973LarHsf1oBox-zBHxy-Syp0hpQUqSgrvKu-MkMgfOiXIZpcLU-J_jSsL8jw-_YoVS_9r2LqKVbSnjnkz3NdgvHEDQ4pipCJrF1gMwrio6UV5wnqETaxZ0q7NmXkbHYbOb2seBm_YEXyD8sa_m1gyPTb3rsZ-CREclZMUXgK2OvlugvdSfD2HQn6x0jNa_2EKlBwY_UXZPY8Lfv7Vsy09ykMXQAoI7Jyam0LZT-dnhnQRoT-IrQNKA3m35CC5xGSEnZLc2SYOwO3yZr/4ew/Squk6bJWTUe45qmTuXzItQ/h3/h001.VGsMc4GBzpRTQz_2DdjpmDrbzyeYeWkz2-T8YoqgrYE)

Trump and Musk and the complicit Republicans are violating the law and causing irreparable damage to ongoing research to develop cures and treatments for cancers!

They are STEALING critical funding promised to scientific research in order to give their rich donors another tax cut!

**Your voice matters! By uniting our efforts, we can advocate for the resources needed to continue this critical work.**

******[Sign the petition and together we can ensure that future generations have access to the treatments and cures that will ultimately defeat cancer. Let’s make our demands heard and fight for a healthier future!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOax3uqqMP4hvoN4WTTEzIveBTuH3KIEZi0_lBnymBKiYLnAWxV2QOeKsFz25ItVmdwyLCu5kCS4kXGSCRcfAEe5RWr6Z_XcihVtYaqL10KX4aeE70jQh2nzVpPMR-4sMBYiWYpK7J20Mqnpeh3goC11OtKY48zJJvpLZ9qGrATof8lWUG_fXntQfbHcS6s3BT43jDfyv_t5TFhJoGvj_NFYNVFYGtZ_HNHBUWH6n3EbHgBgxNRWTK6RLTZH9YlTbmzWSJQ787aHfFgh-v1OFziyrgb5lXfKlp4zXSBYevtIqI8IdfijgiYFaEkydLYv2oZbPIwYPGEFtxIsna7gup1x5y8VnsSDHtpqnqrXDa3XQ4RG6EHc2TzzclwzPxkfhea8/4ew/Squk6bJWTUe45qmTuXzItQ/h4/h001.f7arsV_VJfNqcpk8QtKMHQt1Gbnhj8e_6shpj-JK2W0)**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Why Nothing Works
body:
Why can’t we get big things done anymore? There have been a number of thinkers who have tackled this question... | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=9805024836&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=5492ef45fa&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| When I was running for President, many were dubious about government’s ability to solve big problems. Why can’t we get big things done anymore? There have been a number of thinkers who have tackled this question, including Jen Pahlka (bureaucratic rules), Yoni Appelbaum (zoning laws), and now Marc Dunkelman, whom I interview on the [podcast](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=0ceffd255d&e=0f227c2ae3) this week. Marc is a fellow at Brown University and the author of “Why Nothing Works: Who Killed Progress – and How to Bring it Back.” He spent years on Capitol Hill as a Democratic staffer and then as a researcher at a thinktank. “We used to be able to do big things, from the power grid to the highways to Social Security to the Tennessee Valley Authority. But over the past several decades, things have changed, as many self-described progressives have become concerned about government overreach in various realms. Today, we have a vetocracy where there are a lot of ways to stop things from happening. We seldom do big things successfully anymore, and voters have noticed.” Marc makes a series of arguments. First, he defines “Progressivism” as a popular movement that wants government to solve problems. Progressivism, according to Marc, is defined not by one but by two impulses that are in tension with each other. On one hand, the government needs to become more powerful to solve problems, as embodied by Alexander Hamilton. On the other hand, the government must be kept in check because it does bad things and ignores the people, as argued by Thomas Jefferson. These two impulses have waxed and waned in relation to each other over the last 100 years. The version that has emerged since the 1960s – with the Jeffersonian impulse to keep the state from too much power – has become a fundamental political liability for progressives. “The average liberal voter might have two top priorities if you asked them: climate change and women’s reproductive rights. The first asks government to do big things. The second asks government to be small and stay out of it. We don’t think anything of these preferences but we should realize that they are very different in their vision of the role of government.” According to Marc, the failures of government over the years have fueled the rise of Trump, because if the institutions aren’t working the way they’re supposed to, you become responsive to a very different type of leadership. So what can be done now? “This is in some ways good news, because we can focus on things ourselves. We should give communities a voice but not a veto when we want things to get done. Rendering government incompetent is a lousy way to draw voters into a movement to employ government to solve big problems.” Ain’t that the truth. For my interview of Marc, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=918f7b849f&e=0f227c2ae3). For his book, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=d3a69be6c6&e=0f227c2ae3). To see what Forward is doing for politics, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=9168170fa5&e=0f227c2ae3). Maybe we can get things working again.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=1ead5f1f93&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=1902c37ad1&e=0f227c2ae3)
---

You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=faeffcb159) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=faeffcb159).

name: Mark Takano
subject: I wanted to re-introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
what pushes me
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/b92V8iDjz100?t=g0j2gAewjLTB)
---
Peter, my path to Congress was not decided in smoke-filled rooms or carefully shaped by consultants in DC. **My commitment to public service was built across generations, and instilled in me by my family.**

During World War II, my parents and grandparents were sent to Japanese American internment camps because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost __everything__ and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war [](https://takano4ca.us/l/wAz9YmoeGbLa) _Despite_ being cast aside as second-class citizens, they instilled in me a deep sense of civic responsibility and commitment to public service. To love our country _despite_ its flaws, and to fight for the more perfect union that our Constitution promises. **Despite it all, they persevered.**

It’s what drove me to become a public school teacher for 20 years and eventually run for Congress. [](https://takano4ca.us/l/8doF8jPcKD3M) When I ran for Congress in 1994, bigotry would rear its ugly head when I was forcibly and **publicly outed as gay** by my Republican opponent.

Despite it all, **I persevered and was a sitting member of Congress when the Supreme Court legalized gay marriage in 2015.**

Today, we’re seeing some of that same racism, xenophobia, and homophobia again – especially from my MAGA counterparts in Congress. Attacks on immigrants, LGBTQ+ Americans, and women have been rising in recent years and threaten to derail decades of progress.

But despite it all, **we will prevail.**

[**Peter, hate is able to prevail when good people do nothing. So I’m asking for your support today – we can fight back against MAGA extremism if we band together! Will you chip in $7 today to stop MAGA’s erosion of our rights and help elect Democrats win? »**](https://takano4ca.us/l/VTyoGFnyuDt8) | [CHIP IN $7 TO FLIP THE MAGA MAJORITY! »](https://takano4ca.us/l/rDjx1ERyu030)
---

Mark Takano

The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

subject: I really thought it would work

body:
I can’t keep asking

---
I thought my last email would've worked, but I guess not. I thought more people would step up to help a Navy SEAL, but I guess not.

And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Friend.

_**If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will see this as a major pickup opportunity and start flooding cash into my race.**_

This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6.

I lead the team of Navy SEALs running for Congress in 2022 and 2024, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, _**I****'****m the toughest Republican in Washington, D.C.**_

So, I'm going to be blunt with you. If the Left can get their foot in the door this early, _**I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.**_

But you have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and SEAL Team 6 Commander, if you help me out today, I can promise you that we will ruin the Left's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking - will you help me out?
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zssp1in5avqa9r7fvmcpr6huee5n468vo5heebqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znfus14qitc8284lsjnmsjv3al5h0fj9j5oonl58_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlnubkkeoiuc7ipnlg1gkkpsluiqdn7r5pivf4ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1s7c724bg2oo4rbt62tncuqi76ujvhngh21j6q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqfqtppa9e5dmnl9gt6jh2a3h6ue0gb9bou334f0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrlroi9q41o0n515no7mfbi5k2o00f9311fpr4pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1gdmd0d5ngppbd28kfq5ukbo0ch6n3ou4lr6no0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2c9ie4o31c9h2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here: Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free. Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response. Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **[Trader Joe's Recalls 61,000 Bottles Of Sparkling Water Due To A Laceration Hazard.](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Trader Joe’s has recalled more than 61,000 units of Gerolsteiner Sparkling Water sold across 12 states due to a potential safety risk. The glass bottles may crack, posing a laceration hazard, according to an announcement by the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) on Mar. 13. The recall affects 750ml Gerolsteiner Sparkling Water bottles sold [...]...Click to read more

# **[Trump admin to dismantle 'irretrievably broken' government media agency](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
President Donald Trump signed an executive order on Friday directing his administration to dismantle the United States Agency for Global Media and six other government offices.The action will impact the USAGM's grantees and subsidiaries, including the Voice of America and the Office of Cuba Broadcasting.'A significant step toward restoring the greatness of the United States and promoting freedom and democracy.'Trump's order, "Continuing the Reduction of the Federal Bureaucracy," calls for the government entities to be "eliminated to the maximum extent consistent with applicable law.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: The grassroots is crushing it around the state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025
body:
Here's how to sign her petition
| | |
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

---
|

---
| Let's Get Amanda Chase's name on the ballot for Virginia Governor
---
|
# ONLY 2 FULL WEEKS LEFT
# UNTIL THE DEADLINE
---
|
# SIGN AMANDA'S PETITION UPDATE
---
|

---
| | [CLICK HERE AND PRINT OFF THE PETITON ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016pP0agdgx-vMb7tjdIdrmUm3Jt0_y_xuyxNmKYTfOA7k6fhC4icO1akU59oPoKagKehknwUCpcoX7AXwuj8adLvgEdwQGOb8051k6mlRu-20MI3MWN7gUlJYdhA3bXRi6ncg9Ka_rXLXl1A_pvh9Qxmtvy5mzGrw&c=d6JON_rBPCt4Xp8MQOlIdvLf1DDSZljZYKGLydvLco6roaA_70Ajlw==&ch=HitWV_mZ-pJKs_NCqh_9yIicXeG3deTuvfdGd7-u601dne0HTbPeEQ==)
---
|
Dear Hello This morning I'm heading out to a Colonial Heights Chamber luncheon before heading to the Fairfax GOP this evening. I wanted to pause to give you an update.
You are crushing it! Yesterday we spent an entire day from morning to bedtime just verifying all of the signatures that you've sent in and that we've collected.
Thank you to all of the unit chairs who have mailed in their petitions as well to ensure all candidates are on the ballot. The petitions are beginning to roll in. And we have a team right here in Appomattox verifying those signatures.
This is the most massive volunteer grassroots campaign I've witnessed in the 15 years I've been involved in politics. It's super exciting to be apart of this excitement for our country and our state, to make Virginia Great Again.
Tonight, we will have a campaign presence at the Charles City GOP meeting, the Mechanicsville Tea Party, Lancaster County and we are looking for a volunteer in Madison County. Thanks to all of the volunteers who are speaking on my behalf to these units and telling people why they are supporting me for governor and then collecting signatures from attendees. All volunteers!
We have the momentum, thanks to you. We still have 2 full weeks to collect signatures. People are taking vacation time to collect signatures. The stories are truly inspiring of people putting every excuse aside to collect 10,000 signatures in record time.
While we are making significant progress, we still need signatures in all 11 Congressional Districts, but specifically Congressional District 3, which is Norfolk, Hampton, Newport News, Portsmouth and party of Chesapeake. This district is currently represented by Democrat Congressman Bobby Scott. We will be at the Hampton Gun Show, so we should quickly get to our goal.
So if you can help out, please print off the petition on our website at www.chaseforgovernor. com and give us a call at 804 370 8727 and we will walk you through what to do, or you can read instructions below.
I will also have a table at both the Richmond Gun Show at the Richmond International Raceway from 9am to 5pm this Saturday and Sunday and next Saturday and Sunday at the Hampton Gun Show. I'll be there Saturdays and we will have volunteers manning the booth each Sunday. Please stop by and sign our petition or drop off your notarized petitions.
Thank you for believing in me. I'm both overwhelmed and humbled by your enthusiasm and action to get me on the ballot.
Thanks for crushing it with me, so we can make Virginia Great Again. I believe with all of my heart that with the enthusiasm we're seeing from the grassroots across the state we can collect the signatures we need by Thursday, April 3.
Many of you are still collecting. Please go ahead and Fed Ex to us the ones that you have already signed in front of a notary, so our team can verify the signatures. It takes about 20 minutes to verify each petition.
Then, please continue collecting. Remember, we need 400 signatures in each Congressional District.
I am so impressed with the commitment level of so many of you. And I want you to know I am just as committed, working every hour of the day to collect and verify our signatures at night.
Keep this in mind. We need a minimum of 400 signatures in each Congressional District. That's about 35 pages of signatures. So please keep going to parking lots across Virginia to find gracious people willing to sign our petition.
Remember, in order for my name to appear on the ballot, we have to collect the necessary signatures to get my name on the ballot.
We must collect 10,000 valid signatures, 400 in each Congressional District, and as a campaign, turn the signatures into the State Board of Elections before Thursday, April 3 at 5pm.
We would like to receive all forms before Monday, March 31, so that we can properly organize and vet the signatures before turning them in to the Virginia State Board of Elections.
Hundreds of you have reached out and are actively collecting signatures. Thank you. It's only through your efforts that my name will appear on the ballot. Currently, our campaign is 100 percent run by volunteers in each locality. We have no paid staff. The amazing organization you've seen from my campaign is all run by volunteers who want an American First Governor, who can beat Abigail Spanberger in November.
If 500 people collect just 2 pages or 24 signatures, we meet our goal. Will you commit to helping?
Thanks to many of you who have already answered that call. If everyone does their part, you will be able to vote for me in June. If not, you won't have a choice.
We have a team of grassroots volunteers in every Congressional District across the state actively collecting signatures. To join a team in your area, please reply to this email and I will personally connect you with volunteers in your area.
In order for you to vote for me on June 17, please print off the attached petition and collect the signatures of your family, friends and neighbors, so that I can get on the ballot.
WE CANNOT COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE.
Signatures must be witnessed in person by signing an old fashioned paper petition ballot.
Are you ready to say yes? Here's what you need to do:

1. Print off the attached form on one sheet of paper, front and back.
2. Witness your friends, family and neighbors sign the petition form. Please make sure they actually sign the form. Please also make sure their writing is legible so that signatures can be verified.
3. Keep in mind that you can't sign your own petition form.
4. Please collect signatures by[ Congressional District.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016pP0agdgx-vMb7tjdIdrmUm3Jt0_y_xuyxNmKYTfOA7k6fhC4icO1cPjja2Qo0WMZnbfJv9gWghDcTBhGh4wNth52P5eMAyJdOkfNLLMfE1aQISp2KMa7KKxsUAMUU86FHVrB-DAfPDVGAZGOLpIsIiQS-yo5a1FdRNSfXofCJ1TTg2qyIOz7gfGm1RFU4LOk2vr3Gpwv3M=&c=d6JON_rBPCt4Xp8MQOlIdvLf1DDSZljZYKGLydvLco6roaA_70Ajlw==&ch=HitWV_mZ-pJKs_NCqh_9yIicXeG3deTuvfdGd7-u601dne0HTbPeEQ==) One Congressional District per form. You can write the Congressional District in the upper right hand corner.
5. Get the petition notarized at your local bank for free.
6. Drop the petition off in person to: 2023 Church Street, Appomattox, VA 24522
7. Or Fed Ex the petition to:

Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
For security reasons we will not publish a public calendar, but you can call us at 804 370 8727 or email me at amanda@chaseforva.com to find out when we will be in your area and to coordinate picking up your petitions with the volunteer coordinator in your area.
---
| Please use the link below to print off the petition forms.
Please remember the forms must be double sided and printed front and back. You must also witness every signature and visit your local bank to have a notary sign off on your petition form before mailing.
Please note that we need the original copy. Photocopies are not allowed.
If you have any questions please email Craig at craig@chaseforva.com or call 804 370 8727. If you have trouble printing the forms, we can mail you the forms.
I can do this with your help. Please print off a petition now. Don't wait. Get your immediate family to sign the petition and then get your friends at church and work to sign your petition. Time is not on our side. Less than 19 days to collect signatures.
If not you, then who?
Please click the button below to print your petitions today and start collecting signatures as you run your errands throughout your day.
---
| | [CHASE PETITION FORMS CLICK HERE](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016pP0agdgx-vMb7tjdIdrmUm3Jt0_y_xuyxNmKYTfOA7k6fhC4icO1eQgchdcfwU653OHjMGbd2W7mos84_LCkBsenX5nxaurrFLfv9fbMYbB05ATSG_1qCT1kljkZX60X6PGTZo5-Y6Khqe7ES-aGTXLqEi7K014&c=d6JON_rBPCt4Xp8MQOlIdvLf1DDSZljZYKGLydvLco6roaA_70Ajlw==&ch=HitWV_mZ-pJKs_NCqh_9yIicXeG3deTuvfdGd7-u601dne0HTbPeEQ==)
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO FIND YOUR CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016pP0agdgx-vMb7tjdIdrmUm3Jt0_y_xuyxNmKYTfOA7k6fhC4icO1ULgqPBlM4dD7Kkudjmyvca-zw46Tk0VpbugZcZsPZYDSLzkjeMHfkR63TNb1MZ8uR6T1QYFlTmaRpnms9FnWQJPW2PNfmW2uvh17-wS-iseyoufNLEkDhzHil7STA2N-PZ49l8aX0quZebpqCmL20Q=&c=d6JON_rBPCt4Xp8MQOlIdvLf1DDSZljZYKGLydvLco6roaA_70Ajlw==&ch=HitWV_mZ-pJKs_NCqh_9yIicXeG3deTuvfdGd7-u601dne0HTbPeEQ==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# MAP OF CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS
---
| Adopt a Congressional District. We need 400 signatures in each of the 11 Congressional Districts. Please text or call 804 370 8727 and let us know where you are collecting signatures so I know where I need to focus our efforts.
Please be sure to collect signatures by Congressional District. If you aren't sure which Congressional District you live in, you can check the map below.
---
| |
---
|
# IMPORTANT DATES
---
|
Petition Signatures due to State Board of Elections: Thursday, April 3, 2025, at 5pm (please get your forms to us ASAP)
Primary Date: Tuesday, June 17, 2025 General Election Date: Tuesday, November 4, 2025

---
|
# PLEASE GIVE GENEROUSLY
---
| Abigail Spanberger has raised over $15 million dollars for her campaign for governor, but the people are not with her. She's out of touch with most Virginians. And I'm not intimidated by her. Once people realize where she gets her money her campaign is going to implode.
Please give your best donation to help pay for gas to travel the state. Thankfully, many across the state already know me. So we don't have to spend as much as our opponents who have no statewide name ID.
Our campaign is run by volunteers not paid campaign staff and operatives. But we do have to pay event fees for gun shows, entrance to events and office supplies. Any contribution you can make is greatly appreciated.
---
| | [ DONATE HERE ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016pP0agdgx-vMb7tjdIdrmUm3Jt0_y_xuyxNmKYTfOA7k6fhC4icO1UU9Qc2j_SuUy_DfMdP4ZyzUhl_n2sxHu6OGvbM8fbh8sUFDx0hb_bG7mahgpnHfgxXgG_V4e7wSqH7hwIrKU5q1yGqG9fH7dlHG8FwyoCOBzh7qyRUoVgYdzo8L0BQTMoaLX1g1cPhrgzgmDRdKcmnrY3lQYie7HHrvg4MOflAT&c=d6JON_rBPCt4Xp8MQOlIdvLf1DDSZljZYKGLydvLco6roaA_70Ajlw==&ch=HitWV_mZ-pJKs_NCqh_9yIicXeG3deTuvfdGd7-u601dne0HTbPeEQ==)
---
| Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase 2025

---
| | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US

name: Chris Konawel
subject: For Immediate Release
body:
Konawel & Moore Team Up to Take Back LD3
| | | | For Immediate Release
---
---
| |
---
Chris Konawel
---
| |
---
Lawrence Moore
---
| Konawel & Moore Team Up to Take Back LD3
---
| |
---
| Conservative reformers will run as a team to fight for an affordable South Jersey.
---
| GLOUCESTER COUNTY, NJ | March 17, 2025
Commissioner Chris Konawel and firefighter Lawrence Moore announced today that they are running together for New Jersey's 3rd Legislative District. The decision comes ahead of the Gloucester County Convention and pairs a battle-tested County Commissioner in Konawel with a young, up-and-coming leader in Moore. Konawel's experience in County government pairs well with Moore's background in state and local government. Together, Konawel and Moore will fight for lower taxes, safer neighborhoods, and more jobs. "Lawrence Moore is the real deal," said Commissioner Chris Konawel. "As Deputy Mayor, he's held the line on taxes. As a firefighter, he's kept our communities safe. Together, we'll get South Jersey moving again." "Chris is a fighter who took on the status quo - that's why he's won twice where others couldn't," said Moore. "Together, we'll put out the dumpster fire that is Trenton politics, and make New Jersey affordable again." ABOUT CHRIS KONAWEL County Commissioner Chris Konawel is one of two Republicans to win countywide twice since 2010. Konawel's 2021 victory was the first time a Republican won a Gloucester County race since 2011. As Commissioner, Konawel held the line on taxes and spending, developed and funded the first County Commissioner Mobile Office in the state, and advocated for better care for animals at the Gloucester County Animal Shelter. Konawel will take his focus on safer communities, lower taxes, and fighting corruption from the County Courthouse to the State House. ABOUT LAWRENCE MOORE Lawrence Moore currently serves as the Deputy Mayor of Harrison Township. A volunteer firefighter for over a decade, Lawrence serves as a Captain with the Harmony Fire Company. The proud son of a school bus driver, Lawrence knows how hard it is to make ends meet in New Jersey, and he'll take on the bad behavior in Trenton that makes New Jersey unaffordable for the next generation.
---

And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Friend.

_**If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, Democrats will see this as a major pickup opportunity and start flooding cash into my race.**_

This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6.

I lead the team of Navy SEALs running for Congress in 2022 and 2024, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, _**I****'****m the toughest Republican in Washington, D.C.**_

So, I'm going to be blunt with you. If the Left can get their foot in the door this early, _**I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.**_

But you have my word; as a former Navy SEAL and SEAL Team 6 Commander, if you help me out today, I can promise you that we will ruin the Left's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking - will you help me out?

body:
The Pentagon confirmed that [a Navy guided-missile destroyer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngc0RdwZjBoYu3tK1o0XMOVyFTYRpIr99le6df-mT_q_rfA2ceb9_ho18W8uMCk2n-g7GOQbO56xl9CsRUi_Jg9WIDgEGmbyLqxmI1p7cTUeKwTqtgZx2S1RIo2T_1lQPIygFgBeMYIbekFU3u5AdhFYUuZV6-S68t0RrPsuT6mUpm8w-tfY4RP8hcBI4tUSJc343gVMqG-30OgROBtxoDXR7eJ7dK9Qj8aO7lRqpdgctP5XbKXCS1cfHi3PmY7BCq_sW-E-T7b_zp8ffAAAA__98LVrZ) was deployed to the southern border to aid in securing the U.S. border and operate in international waters.

# Tuesday, March 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1766, the British Parliament [repealed the Stamp Act ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LtuhDAQheGnMZ2RPRgDhYs0dJs2JRpgWCYyF9mjRbx9tFHa1J90jvR_PYYHcuT9-YkbBVmOAQzU2lTatsOMHO_BFXNYiICqgoJtHEAH1vpiDdOC49IZWy_jZLvJjUC-rbH1tQPnx6rg8F4zlW2tMdZCCbOtfVVTY8ZmosYrZ2hmOVL5ffAuKy3xPl6UyunYihhWkTOr6kNBr6C_rqtcOcuR7rcr6GXlrGe8Ne_6TxT0J6bIuNEuOtFJGLOWlXQW3E6NkxQpzOfFMXL2jXLmuSHH30f5r8ArwE8AAAD__7dZXw0)after four months of widespread protests in the colonies about taxation without representation, a major cause of the Revolution. Today we introduce a special section devoted to the next three weeks of March Madness, covering the men's and women's NCAA tournaments in detail for college basketball fans. Take a look below and let us know what you think! We're flying today with our sponsors at [Sunday's Dog Food](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFuhDAQheHT2N2imcEYKFykodu0KZFhxuDI4BU4G3H7aKO06d_7pP_jPt59THFf3v0mroQ8ElBzg_qG3cg-pms0ml0QIam1OGwNUU-IVq-u77xhbyfLFnqDwTY9cOgpCDDTPOnoXhrU2CEAIlXE2Ni6kRamdpbWKgPCseSj-sxxL6uEdOWnHNWcN53cWsrjVPWbokHRcH7t7K8z5IPzcr4mioa_gz4cP75jSvG0rTKwbD6mX6X8V_V09BMAAP__dKJPNA), offering top quality dog food for your canine companions.
|
---
## Navy Destroyer Sent to Southern Border
The Pentagon confirmed that [a Navy guided-missile destroyer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngc0RdwZjBoYu3tK1o0XMOVyFTYRpIr99le6df-mT_q_rfA2ceb9_ho18W8uMCk2n-g7GOQbO56xl9CsRUi_Jg9WIDgEGmbyLqxmI1p7cTUeKwTqtgZx2S1RIo2T_1lQPIygFgBeMYIbekFU3u5AdhFYUuZV6-S68t0RrPsuT6mUpm8w-tfY4RP8hcBI4tUSJc343gVMqG-30OgROBtxoDXR7eJ7dK9Qj8aO7lRqpdgctP5XbKXCS1cfHi3PmY7BCq_sW-E-T7b_zp8ffAAAA__98LVrZ) was deployed to the southern border to aid in securing the U.S. border and operate in international waters. The USS Gravely, an Arleigh Burke-class warship armed with Tomahawk cruise missiles, will be stationed in [the Northern Command area](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb8GOiPvgg1XuEhz3aVNiXx4DRsZfLJ9EP4-In2q1zzNSPP1GB-WA2_zp13JFB9HlKiEbAUMo7MczrGrnfFESG1NBvoO8YYAul6Me05-IO8lkHedtsr7G4JyStIgvYaazUWTLQwgJQA26EDpVlEvn_1Eva46SY5LTM135K0s5MMZd0rNFNc6mKWUV67ajwrvFd6P42h8_GlxWniyc7xOFd43OvI1dj-Fo1xSPCmJHN9lobSJZ0yOklg5Z46beOcs5mR3CmedjHsdHAJn3VednFfL4c9c_iuxG_wNAAD__19FYvc), which includes the Gulf of America, the Straits of Florida, and much of the Caribbean region. The destroyer will also house a squad of U.S. Coast Guard Law Enforcement Detachment operators, [elite specialists](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSpCAUAL8GMyh4gDABwSVmc-mFFspz5BZlClDLv9_arU33B7q7-t9zfPqY4v766zd0bckjcNCUSyrsGHxM96i64BZEQNmhE0YBPECIvludBqv9ZIwWfLGLnCw35qFmxa1UU3jYLrovGpfCCs6FAAZB6F5qNHwyM5qeKI4htlzY_xz3tuKS7nxiYXPeuuTW1t6VyD8EBgLDdV3sO2nzMbE5s-ODwLDjVQkMvrQ4J6RCad4LZQgMrRzbmx610lfxJ6ab7v68acDaSr6x0JqPtmLZ6ZRLwMLWtqWuuPC-Ykqx9oYo_vqRbV37bc_p4DMAAP__1HFnvQ) in maritime missions such as combating piracy and intercepting drug trafficking. The warship [recently served](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGv3CAQhH8N7jjB4rPPBYWfIncvTYqUFob1eRMwFnBH_O8jJ_WrdjUzGmm-n5_zpyFP-_O7CajLGmcQcOdCcfmYnSF_zm3j9IoIqBrUsm8BBpCyazYNw4K2RdGJdrED2AUU3NfBLcO6Ph6daEhfbULJhxRCSriBk_dO3bEXS2-x71gr0FGJ6fYr0l42XP0Z35huNobG662UIzM1MpgYTLXWW8j75TGYcOevzGDasV7n_2_eJ68m5Y0O7vDw8UTH45XkAf-QjXyJyWHigXKmuHMTyPGSXuHgFAI9kymXbJOxv12sO4PJJD6O8kPlOjI1RUuOqW8fFzKs-Qemo0naHZW8p9z1rBXPYMj_W1C-IvrW8DcAAP___l16wA) in the Middle East, where it was involved in shooting down ship attacks by Iran-backed Houthi rebels.
## Trump: Biden Autopen Use 'Voids' Pardons
President Trump declared Sunday that preemptive pardons granted by former President Biden to members of the House Jan. 6 select committee were "void" and "vacant" because he said they were [signed with an autopen](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOhCAURb8GOgw8FLSg2MZutt3SoDzHt0Ewymjm7zduP91NbnJOzs9jeHiKlJ7ffkVX5jyAhEZILVQ7BE_xPdQ8uBkRUHN0ytYAHShl-OLQaD8jBu1NaE1ng1YdgDYTQDfKUXNyN01q1SoplYIKgmqMbtDK0U5oDaslBip5r34zpbLgHN_5xL2a8sqjW0rZDqa_GPQM-uu6qmk8El7H_TPo78mgL_tr3cRIAZPY_B5yOsSZKQj_KnnDxKDnuwvbRTHSYSyr5XP1FP8t5VP16eAvAAD__-tDWd4) and not by hand.

[Posting on Truth Social,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwR0Ru9jGKSj-hi5_e6W1CUvCCYNlSCy__cnXXzka6dNovm7zjWKK-fmfFrYtlBkVDlJpCdPsKaZj7jtvAzOy7tiC6RGvCDB2LxsQidGbgWiYIHDo72Qmo689EQVQXbSnpjRMoBQAXtDDMOqBjbqbB5tR9Ip9bGW7fJeY24tDOsqHt8ujLF2yr9bWKvQ_gU6gy8daajsrge6EBTqlBTowAt27ysx7Feja9l5WWemo8h495yrp3crKWa60-XLmjWUuu_yU6AW6brN-3WNKsY5G9Oq5UEy_E9pfl3ws_gQAAP__LNliTw) Trump also said Biden “knew nothing” about the pardons, raising the question as to whether his staff had “committed a crime.” Trump warned that members of the former Jan. 6 House select committee to whom Biden issued pardons would be “subject to investigation at the highest level.”

At a press briefing Monday, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Trump was ["raising the point"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D-PpSAUBfBPg919gQv-Kyi2sXvbbmlQrsIGwRF8xm8_cfqpT_LLOeffe3wbH3xc_5qNdFnSiBxr4BJEN1rjwz2qyuqFCElWpEWrEHsUoqmcXjrRL3KWnPNp7pWt1dL1StV2MrKfZll5_Whcik5wLgS-0Iq6kTW1fGpnahumOFlf0vH6n3wsjpZwpw8drzltVdCulD0z-YfhwHCI955yeSKGwwMzHLhkOIiW4XBmiHRlhkM5zm2Hy2SYaF19XKE4gq-TcvEpwuUowmzCsxombylmMGdJO0XYzWFTzPBJ3sLlfCFw6cwE2dwPXR3a7pcPweemZYqvm_Hhp2z57byPxu8AAAD__7mbcfQ) of the legality of the pardons and that questions about autopen usage should be directed to former Biden White House officials.
## List: U.S. Military Bases Around the World
A recently released map shows the location of every known overseas American military base, totaling at least 128 bases across 49 countries. [Here’s the map](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZuRfQabDB66sKVrR3TgI7nWYIQdEG9fpXv3T79P-n_dhzty5PXxiQv5MqcBFLRSGam7ISDHa2iq4GciIFOR164BuIHWtnp6g3NnbzDT2NgJDJqxxaYLFjt3m1znKvZvTRndaaW0hhqCbq1pyanRTeSsaBQFLmmvvxOv5UlzvNJBez2lpYr-WcqWhfkQ0Avoz_OsD84vjBNuXDByLu-hgH7BbaMg6aD9kj9rOlf5klkuHLngfskRM8k3nAmzgL7afdhOjpGzdaJRjwU5_p2W_yIcHn4DAAD__-MoYDA). The information is based on unclassified data from a Congressional report published in 2024. The bases shown in red are controlled by the U.S., and the ones in blue are controlled by the host country.

Japan has the most U.S. bases, with 14, followed by the Philippines (9) and South Korea (8). The U.S. also has numerous bases across Europe and some, though fewer, in the Middle East. You can [see the data on troop totals here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZuRfQabDB66sKVrR3TgI7nWYIQdEG9fpXv3T79P-n_dhzty5PXxiQv5MqcBFLRSGam7ISDHa2iq4GciIFOR164BuIHWtnp6g3NnbzDT2NgJDJqxxaYLFjt3m1znKvZvTRndaaW0hhqCbq1pyanRTeSsaBQFLmmvvxOv5UlzvNJBez2lpYr-WcqWhfkQ0Avoz_OsD84vjBNuXDByLu-hgH7BbaMg6aD9kj9rOlf5klkuHLngfskRM8k3nAmzgL7afdhOjpGzdaJRjwU5_p2W_yIcHn4DAAD__-MoYDA)

The destroyer will also house a squad of U.S. Coast Guard Law Enforcement Detachment operators, in maritime missions such as combating piracy and intercepting drug trafficking. The warship in the Middle East, where it was involved in shooting down ship attacks by Iran-backed Houthi rebels. Trump: Biden Autopen Use 'Voids' Pardons President Trump declared Sunday that preemptive pardons granted by former President Biden to members of the House Jan. 6 select committee were "void" and "vacant" because he said they were and not by hand. Trump also said Biden “knew nothing” about the pardons, raising the question as to whether his staff had “committed a crime.” Trump warned that members of the former Jan. 6 House select committee to whom Biden issued pardons would be “subject to investigation at the highest level.” At a press briefing Monday, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Trump was of the legality of the pardons and that questions about autopen usage should be directed to former Biden White House officials. List: U.S. Military Bases Around the World A recently released map shows the location of every known overseas American military base, totaling at least 128 bases across 49 countries. . The information is based on unclassified data from a Congressional report published in 2024. The bases shown in red are controlled by the U.S., and the ones in blue are controlled by the host country. Japan has the most U.S. bases, with 14, followed by the Philippines (9) and South Korea (8). The U.S. also has numerous bases across Europe and some, though fewer, in the Middle East. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/w0y_DG5rLTv3iQodx-4o75YvWHer8D0me_6xGMqbIWSRdGUsVt-b4-ORaIR28ZxWNZMROUvDT_3NmkNxpoTv_yL7J7MtXf12HM-BpyOBjzB4rxIXxpz5Abh4oM_azZnmPFdCUgT7iu1ts_rtPrNT_NXAckD0q9hy_T0BbYQt-b1h4dzWOK5BR5yxRHo6-c_hN2klMMNM-ygOAYQzTJB_Ni3Q6yQtsnvrqn4nb1cifeQcQmwCgNWLI0BPFe964-JVHUhqMJrmcGg5O0qgg2cow58eEr-XePibBcxfBRr2xbuLqZvqvbW--Ku287lZ_bf-tIgkUpJ-oxs6-I6CADW2AdUFgXLC3vwbcJc9_8WEKDcai4rjQsHpM7cYCoa8aj-ytG54jffV1p0yBtTfghHAqulD6SsTwNcpiqmgXAycvap-QBGlTa-OL_LfRv3YHCVx5fgIKKvPIzIUKvyuQtkDGABukbgcMEMRewRuMQ0KkYM37HkzcgjFfwGY/M67zdZlPPL9JGmPFASYZt0GtGglE9HaM/7) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/xe1Dgc0zkdjqlQN8lVQexfTXxnYuENtXWPWG-WDSZI_jl2s4wLvmwtfd2o75WPubmOOd5aLb-5VmmwawPkUrf-9R9rcYptDsZjCZzDsaZDrbddcDgI0kNPioSYD809MqTlmjBV-JnuJdKEKw6pXx_LWMhWy28W17EqUQj6zw8ivu8s9oqP4wVbHCpuLrfjXGJVLApaS2QhFrCyNEpgSikNGgk000zWRU9b10PwwvHQ4TNzb_nZYvq3JfiZqSzYR0Pz7Ol_XyZiqUJVP20qvRGk5PdgpDIOpi-XDWIim40cDnu3Bk3WYis3YOSYB1ZylvJyKOsB23NvZLN88x9Y6PN2qr7nEgWehP-1RWJPIGT9tYPPrgJvtxqLVnx65InNSqzu4YKrZL9I51uWAanL5995MFacvl8PAK_QfhhXGhprClZvr85TMI0WoWM3WRRzr18hX7bIdBJFRyJOTE_oGd_ehhr6WookJbWhhDRx3ZvfAkKUlGgD8Jqnhq/7RPHAPcdxCfLxX6pfmZwiRNnxPOAKEHv/7) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/pY1fOzHUd2EtU8GSjebneUT3ZeccffEPP6T6lcpz_U64Q-EmzHxMA8GeF694DyTGMj69bj3wbSwUOIYhn1B8bLvac10C_jmR4xNYAF0agUt8ks5o8E4Qlzpcb9LVeOz_OrIqMIz_TtjD2LQZ5TitFBvOqVNZ4PTB8OeuVOmP5FUDuZcbyXf2Pg9vx8KjVNzZmmhvdYnQmbcudiJVa5PQbtwOOgzDPcpn9xuNLgpZSF3ZIl2xO1SbOm8yVKNF2SOq0EQk8popPI2v5szwnxmEYPPT-W5p50Iv0N3_nWCX1KPV-98GbcWOp3k8d3I7WEN5BQethwX1PyfH8YIjjBWcrtm4H7pF7ggipg9-AD_RYmqKdsBHj7i9eCQexzU2-cgvGloxK7VHfXEglpPhgU_t6t54xOP7Nr2rmhTkHeSYeL336NUsKFTNrLlf4Ys_0sqXHPuSoODS25A5-WA1I3t5VkKzkL69dwGRlyNmUgVAt3ZvtNjtD8Q4oc3K/86nMWtYvEqUu2um8LGc3ZHApfNo-UuRo/7). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/NX_zgNIGF-UjyL1RQrsSL-99biMWDuOQFh4DULJKA_IRhzg8dX1piosW_zwyMqVLCZ3CmKW6e3k-JxMseO09BDNsat0NA0ZuZbBLa_LYoWro4UEilFcwlENiHJs11t2AJDw8x5nT8mx5d29M2x-_K2hCCtidHabRGEoEPgIBNiu_J3pC7j6HPWUd2M7ZSkV2iUz9ZuAtuuFZUn01hnj_gYzFWgK-DYviNcZVYbmxjkCSMYIegoRq7CndTzsElgbJRMVXRspbvIlZyxVkjW3Z-tcIrH6Z1318dioVP7noCZhShYvnElYDQvAHBfRmC62DEFERPe3jAvKeRaygfSIN5dG8BrZ243vvhWMUZenG8JcXA09mbAuzmdQ3FCFIeIFFjOTIs6uoiKm9ATfq1qlGC0KeeaWd-wXz2E-vaB-kfDC-d8e2GQlESB2_NGe4HfxtDULnNIbjk3zMz1Y3dbOzfgHIpNsKQId-0VcUoDsz3DgKopvHe5k_N57y/tvwQ1yPwdQwWE3uCoNMa_2k3Z-T-mM4K/7)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: FL-6 Special Election Alert
body:
Democrats have spent $10 MILLION to defeat me in FL-6

| | | | |
---
Friend,
Hi it’s Randy Fine, the GOP Nominee in the FL-6 Special Election for Congress.
Before I tell you a little bit about myself, you need to know that I’m in the political fight of my life. **_[Democrats have spent over $10 MILLION to defeat me in my special election and take control in Congress](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nQ/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
It is a massive amount of money and they are smearing the good name I’ve spent my life building in a shocking political hatchet job.
Liberal online donors are sending in massive waves of cash to my Democrat opponent on a daily basis, and it is critically important we keep up. __**[If you can help, I truly need your support](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nQ/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ _**.**_
Your donation will help me go to Congress with this resume:

* I was the first elected Republican in Florida to endorse President Trump for president in his 2024 campaign, and he’s endorsed me in this race.
* I went to Harvard University for undergrad and business school... before it went woke!
* My nickname is the Hebrew Hammer, and when I get to Congress the antisemitic squad is going to be in trouble.

I truly appreciate your support, we must win this race to keep President Trump’s agenda on track.
**_[If you’re able, a donation of any amount would mean so much. Every little bit helps](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nQ/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

_Humbly,_

**Randy Fine** FL-6 Republican Nominee
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a9nQ/?__vbtrk=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwMDAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/kcQFK43J48yN8gmR0kP6VbEihnvCNPsb_AIIa1Cm2fPgNE9tyo7liD0LH4FeRiTwmQmaNuRS7K3YagdQUOhn05Y2CatrV4B2Cvwx4KF4OTX3SeFpyyrl8Sz5F4s36aZNtp_bTuPCAKGGBU_kPGoIc4WXhcoaMJzrSlZfhtDdugJgw403iXNEKzSF8Ou--yuVRN2gZmhxlYBhaJEAAotRW_UTELoKyaYIqhooMo70iHp4ng2ePCGOT_KhzhSBQOkqaHc2wBD7HNAFkS8Ga71DIUE_V0HKvzigIyslM1ngn5yCu63GRqV_X1YQaZdb_Ozk7HV5v_ExuYPIYafNPY06zz_8_5nSw-kjac-LtuSF34HCpa4L_DNnhof6O1cywxTYSXHKOdwRNderPwjAB7X9wzZLbKM7ygOGfOlBHhSn35Ndep39tAU26jykSIaY1rtJIOizrX-L1FH5kgT39nuGXXo1co1qIJeM8bWkpJKzG98jBxDVcFsopLgM/P-zHNt0on_di5frAwm4FX1DTxnxcvZNw/7) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/TWSmL9dVcbiqjgaiDCGmqtea4fdSJzH3y13hao3b2UDKMP2uUIfCa_fjytFjCn1yoo_qoDWxsg_nNCeVmnv8I9ggjl46EJRzFp_Ul4O9vTflX6hY2ELSU41abJ07zbW4M-PRkIt3rhb-GzGeIcpmJJf_13bdQIba4gh2mG4gGI3e0YxM4s1EC6Hp37oMMLicawEuh2erM5x_KMeubPqfvHwdCjxvCmxSP8ZwV0eP-h_xqLzj8kYySq_frOiZXU7rItbtvuHXb_P0AkQRC-CgwQSjdcocUI1DxExgLwKE5zopLqIg4xib9QQHXa34mkMt2fxjYI78RiL2uVVnLOPFFHe19oeog2irWdLVW6oLF2VD-nuKTx87eO8Qza-7ffvr2-4JkGUEuKB3-6f3x3HizSO7a5FodvOxL_v_wOnRaF1VHG3MovFwSW_5FYd3OOR-jlgnnRRxJ3UhSXyVfgwwBZfxSMHcfZoD8eZAaVXX_jLCKlZHGoVk7vyI/txMhuzJzxQb4rop5bfw4D3Fgp9v3gjWx/7) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/OF-3dvIL22XfACvSJlcimn8LX2mfbWEj8mTxRyu4OCK5x2e06Bnd738zB1rZUdacXGeOx6YApPahkk9xry3hO2FZcxIml_2s8RAR8cHoSrvmQePL_NfssjsUt8mDjcwwVtKGqygzayNlDkMgUZcg1pVRc36KP8dj2SRNT4rFAI2UI4wGf3qydEMNL3U16FgPev9tvq0_3DXtH9YRyHt-_kO1MFYsQIygTQYUm7jyzvFofwYpgS9mCPxRi0qRzZDUUvXFnCxUYekQ7Wc_MD6kSNwiKdkF6ikx35m2yCD5Tj96YmUoNNND75cP4RrtgqWdD1ErD3XppYMKd_a9mW-ElHK8HqH8g7eL2pZGUz7gYvjeVjM7PngTtDNzJpX365VuDOksC-dxlaYk7sM2vTj6ADBtxoZRkRL3CNHaV8L93EW0cUszXqyX-jOL9BJCDwadvRXMvlwyJac9E8JJIh3YDKUgeP9QnbG2rZkHLI7UPQdp_YMW7WUazWjX/1leNGOdxvVIKDT7LaZBZyO0uo5Gt9IQ_/7). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/b6n4WJK3NF_tHt9WjRY9dCUWrNm_CzyszFrLBBVeq1-vO42el9_27EvNWqWmyNGhBneEjO-Udexey7luECz3-SjzxJ5Kmd6M-ZUjQ1pbnmvFMKk3jxXeT0E_AcSKgRKYQXCns8l5N9ztmuCYq7vfUnjua5gSmgZu6qgpV5LTgocGuyzldAxVPqFECPQonR4F21Z6o3GtzHscMZYgK5YGfPhdv8mFAr8MhcmXNd2PqRtJzYLfynd-cQW-y3uzqHS5uUvIANNgnz6IvpHlUHjvxjpJaW5uN92cU6MboT7C6OtWjY7_fbZOVMqjnl_bngNeB8yiY-l4w5DeA9NWjRTMZ5ox1rqWC05yrFsVv2raqzLQno2FEserVCcY5zAzacET6zRVx90YbQFwIvC6kQurjzo0_mppYU6NcsmsaCGBsy4MqGUJa6z8Zb-PRTPzdpdlohCX402gmsuT8lu0a6Pqm-5dqxMEl4JlbX_VvakH9o4zuMYz1UIY8MjZ/Wn0TofTkOvPCyL7pc7RhG1IaiU9GONxL/7)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning

I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God. The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s “Theology 101” online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century. “Theology 101” has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is . You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative. We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of “Theology 101” on DVD. Secure yours right now at: Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump’s Hypocrisy on Free Speech Is on Full Display.
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wtj01-vpiepw-kyd76rh0/)
---
# **Trump’s Hypocrisy on Free Speech Is on Full Display**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wtj01-vpiepx-kyd76rh1/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Donald Trump loves to claim he's a champion of free speech—until it applies to the press holding him accountable. Now, his White House is seizing control over which news outlets can cover him up close, a direct attack on the First Amendment and a **shocking break from over a century of tradition.** For all of Trump’s cries about "cancel culture," he has no problem silencing journalists who refuse to bend to his propaganda. His administration is **barring the Associated Press** from key presidential events simply because they won’t adopt his absurd demand to rename the Gulf of Mexico. And now, Trump is **handpicking which outlets get access to the Oval Office and Air Force One,** ensuring only loyalists are allowed in. This is what authoritarianism looks like. **A free press exists to hold power accountable—not to be controlled by it.** Yet, Trump’s hypocrisy knows no bounds, and the corporate media is once again failing to sound the alarm. If Trump gets away with this now, what’s next? **Censorship of all critical media? Persecution of journalists who don’t fall in line?** This is about more than politics—this is about the survival of democracy itself. [**_We cannot sit back and watch Trump dismantle the foundations of our country. The hypocrisy is disgusting, as the MAGA world attacks "woke culture," they themselves are demolishing the first amendment by choosing which press members are allowed to be in the press conference room. Join the fight today to stop him before it’s too late._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wtj01-vpiepy-kyd76rh2/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wtj01-vpiepz-kyd76rh3/)
---

---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---

subject: Hello –

body:
I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio.

I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio.
I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter at the helm in battleground Ohio
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
Hello - this is Vivek Ramaswamy.

It's official:

**I just launched my campaign for Governor in my home state of Ohio. **

I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again. **[If that's all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign:](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews. "If that’s all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign:")**
---
| | [**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._WocKsIJ8xY9qVFvRZWRpg)
---
I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - _with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine_ \- at the helm in battleground Ohio. And if you agree, I'd be honored to have you aboard.

So here's my final pitch to you:

The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state."

On top of that, a bunch of anti-Trump "Republicans" are eyeing this seat too.

**Both of those options are completely unacceptable to me. **

So now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win. **[With all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._-Q "With all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?") **
---
| | [**BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._pOCPdEpQmSh5MM36wg)
---
Thanks for everything you've done to save our country in the last election.

God bless you and God bless America,
Vivek Ramaswamy
---

name: Josh Weil
subject: Fascism thrives on ignorance
body:
Sadly, killing the American dream for tens of millions of young folks is by design. Fascism thrives off of dreams deferred, it thrives off of ignorance, poverty, and destitution.n
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zXB73vFCP2z6l__KxAUhN-77it4jicDsmf4e0rq1WUb_y1W9LDa6evRA3MPV1DX-syJBOoPDMOAr1uC7BDfhllglpdz431rmkEoPssZoh03juPNhN0xTkwGIcEAxOEFdKbAmylJv5NrrpfK2D5Kq5JGbFMnLJ5rQ-hJFDtqZMKftf4D9GxWaMBmLExzfbREjADHzr7uobUoUHMPv2feeT6ErILmK15PyX9439Sm7L8=&c=pRiiq1RxmDV9P5dUN5p_H0bkPD0YHZqjbHsDBkWOQfZYh-HtYUYtlw==&ch=qAcNRnxqCL7Up-0VvwcuK1c7ixUpKBpfJWAWhqiiKU_t7BOYM2Pf8g==)
---
| | | | Team,
Staying true to his Project 2025 promises, Donald Trump laid off half of the entire Department of Education. This followed news on Tuesday that Elon Musk's DOGE would cancel 1 billion in funding for free lunches.
As a teacher at a Title I school, a school where a large percentage of my students come from depths of poverty that is hard to imagine, this is soul-crushing news.
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zXB73vFCP2z6l__KxAUhN-77it4jicDsmf4e0rq1WUb_y1W9LDa6evRA3MPV1DX2aKt4gV9oMBszOoG_7A50lNRQTVLk5YrMhnKFcfi8B4KdpQFQ6dy-aU7Cwe4OgILkaWyD7sAQqfPJrZTzz5613iYprDemZhCHMB0XinApxC4QTIh6k8zIw9WhD8T8VeLK2nIPIaxr0Boux3BQ7HLDrB6d_vHBLNy4nvpO-m7C-4=&c=pRiiq1RxmDV9P5dUN5p_H0bkPD0YHZqjbHsDBkWOQfZYh-HtYUYtlw==&ch=qAcNRnxqCL7Up-0VvwcuK1c7ixUpKBpfJWAWhqiiKU_t7BOYM2Pf8g==)
---
| | | | The allure of the American dream is that no matter your background every man, woman, and child has an opportunity to exponentially better their lot in life through hard work and dedication.
By attacking our schools, the place where children from even the most destitute backgrounds have the opportunity to find their gifts and catch up with their peers, the Trump administration is depriving a generation of American students a chance at realizing this dream.
Sadly, the killing of this dream for tens of millions of young Americans is by design. Fascism thrives off of dreams deferred, it thrives off of ignorance, poverty, and destitution.
By taking a chainsaw to the Department of Education and killing these dreams, Trump hopes to prime future generations for the coming darker phases of resurgent American fascism.
With Project 2025 in full swing, we have a fleeting opportunity to stop its passage through Congress right now. If Democrats sweep the three upcoming 2025 special elections, we gain a one vote majority in the House and paralyze the MAGA movement's ability to pass legislation.
---
| | | | [This narrow path to reclaiming House control is contingent on me winning the race for Florida's 6th Congressional District. Can I count on you to chip in $50, $25, or even $5 to ensure we have the resources we need to compete and win in this tough district?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013zXB73vFCP2z6l__KxAUhN-77it4jicDsmf4e0rq1WUb_y1W9LDa6evRA3MPV1DXAFP-z9zsHuoSHrjJzgSm6uU8GndvbFqegs9WHPFQ1iDQU4-ffh6zoUq_NG9TEC0NJDeneAmB3-mGSO4Z9v8emWj0QtdiosT7IhtMIQPta6tcbh5DYHIQuqNEY9AzfOCgDQ1iwTp5fVOCM66Wn7QVhsbGCXmvMuDmM6saQN_52c50tyZO1BRjfg==&c=pRiiq1RxmDV9P5dUN5p_H0bkPD0YHZqjbHsDBkWOQfZYh-HtYUYtlw==&ch=qAcNRnxqCL7Up-0VvwcuK1c7ixUpKBpfJWAWhqiiKU_t7BOYM2Pf8g==)

## Border Patrol Closing Tent Camps
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) is [shutting down tent facilities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb8GOqNhMGAKF69Jl9duiYw9JqM1OLK9cfL3q6Tf8kpX50jn67peDQc-9__mIF2ePq4IOAoYRK9WZzi8Vtk6vYFb-pZ0P0vEZZzU1N70Yg0tm5tnMEoOxpOc7YIbeG_VJAffsn7DYOhVD-M8YLeRd8oo6R3BsiE0EshxiakrNyr0NNmHV3xQ6mw82qBvpdxzM_xr8NLgpdbanVRzJfp-Hxq8_GRx0JNtFFtMjpLg4-A9mbOIe4qWcuZzF5bOQikLG-JnI0g5jrJN2t0rh8B5mhsJ-2E4fMzlzxQPjb8BAAD__4bPY38) for processing illegal immigrants along the southern border—including three in Texas—in response to a sharp drop in illegal border crossings. CBP officials said the temporary "soft-sided facilities” in Donna, Eagle Pass, and Laredo would be dismantled, along with tent facilities in Yuma and Tucson. Processing facilities in El Paso and San Diego [will remain open](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_OrCAQR58GOwyMrH8KitvY7W1vaVBGnQTBALvs3qf_ov3X_ubk5GT-PaenIUd--2sO1PmzhgkEPLhouOwna8h9J1VZPQs7yAq17BTA8Gj7ttp1K5QVRkm7NihFMw9dO6sVhFyENa01FelLJhrZS_HoGqhnXG1verVaFMMMgimBlnKIdd4x48ek1X3DG2O9hKNyes_5TKz5w2BkMJZSao8leZMpeB_KRTEYX4lfM4ORjoO2eJ8ZjHOIFiNfLqHZkMG4zCdP-ytn8hu3oXh-8z7zM4YFU7r2jD7z1SzkKBMmTp7fadxE-h-8YTBWUduzkHOU2o4psR2G3N2cf33iW8NPAAAA___vMXl6). On Wednesday, the agency reported that just over 8,300 illegal immigrants had been arrested between official ports of entry in February, compared to [140,641 during the same month last year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7uOgzAQAL_GdCB7jXkULq6hy7VXojVegiWDI3sDyd-fcv1V081ofm7zDUMMx_0bd7L8WtMMEkwtda2G2WOI77mtvHXSj6oiq_oWYDTd0FWbXRwpteLgOjMarXpAraU0HSGtnemxCvYjk1oNSppeQ-No9QMO7epJjg6kaCX5wCk3vBHTC8sa3-mk3Cxpr6LdmB9F6C8Bk4Dpuq5mcY_mnk4B00FXySntAqbCyOXD9OTtosJ1xMPXLmVPuaZjSc-DKZcqW_-4QoyhdL1o5X3HEP9S_O_7aeE3AAD__yHjXf4). Since opening in 2021, the Donna facility has processed over 611,000 illegal immigrants, making it one of the largest processing centers on the southern border. CBP will [save between $5 million and $30 million per month](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD_PqyAYxT8NbpgHRKUDg4vDze1d72hAHpQEoQFa22__xu7vdIbzJye___flrn3wcfunD1T17dLCgfcUOsrkYrUPn0U0VhmwN9agYqPg_NYPcmh21clVOlhhZWhGJsCCGA1IMZpBIpeu8eoag45JBv3Y8dags1JL4SzCzXAgAtD6mnJbd6z41sWFT3phbtd0NEHttT4K6SbCZ8Ln8zzbo8TLI3zGSJ-F8DnieUmqO2bCZ4e20DWk4uNGD79lHSutGCtd9fEoVIcUN1rS88pHalK2357OdJrY9Mf87Zus7OP0IfgyjETAdmgfvo_qr4heiv8EAAD__wCFag0) for each tent facility closure, and agents who previously operated them will return to patrolling the border.
## Texas Teams Compete in March Madness
The NCAA March Madness basketball tournament will include five men’s and four women’s teams from Texas. On the men’s side, Big 12 champion and Midwest region No. 1 seed Houston (30-4) faces off against No. 16 Southern Illinois University Edwardsville (22-11) [Thursday afternoon in Wichita](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOwyAQBNCvwZ0tvDYYFxTXuMu1V1pLdomRcIiAxMnfnxJde_3TjGZ-TusJQwzXyzfubOvTpxUkqFYObW9WwhBf69iQdZLmvmHbTyPArLTRzWbNNKjJsSPwTiFIPI-gZ4_Uk_KzxibYd5gcetNLNQ3QOfZk0IyeWM4OpBglU6gpd3Xjyk8sPr7Sg3N3TnsT7VbrrYjhS8AiYDmOo_PpCXpL91LT9Y0ELOWWci0Clh3zeWt3pCuX0n52_Mm2hHvLdGCm8ggxcpMt3Y4QYyh6EqO87Bjip7T--8LDwm8AAAD__0oCYaU). South region No. 4 seed Texas A&M (22-10) will face No. 13 Yale (22-7) [Thursday evening in Denver](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAUheGnwRsWXIjBA0MXtnTtaF3CJUHFJrJJnLx95eydj_Qd6f85T2fMJS_Xb5zJtVeqEwg4caG4tFPEXN6T7qILIo6yIyeNBhhPgx26m9NKxhgUojEhYLDajigpKJkgCiOpy-7AhJJWipNR0AdK0aLVKZIYAwimBcXc6tq3GzV64ZbKuz5p7S917oq7tXbfmPpi4Bn4fd_739Bex8jAHzYDLxQDLwcG_gNwnHnCC_E3FuKpPla-EUW-XBB5q491wZmWxsB3q4v3PZeSt8EwLa4z5vI5bv-WeDr4CwAA__-Ecl_k), while East region No. 9 seed Baylor (19-14) plays No. 8 Mississippi State (21-12) [Friday in Raleigh](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAQhX8N7ibCA3HsguIad7n2SmswQ4KEjQUkF__7FVtst9J0871PT-_ffblTiGF__KWNTf34tKDEK0gF_bg4CvFcdOeMlW7qOzb9TSNO12EcuqdZNY5s0bNSq5287L3S0usByXqP1nXBNJlU_djL603hxbJ3I43aO5aTRSm0ZBdqypf65MofKj6e6c35sqati-ZZ61GE-iNwFjhbOmPKkXKg2gCBc_MLnKUSOPfDDwM7bexgTzBBYXYQdthXIqjpldtvr_A_xAhHpBO2UEq74whQKlVueE6v3UHyMGiBc5eNO1oilOEmtHxsFOJ3yfrram-DXwEAAP__UhRwWQ). The University of Texas (19-15) plays Xavier (21-11) [in Dayton tomorrow evening](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_O4yAQxJ8Gd1iw4H8FxTXucu2VFjZre3UYIiB28vafnP5rVjvS6Dej-feYHpY8he2vPdCU9xonENBwobjsJ2fJfyZdOTMLN8gKjew0wNC0fVvtBte5AbGAksPipFqcHKywcys63apODBWZGyaU7KVoOgX1jKvrba9Xh2KYQTAt0FGJqS47FnzbvPpPPDHVSzwqb_ZSnpmpPwxGBuN1XfX8SqHEZMOGwRaK4XYyGO8gBqNiMMr21lr1nYb7_XK5j2HbYwqZv-1JmPjxyv-xIKbMo3OZb_ZAXug-6PGkTDFUybjnRd5TbjumxXZY8t9u5dexTgM_AQAA__-BEmyx) for a shot at the No. 11 seed in the Midwest region. The Stephen F. Austin Ladyjacks (29-5) won the Southland Conference title to earn a No. 14 seed and will face No. 3 Notre Dame (26-5) [Friday in South Bend](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO5CAQRL8GZ1jQeGwcEFzibC-90GrcjY0Ow8hw69m_P83mm5ZKVU_vz8f6gTHFvP_Gk117hbKCgodURmq7Esb0tQ4dOa9o1h07PQ0A82O0Y3c4IDsTeaPDCN5QAPLWqBG2ERhxtl107zFltNXqMRnoPQeyaIdArGYPSgyKKbZy9e3gxi-sIX2VT776rZxdckdrzyrMLwGLgOW-776Wf-1ImKkv1y5gyXxXAcv7R8BiBCx6elfLyblKj_UvN48pyRpQbgnjWWUuUg-yMpMMuPF3YGQu7WJJeLKMWV68x5Kl6bE-X93l6HnHlGIdJzGo_cSYvhHbj84-HfwPAAD___nkbtM).
## Woman Gets Engaged to Man Who Saved Her Life
Lubbock Christian University senior Brooklyn Boyer recently got engaged to the [man who saved her life](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uhDAQBOCnMZ2R_wBTuEhDd2lTosW7BisGn8CBu7ePSJ9upJE-jebrMT4gprjNn7CSK6-QRyVUw4Xm0o4IMb1HU6GbBPayIic7o1TftLatFtcFkrbvfINBGgDQbed7g3oyJohJ2iq6GxNaWimaTqt6ooAWrAlIop-UYEYQxpL3uixU6AVHSO980l77vFbJLaU8D6Y_mBqYGq7rqr_9hHfJ1HDbTA1CMzXIOyX_ww_aYt45bTPMhHyFjV9L5gechHyhnacYiD9zThy8j0hbYWqodofPK6YUj7ZjRswrxPS3ofx7yunUbwAAAP__hgJjdg) during a pool accident nearly five years ago. Brooklyn had been dating Alan Mann for about a week when she hit her head on the bottom of a pool in 2020. Alan, who had [recently completed lifeguard training](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwjAQQL_G2YjOl3PiDB7aIRtdGaNLfAYLg1FsEfj7iu7dn97TOx3nI8cU7-cfvomrr5BnBDQH6A7azp5jes_UeLeAH3UjTg-EOJre9s3Fidej7lYgswZamVnLYgx5tixk7dBE95FBp60GM3TYLhK8ZUvBC4wLgiIQH2ve2nqRKi8uIb3zU7Z2zbcmuUutj6K6L4WTwmnf9zbwKkvO1w-gcPrecr6m972cOF0VTo9calE49dSBsWQtaRi1bjbnH3tMKZZ-UATnG8f016j_Tj8d_gYAAP__LXVYlw), provided immediate assistance until paramedics arrived. The accident left Brooklyn paralyzed, but Alan never left her side during months of rehabilitation. She has [relearned how to drive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O5CAQhJ8GZ1jQ-I-A4BJne-mFFtDNuDXYjGxmvPv2p5l8k0qqVPr0_ftavjxn3m9__UaufqeygIJeKiP1tKDn_LN0Dbqg0OqGnB47ANsP09Csbkw49WA0WBuN7uLgU4jGem3VqPRgG3bvM2X0pFU_GmgDJZz81CUkZQMo0SlCruVo60qVvv2Z8k950dHGsjXZrbU-TmH-CJgFzNd1tfcY8F0KmEGBETCr_h2dgDk_QyjxLs_6RNqrDD7eZaCVd5TXSpSlT5UO-SglSx8jf1bpYNrxlOm54-H55P0mt4KcmFC-_C5gbg6Hj4tz5nMYRadum-f8Qay_Ons5-B8AAP__Lx5vCA) and can even dance in her motorized wheelchair. Brooklyn describes Alan as a “blessing straight from God.” For his part, Alan said witnessing Brooklyn’s recovery has been “nothing less of amazing. I’m very blessed that I get to have one of the front-row seats to that experience.”

clean_body: U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) is shutting down tent facilities for processing illegal immigrants along the southern border—including three in Texas—in response to a sharp drop in illegal border crossings. | | | | | | Tuesday, March 18, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1836, the Republic of Texas President David G. Burnet and his cabinet arrived at a plantation called in Grimes County, where they stayed three days as they fled from the advancing Mexican army—making the plantation the temporary capital of the Republic of Texas. Are you a real estate professional looking to expand your reach** and connect with thousands of potential buyers and sellers in Texas? The Texas Flyover , a daily news email with over 300,000 subscribers, is partnering with top real estate firms to promote properties, highlight trusted professionals, and generate powerful leads. We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity in the entertainment industry you won't want to miss. Abilene ⛅ 88/57° | Amarillo ⛅ 79/48° | Austin ⛅ 85/56° | Brownsville 🌤️ 83/66° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 81/65° | DFW 🌥️ 81/56° | El Paso ⛅ 77/52° | Houston 🌥️ 77/60° | Laredo ☀️ 93/61° | Lubbock 🌥️ 83/55° | Midland ⛅ 87/57° | San Antonio ⛅ 88/56° | Tyler ☁️ 80/56° | Waco 🌥️ 82/55° | Border Patrol Closing Tent Camps U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) is for processing illegal immigrants along the southern border—including three in Texas—in response to a sharp drop in illegal border crossings. CBP officials said the temporary "soft-sided facilities” in Donna, Eagle Pass, and Laredo would be dismantled, along with tent facilities in Yuma and Tucson. Processing facilities in El Paso and San Diego . On Wednesday, the agency reported that just over 8,300 illegal immigrants had been arrested between official ports of entry in February, compared to . Since opening in 2021, the Donna facility has processed over 611,000 illegal immigrants, making it one of the largest processing centers on the southern border. CBP will for each tent facility closure, and agents who previously operated them will return to patrolling the border. Texas Teams Compete in March Madness The NCAA March Madness basketball tournament will include five men’s and four women’s teams from Texas. On the men’s side, Big 12 champion and Midwest region No. 1 seed Houston (30-4) faces off against No. 16 Southern Illinois University Edwardsville (22-11) . Later Thursday , West region No. 3 seed Texas Tech (25-8) plays No. 14 UNC Wilmington (27-7). South region No. 4 seed Texas A&M (22-10) will face No. 13 Yale (22-7) , while East region No. 9 seed Baylor (19-14) plays No. 8 Mississippi State (21-12) . The University of Texas (19-15) plays Xavier (21-11) for a shot at the No. 11 seed in the Midwest region. In the women’s tournament, SEC runner-up Texas (31-3) earned a No. 1 seed and will host either William and Mary (15-18) or High Point (21-11) . Big 12 champion and No. 2 seed TCU (31-3) faces Northeast Conference champion No. 15 Farleigh Dickinson (29-3) , while Big 12 runner-up and No. 4 seed Baylor (27-7) will host Western Athletic Conference champion No. 13 Grand Canyon (32-2) . The Stephen F. Austin Ladyjacks (29-5) won the Southland Conference title to earn a No. 14 seed and will face No. 3 Notre Dame (26-5) . Woman Gets Engaged to Man Who Saved Her Life Lubbock Christian University senior Brooklyn Boyer recently got engaged to the during a pool accident nearly five years ago. Brooklyn had been dating Alan Mann for about a week when she hit her head on the bottom of a pool in 2020. Alan, who had , provided immediate assistance until paramedics arrived. The accident left Brooklyn paralyzed, but Alan never left her side during months of rehabilitation. She has and can even dance in her motorized wheelchair. Brooklyn describes Alan as a “blessing straight from God.” For his part, Alan said witnessing Brooklyn’s recovery has been “nothing less of amazing.
