Peter,
Donald Trump broke the law when he began dismantling the Department of Education, firing approximately half of its workforce.
If Trump succeeds in incapacitating the Department of Education through mass layoffs, the agency will be unable to carry out essential functions—jeopardizing the education of tens of millions of students.
**Here’s the bottom line, Peter: Trump doesn’t have the authority to effectively shut down an entire federal department that’s authorized by Congress. His actions are unconstitutional and illegal. **
There will be devastating consequences if we don’t act now. Keith Ellison and 20 other Attorneys General filed a lawsuit to stop Trump’s reckless and unlawful power grab, and they need to know that this grassroots team is on their side.
Our records indicate that you haven’t activated your 2025 support yet. That means you’re eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program and can receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota when you make a contribution of $75 (or $150 for couples).

Peter,
Governor Walz is hitting the road—from Des Moines to Omaha, and today, to Eau Claire, WI—showing up where Republican members of Congress won't face their constituents.
**At every stop, we’ve heard the same thing: People are fed up.** Elon Musk and Donald Trump are coming for your Social Security. Trump’s tariffs are driving up prices for families and small businesses. And while you’re paying more, Republicans are plotting another massive tax cut for billionaires.
**Democrats should have one goal right now: Tell people the truth about Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s agenda, and fight like hell to stop it.**
[**Peter, will you chip in to help Governor Walz continue taking the fight to Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans up and down the ballot?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067343/534169926/-2075026428?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTg2OThlYS0wYzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_7iK-I5WH3diYhgFCdLL59UejcqsS2UqhsBb5JK4RmU=)

Together, Trump and Musk are = critical services for seniors and vulnerable Americans, while pushing for huge tax cuts for the ultra-rich. 3\. Now, Republicans just = backed Trump and Co-President Elon Musk’s budget plan that gives tax breaks to billionaires while = – which would rip away health care from millions of Americans. = = I need you to make a choice in this critical moment: Either we let billionaire Republicans who bought their way into the White House strip away lifesaving health care and hard-earned benefits from MILLIONS of Americans while rewarding themselves with massive tax breaks... ...OR, we can build an unstoppable team of grassroots Democrats who are ready to do what it takes to stop Donald Trump’s Project 2025 plot in its tracks, hold him accountable for his attacks on our Constitution, and restore our Democracy. = = = = = = | = = = = = Thank you, NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067568/534170767/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_reac_2025.03.18_b1_es_reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M2MTU5Zi0wZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZOo8_TGp-AsmDAIwRRWAXQBgMJAxnjsvIDB6kXzbms=) Hi Peter, it’s Emilia. **[Today, I’m asking for just $5 to support my fight for Northeast Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067570/534170768/985656371?amount=5&refcode=em_reac_2025.03.18_b1_es_reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M2MTU5Zi0wZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZOo8_TGp-AsmDAIwRRWAXQBgMJAxnjsvIDB6kXzbms=)** I know what you’re thinking: The GOP is backed by **billionaires and dark money groups** , so $5 does not seem like nearly enough to fight back. _But here’s the secret about grassroots teams like ours:_ Small donations, from hardworking people who believe in our mission to fight for Northeast Ohio, all add up. And together, **we form a team stronger than any billionaire.** **[That’s why I’m asking for $5 today, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067573/534170769/985656371?amount=5&refcode=em_reac_2025.03.18_b1_es_reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M2MTU5Zi0wZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZOo8_TGp-AsmDAIwRRWAXQBgMJAxnjsvIDB6kXzbms=) We are going to need a grassroots base that can withstand attacks from the radical GOP, and I’m counting on you to help me build it.** **[So please, will you chip in $5 today to my grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067574/534170770/985656371?amount=5&refcode=em_reac_2025.03.18_b1_es_reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M2MTU5Zi0wZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZOo8_TGp-AsmDAIwRRWAXQBgMJAxnjsvIDB6kXzbms=)** | [**$5 >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067576/534170772/985656371?amount=5&refcode=em_reac_2025.03.18_b1_es_reac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2M2MTU5Zi0wZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZOo8_TGp-AsmDAIwRRWAXQBgMJAxnjsvIDB6kXzbms=)

_Emilia_

name: California Democratic Party
subject: Volunteer at the CADEM Convention in Anaheim!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats – We Need You!
Join us in sunny Orange County for the California Democratic Party State Convention in Anaheim! We're looking for dedicated volunteers to help make this event a success and create an unforgettable experience. With your support, we’ll elect new Party Officers, Regional Directors, and begin the hard work of organizing for 2026.
📅 Dates: May 29 – June 1, 2025
📍 Location: Anaheim Convention Center
We need 300+ volunteers to assist with a variety of tasks, including:
* Registration & credentialing of attendees
* Greeting and directing guests
* General event support – and more!
As a volunteer, you’ll:
* Work alongside passionate Democrats from across California.
* Gain a behind-the-scenes look at the organizing efforts driving our party
* Receive an Observer Pass to attend events for credentialed delegates after your shift!
Ready to be part of our convention? Sign up now to secure your spot:
VOLUNTEER REGISTRATION FORM [https://fs3.formsite.com/CADEM2011/mi4vweivjq/index]
📌 Important Notes:
* A mandatory training will be provided after you sign up.
* Volunteers are responsible for their own hotel and parking accommodations.
https://fs3.formsite.com/CADEM2011/mi4vweivjq/index [https://fs3.formsite.com/CADEM2011/mi4vweivjq/index]
For questions, email us at Volunteer2025@cadem.org.
Thank you for your support – see you in Anaheim!
California Democratic Party

1830 9th St
Sacramento, CA 95811

We're looking for dedicated volunteers to help make this event a success and create an unforgettable experience. With your support, we’ll elect new Party Officers, Regional Directors, and begin the hard work of organizing for 2026. 📅 Dates: May 29 – June 1, 2025 📍 Location: Anaheim Convention Center We need 300+ volunteers to assist with a variety of tasks, including: Registration & credentialing of attendees Greeting and directing guests General event support – and more! As a volunteer, you’ll: Work alongside passionate Democrats from across California. Gain a behind-the-scenes look at the organizing efforts driving our party Receive an Observer Pass to attend events for credentialed delegates after your shift! Ready to be part of our convention? Sign up now to secure your spot: VOLUNTEER REGISTRATION FORM [] 📌 Important Notes: A mandatory training will be provided after you sign up. Volunteers are responsible for their own hotel and parking accommodations. [] For questions, email us at Volunteer2025@cadem.org. Thank you for your support – see you in Anaheim! California Democratic Party Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

At CPAC last month, Moms for America sat down with Dr. Sebastian Gorka, Senior Director for Counterterrorism, and Kari Lake,
Special Advisor to the US Agency for Global Media. They both shared exciting updates, details of their new positions, and
perspective on working with the Trump Administration. Don't miss this one! Like, share and subscribe.

Elon Musk and DOGE Have the Masterplan for a Great American Reboot

Moms for America appreciates DOGE, but in recent weeks, their dramatic government cost-cutting, targeting waste and fraud, has
caused some to cheer and others to attack Elon Musk for his efforts. Government workers are losing jobs, and agencies are on the
chopping block with savings of over $100 billion in our taxpayer money so far.

This week, we are considering the bold DOGE team and some of what they've uncovered. It's like the US government is getting a
long-overdue reboot. We believe it will help Make America Great Again!

A HEALTHIER 2025 WITH MOMS FOR AMERICA AND CARDIO MIRACLE

At Moms for America, we prioritize sharing resources that promote health and wellness among our community. One such product is
Cardio Miracle. We encourage you to explore Cardio Miracle and determine if it's the right fit for your health journey. Many moms,
including our founder Kimberly Fletcher, have incorporated it into their daily routines and appreciate its commitment to quality

clean_body: Dr. Sebastian Gorka and Kari Lake, senior officials in the Trump Administration, appeared on the Moms for America Podcast with exciting updates. And we're taking a look at DOGE. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] March 18, 2025 • Newsletter Dr. Gorka and Kari Lake Share Updates Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] At CPAC last month, Moms for America sat down with Dr. Sebastian Gorka, Senior Director for Counterterrorism, and Kari Lake, Special Advisor to the US Agency for Global Media. They both shared exciting updates, details of their new positions, and perspective on working with the Trump Administration. Don't miss this one! Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] Elon Musk and DOGE Have the Masterplan for a Great American Reboot Moms for America appreciates DOGE, but in recent weeks, their dramatic government cost-cutting, targeting waste and fraud, has caused some to cheer and others to attack Elon Musk for his efforts. Government workers are losing jobs, and agencies are on the chopping block with savings of over $100 billion in our taxpayer money so far. This week, we are considering the bold DOGE team and some of what they've uncovered. It's like the US government is getting a long-overdue reboot. We believe it will help Make America Great Again! Read the Blog [] A HEALTHIER 2025 WITH MOMS FOR AMERICA AND CARDIO MIRACLE At Moms for America, we prioritize sharing resources that promote health and wellness among our community. One such product is Cardio Miracle. We encourage you to explore Cardio Miracle and determine if it's the right fit for your health journey. Many moms, including our founder Kimberly Fletcher, have incorporated it into their daily routines and appreciate its commitment to quality and transparency. Watch the video below, and for more information and to see if Cardio Miracle aligns with your wellness goals, visit their website: Cardio Miracle []. [] [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. name: Chair Karen Tallian
subject: Republicans are running scared of our new team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This is Karen Tallian. I’m a former Indiana State Senator, and a proud Democrat. I’m ready to bring our party together and go to every corner of our state to renew Democratic leadership in Indiana in the coming weeks and months. **[If you’re ready to change our state, join us by making a contribution to our rebuilding fund today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067978/534172223/1764064610?refcode=250318banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA3ZWEwZi0wZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6OBq1pWraitOBQWQOorHaZ0nRenPSn85oMsFpf7GBg=)** Mere moments after the State Central Committee elected me as our next State Party Chair, Jim Banks took to Twitter/X to bash me and our Party. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067979/534172232/1764064610?refcode=250318banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA3ZWEwZi0wZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6OBq1pWraitOBQWQOorHaZ0nRenPSn85oMsFpf7GBg=) I knew Jim when he served just over one term in the State Senate. He was up to nothing good then, and he's up to nothing good now. Republicans like Jim Banks have no strategy for Hoosiers except to fearmonger and lie about their opponents. The bottom line is: Hoosiers deserve better than Jim Banks’ lack of leadership. **To be successful in 2026 and beyond, we need all hands on deck. We’re launching a People’s Town Hall tour in the coming weeks, and engaging Hoosiers across the state. We're excited to share those details soon.** **[Would you rush a contribution to IDP today to fund our rebuilding efforts and to hold events in every congressional district in our state this spring?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104067981/534172236/1764064610?refcode=250318banks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTA3ZWEwZi0wZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6OBq1pWraitOBQWQOorHaZ0nRenPSn85oMsFpf7GBg=)** Thanks,
KT

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Do you have any thoughts on this?
body:
Fellow American, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country. |
---
I go to work every day to fight for _**YOU**_ , Fellow American!

My constituents and supporters are the first and last thing on my mind daily. Today, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country.

**I created the 2025 Spring Survey to do just that. Here is a quick preview of the questions:**

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=d26773e42f6f4434997140bbd69f0fda&_e=Z1jNiSJVkbuHpod5OwN3Ltyap7bLGfwSv0DXujJ75pbXkTvwjXGonapxrNFgJnJ8BXb_8Y11gq2TIYXVnrx8deMUC-OE0TXGfm6lc-U4TIJAkv-L-mcnwCexJNvkBpRxrpp6EzuR2sVBuuFIYhjf-OfxVgBS5hn1BomsryA84M_6jl_ou1aaqOqtnpyER0bIHUJC_opj0kr77gcd7ia92172rQFyqBhnswtL-p9DmQEO-kpEzCaY9nSyA1JkjAlWu-WrLqvKv_1Gc1xE0HvFq4_2VFPV64WSg9KFCLVpV0kd3524X1Ti-1KDNn3t5Odk9Qa8YwilxKJaTu3npQVgFdyGOlQHSUnciqK44HqB74A0lQSIMbaBGD0PxSHBzxCk-tFcHIEKeYQBNk3L5SYHGl2dPGHZfiCAKIAKUQcaWjg%3D)
**_What issues do you think the U.S. Senate should be prioritizing right now?_**
**_How important is it to you that Donald Trump has a Senate he can count on for his entire term as President?_**
**_How would you evaluate the job performance of our Republican majority in the U.S. Senate so far?_**

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m running to be California’s next Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I didn’t make this decision lightly.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83a5bd0d-27f0-44d1-bd9c-0be59edcf80a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Katie Porter here with exciting news: I’m running to be California’s next governor. [More below, but first, can you split a donation of $10 between Blue Amp Action and our campaign to become a founding donor today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b868265-e756-4f4b-be5e-dccbb32ad1c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0992a3ec-fb31-4487-8933-f09937071e46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, I didn’t make this decision lightly. But with an emboldened Trump in the White House and MAGA loyalists doing his bidding day in and day out, California — and our country — need a leader who is ready to go toe to toe with extremists. I first ran for office in 2018. I was a single mom of three little kids, running in a district that Republicans had held for decades. But I ran because I couldn’t sit on the sidelines as I watched Trump try and destroy our country. As a consumer protection attorney, I wanted to use my experience to hold him and his administration accountable. With the support of folks like you, I made it to Congress, where I was able to claw back billions from drug companies who ripped us off and pass laws cracking down on health care companies that wrongfully denied care. I feel the same call to serve today as I did during Trump’s first administration. California is experiencing real challenges. We must become resilient to natural disasters and tackle climate change. We must address the high cost of housing, health care, and groceries. And we must continue to protect our LGBTQ+ community members and safeguard abortion access. We don’t have to choose between defending our values and tackling our challenges. We can work with businesses to create good paying jobs in California and hold corporations accountable. We can keep communities safe and uphold civil rights. I’m never one for BS or sugar coating, so I’ll be honest — this race won’t be a walk in the park! There are already multiple candidates in the race to succeed Governor Newsom, who is term-limited, and the primary election is just over a year away. Today is critical for our campaign. Pundits will be looking at how much we raise in the first week of our campaign, and that number sends a strong signal to super PACs who might consider spending against us if we look weak. I’m asking you to join our movement to stand up to Trump and his cronies. I’m proud to have Blue Amp Action's support in this campaign, are you with us? **[Please make a split donation of $10 today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T966b08c1-1f63-4dcc-8363-9723a33e4153/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** It will go a long way in our people-powered campaign.
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ac43854-0d6c-4f1e-9474-b8fff7a9ff55/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE OTHER AMOUNT →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87ea9fd4-9cfd-4c88-a2d8-48b9b75eccb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I hope to earn your support, Katie [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2913e8c5-8d87-46b5-bdad-828f1facb224/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250318_katieporterlaunch_b2_f1_s1_c1_92op_n-_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e0a7afe-bcdb-45af-8a21-e60c9aa0598c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Medicaid Action Team | Care in Action
subject: Save Medicaid with a phone call today
body:
It’s Medicaid Day of Action. Can you make a phone call?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068448/534173630/664783965?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
Peter, as members of Congress return home to their districts, **care workers are mobilizing across the country to save Medicaid.**
Our lawmakers’ job is to ensure that the 72 million people who rely on Medicaid for healthcare don’t lose that lifeline. Our elected leaders answer to us, not the billionaires trying to pad their pockets with tax cuts funded by gutting Medicaid. **With collective action, we can stop the Administration and Congress’s push to cut Medicaid. **
Care workers are putting pressure on members of Congress at district offices, town halls, and press conferences, because **this may be the last time our lawmakers are with their constituents before key votes on Medicaid.** It’s critical that you make your voice heard in support of this on-the-ground mobilization.
**[**_Today is our Medicaid Day of Action and we need everyone doing their part. Can you call your members of Congress and demand that they protect Medicaid from funding cuts?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068451/534173632/-1604173812?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[Call 1-855-637-5982 to be connected](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068453/534173635/-1604173812?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Kingia, a home care worker in Georgia, is just one of our members on the frontlines of this fight.
**For Kingia, protecting Medicaid is personal.** It ensures that her 60-year-old sister, who has schizophrenia and bipolar disorder, can receive care at home, her grandchildren get the support they need, and that she, as a care worker, can continue providing for her family without falling through the cracks.
Today, Kingia and thousands of other care workers are joining with allies for a **Medicaid Day of Action to demand that Congress protect the benefits so many people rely on. **
**Your lawmakers need to hear directly from you today** on why protecting Medicaid is so important. Each constituent call can make a major impact on the future of healthcare and care work in America — and time is running out.
**_**[**_Take a few minutes and call your members of Congress and urge them to protect Medicaid before it’s too late._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068455/534173637/-1604173812?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**_**
**_**********__[Call 1-855-637-5982 to be connected](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068457/534173639/-1604173812?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
We thank you for joining in a day of action fighting for healthcare and the livelihoods of so many people. Together, we can ensure our lawmakers listen to us.
Thanks for all that you do,
Care in Action

This email was sent by [Care in Action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068462/534173646/664783965?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787). Care In Action was founded by progressive women of color. Care in Action is the policy and advocacy home for women who care, working on behalf of more than 2 million domestic workers and care workers in America. Care in Action is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization. Donations to Care in Action are not tax-deductible.
Learn more about our [privacy policy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104068463/534173647/1824245643?ms=031825_medicaidcall&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdmOTYzYS0wZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qaQfsqE6tx4SfO76F7VmZugDYfE3s6WuAb0SvulByJA=&emci=6db53e45-6a03-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=117f963a-0f04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787).

name: Devan
subject: Will you join my new focus group? ->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there,

I'm Devan, and I'm excited to be the DSCC's new executive director -- working to take back the Senate majority.

Like starting any new job, the most important thing I can do _right now_ to lead this team to victory is to **listen.** And that means the most important thing YOU can do to help us is to join my new focus group of committed grassroots Democrats and share your insights from on the ground.

**[So please, will you join my focus group by taking this survey to help us lay the foundation and build a winning strategy? I'm ready to hear what Democrats think, so please get started as soon as you're able:](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)**

| | [Join my focus group](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)
---

I'm already hearing from the top experts in the Democratic Party, but I truly believe that's not enough -- and they'd tell you the same thing. I need to hear directly from grassroots supporters about what will define this election. **That's why I need _your_ help to shape the critical road ahead.**

I'm eagerly anticipating the first wave of responses to learn from your insights and gauge our party's motivation right out of the gate. I hope you won't wait any longer to respond.

**[Senator Gillibrand and I are ready to dig into your responses first thing tomorrow, so please, will you enter the focus group before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)**

| [Enter focus group](http://go.dscc.org/go/21034?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250318-Devan-NewEDFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)
---

I'm looking forward to working with you,

Devan
DSCC Executive Director

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=19799_9716520_cfwV_V&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=19799_9716520_cfwV_V&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19799%2E9716520%2EcfwV_V)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Ryan Friedrichs
subject: I’m Jocelyn’s husband — and her biggest fan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
To know Jocelyn is to know a fighter.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
Hi there, this is Ryan — Jocelyn’s husband and #1 supporter.
To know Jocelyn is to know a fighter. As a military spouse during deployment, as a working mom, as a defender of democracy, or as a Tigers fan in the bottom of the 9th, she never gives up, backs down, or blinks. And she won’t for Michigan families as Governor.
[**Now before asking for your support — which I will — let me tell you a little about me.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q12025.895N_2&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
| [DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
---
I was born and raised in Michigan and attended the University of Michigan — though I was raised by two Spartan parents, one born all the way up in Marquette.
I met Jocelyn in graduate school and we moved back to Detroit when she began her clerkship for Judge Damon Keith, who married us on Belle Isle, after we’d gotten engaged all the way up in Isle Royale National Park.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)_Jocelyn, and our son Aiden, share my love for the Detroit Tigers._
When I served our country as a combat veteran, Army paratrooper, Sergeant, and infantry Team Leader with the 173rd Airborne Brigade, she founded the Military Spouses of Michigan to provide support and services to families like ours.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
I was Jocelyn’s biggest cheerleader when she first ran for Secretary of State, just as she was mine when all the years I was overseas. Her unshakable belief in real opportunity and justice for everyone, no matter their zip code, or income level — and no matter the attack she endures — has always inspired me.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
Now, as she runs for Governor, focused on making Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home, our son, Aiden, and I (and our dog Loba) have her back.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
[**Ok, will you have her back too? Her next fundraising deadline is coming up. Will you pitch in for her fight for Governor? Your support means so much to our whole family.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/269?c0=jmb-em-q12025.KUgwrp&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/263?c0=jmb-em-q12025.faQQoW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q12025.M00eo_&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q12025.MaH6TA&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=157%2E181023%2EnD4iND)
---

clean_body: To know Jocelyn is to know a fighter. Hi there, this is Ryan — Jocelyn’s husband and #1 supporter. To know Jocelyn is to know a fighter. As a military spouse during deployment, as a working mom, as a defender of democracy, or as a Tigers fan in the bottom of the 9th, she never gives up, backs down, or blinks. And she won’t for Michigan families as Governor. | I was born and raised in Michigan and attended the University of Michigan — though I was raised by two Spartan parents, one born all the way up in Marquette. I met Jocelyn in graduate school and we moved back to Detroit when she began her clerkship for Judge Damon Keith, who married us on Belle Isle, after we’d gotten engaged all the way up in Isle Royale National Park. , and our son Aiden, share my love for the Detroit Tigers. When I served our country as a combat veteran, Army paratrooper, Sergeant, and infantry Team Leader with the 173rd Airborne Brigade, she founded the Military Spouses of Michigan to provide support and services to families like ours. I was Jocelyn’s biggest cheerleader when she first ran for Secretary of State, just as she was mine when all the years I was overseas. Her unshakable belief in real opportunity and justice for everyone, no matter their zip code, or income level — and no matter the attack she endures — has always inspired me. Now, as she runs for Governor, focused on making Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home, our son, Aiden, and I (and our dog Loba) have her back. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for supporting Jocelyn — we’re lucky to have you on the team. — Ryan

clean_body: | | | Peter, I want this to be crystal clear. In just the last year, the faceless group of unelected bureaucrats we refer to as the “Deep State” has mercilessly terrorized our nation by manufacturing a horrific witch hunt against President Trump and the MAGA movement, and leading a full-blown coup against Joe Biden to overthrow him as the Democrat nominee. Today, my solemn promise to you is this: And that mission begins IMMEDIATELY! That’s why I need to know that I have your support today.**** We’ve seen the power of the Deep State first-hand throughout the 2024 election. And after their hand-picked candidate suffered a crushing defeat, we can only anticipate even greater TREACHERY this year in their desperation! It’s clear we have our work cut out for us. The truth is, we’ll be doing all of this with one of the smallest House majorities in U.S. history for the first several months – But Conservatives proved that standing UNITED, we can conquer anything the Deep State throws at us and destroy their control over our great country. President Trump has been an inspiration in standing up to the Deep State, and right now, our GOP TRIFECTA is prepared to use whatever means necessary to dig out the corruption. If we strike and fall short, the Deep State will come for everything we’ve built. Please, Peter. I am confident that with your help we can return the power back into the hands of WE THE PEOPLE. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana |

In **Virginia** , Democrats passed a constitutional amendment to enshrine abortion rights into state law. But to get it on the ballot, we need to hold the House of Delegates in November. Leaders like state Sen. **Ghazala Hashmi** , candidate for lieutenant governor, are championing bills to protect providers and expand access to contraception.

In **Colorado** , state Sen. **Faith Winter** fought to protect doctors from out-of-state prosecution, ensuring that reproductive health care providers can continue their essential work without fear.

In **Nevada** , state Sen. **Nicole Cannizzaro** took action to protect access to IVF, standing up for families who rely on this critical reproductive care.

In Florida, which has a near-total abortion ban, pro-choice champions like state Sen. **Tracie Davis** and House Minority Leader **Fentrice Driskell** are leading efforts to restore access to essential health care.

Because of the movement we've built together, pro-choice champions are fighting back and pushing forward. But their work, and ours, is far from over.

clean_body: Peter, meet some state & local Democratic pro-choice women delivering for their constituents: | = Peter, Across the country, the Democratic pro-choice women we've helped recruit, support, and elect are delivering on their promises to protect reproductive freedoms and defend our rights — despite fierce opposition from extremist Republicans pushing Trump's disastrous MAGA agenda. = | = In Virginia , Democrats passed a constitutional amendment to enshrine abortion rights into state law. But to get it on the ballot, we need to hold the House of Delegates in November. Leaders like state Sen. Ghazala Hashmi , candidate for lieutenant governor, are championing bills to protect providers and expand access to contraception. In Colorado , state Sen. Faith Winter fought to protect doctors from out-of-state prosecution, ensuring that reproductive health care providers can continue their essential work without fear. In Nevada , state Sen. Nicole Cannizzaro took action to protect access to IVF, standing up for families who rely on this critical reproductive care. In Florida, which has a near-total abortion ban, pro-choice champions like state Sen. Tracie Davis and House Minority Leader Fentrice Driskell are leading efforts to restore access to essential health care. Because of the movement we've built together, pro-choice champions are fighting back and pushing forward. But their work, and ours, is far from over. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: You can run, but you can’t hide

body:
We’re targeting five Republican members of Congress in battleground districts who refuse to meet with the people who elected them, and refuse to answer to the Veterans they’re screwing over.
#
Peter:
Republicans in Congress are applauding Trump, Elon, and DOGE as they fire thousands of Veterans without cause.
They’re carrying water for Trump, Elon, and DOGE as they push the VA to slash 83,000 staff.
They just voted for a bill that will zero out the Toxic Exposures Fund, ripping billions of dollars and lifesaving care from sick Veterans.
They are doing **_nothing**_ to defend Veterans. And now, they’re too chicken to hear from their constituents at town halls in their home districts.
Yeah, that’s not gonna fly.
VoteVets is rolling out a new campaign. We’re targeting five Republican members of Congress in battleground districts who refuse to meet with the people who elected them, and refuse to answer to the Veterans they’re screwing over. We’ll be running ads on local news and streaming services, we’ll be up on stationary and mobile billboards near their offices, and we’ll be running digital ads in their districts.
All told, we’re making a six-figure investment in this campaign.
**[Now, to watch one of those ads, use this link. And then, if you like what you see and want to help us do more of this, chip in $5 and keep these ads on the air.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-mar25-elon-vets-ad.Fc-jqN&refcode=em250318-1-90&t=1&akid=34261%2E3013755%2EEhYISG)

name: Team Freedom Virginia
subject: Virginians Urge Governor Youngkin to Sign Paid Family and Medical Leave Legislation
body:
Yesterday, we met with Delegate Briana Sewell
| | | | |
---
| Virginians Urge Governor Youngkin to Sign Paid Family & Medical Leave Legislation
---
| Yesterday, we met with Delegate Briana Sewell, Senator Jennifer Boysko, Voices for Virginia's Children, and impacted Virginians to call on Governor Youngkin to sign the Paid Family and Medical Leave legislation currently awaiting decision on his desk. [HB 2531](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-O14CVopOkJ1p812tWPZ8A6hO1BGdKNE7jHRVEx5eXzfyAJjog3QgscpUxggXTELo7v7hN9w64e1StB9rEvF6j_m47-0hcQA-DwiQcHJ2IE-5JhAj_LlaFbN4ZnhA-vML&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==), patroned by Delegate Sewell, passed both chambers of the General Assembly on February 12 with a [21 to 18](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-DHSZpG-5MpF1X3ct-ipHShTiaV7gX0rXyzo4wXeBNRkQtgAQoRnQoBkFpnPXfFF3DEhPd81uX5OimGSixKLj86xTLAph3gQtGFUFtZj2QESp4uBKIS4WGeHFEax8Pk7yNZFdU9iP1_I=&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==) vote and is now on the governor's desk. The deadline for Governor Glenn Youngkin to sign or veto the bill is in one week, on Monday, March 24.
With just a week left for the Governor to sign or veto the bill, it's time to take action! Join us in demanding Paid Family and Medical Leave to support Virginia families.
---
| | [SUPPORT PAID FAMILY & MEDICAL LEAVE](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-OJGpPul7AI36VoNoeFUWaU1hljCxJnujVm9kikzKqJ0PPQo7MwMb4O0aJfebdDUBlLR-eoxM_fmKUO8ODHGOFuv1ZFNLPY-y5-0jzui1XC9msADBQ5kcreFrnRddQrd0HEMMRO0e6xi3I8lswmT5Ax6j3z3gH7g4ut9d_JNmweKwDbQOlvYwLg==&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==)
---
---
| |
---
| {{Pictured from Left to Right: Melissa Alexander, Delegate Briana Sewell, Senator Jennifer Boysko, Sarah Burzio, Rhena Hicks, and Emily Moore. }}
---
| "Establishing a Paid Family and Medical Leave program will allow small businesses to compete on a level playing field with big corporations, ensuring that they have the ability to attract and retain our workforce," said Delegate Sewell. "I urge Governor Youngkin to stick to his promise to 'keep Virginia winning' and sign this winning legislation for hardworking Virginians today."
"More than ever, [families depend on women's earnings](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-Kn0LfgubOwc86HINYxgxT8vfGZqYeeV5kbCxGAei4_97xQe-CtSQsxUe-dTUoHVsNLmOj9imOVNhO-vpdkO73NXEmzTbkiCO-8VBRNfd-9WRPj8keofjLsMmAMm7j3x2Crxi5ojn4PBkrHIqa5cQ4CtB7K-YlYA7Pr0X4ZLaaKOllJy_MxY83sHKd-2-4ydmdIRRv_84GmAmRfpXudHYFqOziIlUlJ9djGitcRyRo8z74r0eXu7IkA==&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==), and yet women often are the ones that [have to leave the workforce](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-lmrIeii_JMclGpe_pxHmxx6VDLTfq-JX0Hyg77j0KyG7_eOZ86Qz4SzJgIeGOB4J9VJJUFprE96lMitLz3700lFLtF9kCuqmYgewEuyd3eDMSTNUHq3RVI_JHOuH1D2l7BcbURZKzj7fsBt4UC7nGexYLFrUSty114I30eUDVnuMaCHJhVjyomKznCo8rIaX&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==) to care for their loved ones, for their children, for their spouses, for their aging parents," said Senator Boysko who has patroned the legislation in the Senate for over seven years. "It is time for Governor Youngkin to commit to our hardworking Virginia families and sign the bill to make Paid Family and Medical Leave a reality for everyone."
---
| |
---
The bill will expand access to Paid Family and Medical Leave by ensuring that the [3.4 million Virginia workers](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-voEalBtBWjTRawp0CCmn_YHzBWBmr1KnuCEpL-5FFGCOvVrb7HYbc2IbeSEAThIekaBHtxBOqFw5mQomEGSWRVznIDLYijxax9E9M0SP_D0LxwhlEj7uyP1T3hx33IH71KySmemxcNHwk-Mx8YpIoxh29ztDmdWZ9SZtITi3UjooWX0b0sI2uKLZTCC9aAHTFZpgZqsoC6M=&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==) without access to paid leave can take up to 12 weeks when experiencing events like a new baby, serious illness or injury with 80% wage replacement and protection of their health care coverage. On average, a typical Virginia worker taking four weeks of unpaid leave will lose [$3,700 in income](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-KzotnxdemoLtyleQIeaFKMGfIiLgyYOe9t2CTGiYMfOLkr9cLMtEiXlxu9-Jseqkk2yzQvcIgCAH4K6DLalQl0lCMy2su1rt8wsMPx5NXfEHAEqQALufMaZ8K9RsL7kXgUP0stHCYgooXql-8tedW2KhpvS1_6Cnltwvg76MAU5inEr3B7yJV0-nH7i-fiIaQ7ZNvw4pya6iWEYQeIy_zkKLYi6zsC0rJyQ5ojs9fUAeMHvxtEGt87WT5eUO07Duko8wge-qfmaV0IhPvfa04r4zLwWaDGqpiHTiNp9q0Shf9gMZZiF22U3Nm07jtrbfmQRJoBDQPfoeAce9FfR0I2MjK50C7xNTNowaU985nM4bS9dI8fUuJSiWSEa0tSqtFacKUDw7Ajy1Wg6DKpyUbw==&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==).
Melissa Alexander, a Prince William resident, told the story of her family's experience needing paid medical leave:
"In 2014, my family received the worst news any parent could hear: our eight-year-old daughter Julia was diagnosed with brain cancer. A little over three months after Julia's diagnosis, I had to take a one-year leave of absence because I simply had no more leave to use, and cancer did not care whether or not I could get paid time off to care for my daughter. Over the next few days, I hope the governor thinks of people like me as he contemplates what to do with this legislation, but more importantly, I hope he thinks of children like Julia who need their mamas when they are in the toughest fight of their lives."

---
|
---
| [READ MORE](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-P9ZnLlFD9GePCg7xB0e97rwtxdvRwBW6Ox5QiWuRbSsOVoya0dM8PjVMQh9IdpZMu7pnwZ5VIFV15Yyu3lZWt49PWWnPCl9RCnNFXBJXDsg8jOPH48WeLrcZ9tGHHgp_DSPBIUHfM_H0Nj_f4XxCHkUy5siQuycVhaYKFZykFZxg8_UjZLQVBVo-PUjvWqB_JQ189MhEP5GwykpB3qOcXux2rZ2wogSN64U1WtaDFXtybPyPtsONj5tSm_goKDRfg76-VdK9sj08IcH7M9FCedEIiLyx4IzFkeqUgHym7olFLsNHwiFmsam3RZSYoCXl&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==)
---
Virginia has the opportunity to be a leader in providing Paid Family and Medical Leave, providing its hardworking citizens with resources and time off when unexpected tragedies hit. The time is NOW for the governor to sign Paid Family and Medical Leave into law.
---
[](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-Fu3OQQ31_Xr5dCY5zYD6-gVUlSgZ31Adr3Wn-2wF1lxNTTHpLkCCgrK_U0CTYGJISbQM1gD7ZxZlOh5wUrkikSoRDNdan2Br5cvR7mrHAvg=&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-7SEdyvuskJH3R73qXUuKQGaok5UXvOUuETvvMewmPWv2b9QZvmcWwsYszWKJ7cbL1WMa9g5iPaJp09lMvE2kGXmSGr5ORMyN&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019pb8xi6HJkzAtFa1DmlNvSpU8Pe7mu3GaIAhxcPc4O8txecg8BFaqO6FvusLA6_-AgplGW1fPaTZh2jBTDv6nKtF86H6ZdA1omjQ7FTe0VLWMeBvsGxUU4uGTim-p3ftK5xJ2MCcoBh1I5R0f0X2dHvKs_PkbTROQI8xyfVhRUE=&c=eXkOU26aO8emivOlFMjazpzsh-q3aPRbX78u--iB1M4wiz6f247Ugw==&ch=P5F_ZkeeLfsiz7ZO7ghz08qPw_7Td2jZnNgHLzzaF1wxZOCsvPwt2A==)
---

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Another step towards dictatorship
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump’s strategy for amassing more power was laid out in Project 2025.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1542%2E791427%2E8_WIoK)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250318-1-120&t=2&akid=1542%2E791427%2E8_WIoK)
Friend, Trump’s strategy for amassing power in his White House was laid out in Project 2025.
Now we are watching as Trump chips away, piece by piece, at the checks and balances that make our democracy possible.
First he signed a flurry of executive orders that far overstepped his powers as President.
Then he allowed unelected billionaire Elon Musk to illegally slash parts of the federal budget that is set by Congress.
Then just last week, Trump ordered the arrest and deportation of a legal permanent resident, Mahmoud Khalil, for exercising his first amendment rights to protest in support of Palestine.
Now he is openly defying a court order that blocked him from using war-time powers to deport a group of immigrants to a super-prison in El Salvador.
**Make no mistake, each one of these steps is another step toward authoritarianism and dictatorship.**
Our democracy doesn’t work when the President defies the Constitution to go around the Courts and the Congress. We decided 250 years ago that we will no longer live under a King, and we aren’t going back.
We need to be rallying our strength, and building a broad, pro-democracy movement in this country that refuses to accept these abuses of power.
If you’re with me, please consider supporting our campaign and our work:
**[Make a donation of any amount today. I pledge to do everything in my power to oppose Trump’s illegal actions, but it's going to take a strong grassroots majority to fight back and put pressure on Congress and the Courts.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar25.Pez7ER&refcode=em250318-1-120&t=3&akid=1542%2E791427%2E8_WIoK)

Then just last week, Trump ordered the arrest and deportation of a legal permanent resident, Mahmoud Khalil, for exercising his first amendment rights to protest in support of Palestine. Now he is openly defying a court order that blocked him from using war-time powers to deport a group of immigrants to a super-prison in El Salvador. Make no mistake, each one of these steps is another step toward authoritarianism and dictatorship. Our democracy doesn’t work when the President defies the Constitution to go around the Courts and the Congress. We decided 250 years ago that we will no longer live under a King, and we aren’t going back. We need to be rallying our strength, and building a broad, pro-democracy movement in this country that refuses to accept these abuses of power. If you’re with me, please consider supporting our campaign and our work: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Young leaders need your help before this deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The first end-of-quarter deadline of 2025 is here — can you chip in?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250318-1&t=1&akid=1869%2E587540%2EyLRoIp)
Hi Peter,
The first **end-of-quarter deadline of 2025** is just two weeks away — and we need your help to knock it out of the park. 💥
This is about **building a future where young, bold, progressive leaders have the resources to win** — leaders who will fight for affordable healthcare, climate action, reproductive rights, and a democracy that puts people first. But right now, we’re falling short of where we need to be.
Republican megadonors and corporate special interests are pouring money into their candidates — because they know what’s at stake. If we don’t step up, they’ll drown out our voices, push their extreme agenda, and block the transformational change we so desperately need.
That’s why **we’re relying on you, Peter.** Grassroots donations fuel this movement — **no billionaires, no corporate PACs, just people like you who believe in a better future.**
**[Can you chip in $5 or more today to help us build the future we deserve?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250318-1?refcode=em20250318-1869&amount=5&refcode2=1869_587540_yLRoIp&akid=1869%2E587540%2EyLRoIp)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250318-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250318-1869&refcode2=1869_587540_yLRoIp&akid=1869%2E587540%2EyLRoIp)**
Time is running out, and every dollar matters. Let’s show the power of this movement and make sure we elect leaders who deserve to be in office — not just the ones billionaires want.
**We’re counting on you.**
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve

name: Patriot
subject: Soros-backed group gave my Democrat opponent $500K while I was legally barred from fundraising, Patriot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session.

| | | | | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt8q44hf0giaoj5olrpptll5n4bkdjgb86o2cn20_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph61o32c1h2bs)
---
Patriot - I've faced some truly difficult challenges before, but I think this could be the toughest mountain I'll have to climb...

I was barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - _a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Patriot!_

As a Christian woman, I wouldn't lie to you. So, believe me when I tell you this is a _**BAD**_ situation! _The fact is, Spanberger has bottomless dark money to pull from._She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers!__

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; [please send in any amount you can to help me and my team make up the fundraising difference:](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm5qumbmrdfbpmrg8955dp9rrmjgnlma8shvu080_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph61o32c1h2bs)**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d36f8f6d0a1c464f957cdf3df96ccbad&_e=XBSjZkOYAndymZ8hudS7Y09GNgNoXxN0ud6qHitXHYN6uSslsGgj7kjrKlPaw-bhzNvvQTUm5CLb49NWTNGiEXB2BdiiIlDdfw8T_eju_jEGefhhSWG69hkpTrZMHBR9bm8StpqbCCbIl8xsVgSf1eywGp-ERm-hH4mxvwFXzop39NVe89Htt5qd37zB2_WWrqZLfwOWuEqDh7mCjUH_1yEkn7mPfpd1Sh5PUFD3qqLlQvVcJS63Q_q4xJ-bQ-6keoIBpBCAE6Qp70VmEsquFZR00rMWQxDQrtwawyETQ8YUpKrAjdKlSoMrbu-mJetiqXlCT9W7HmTkSpiHg6Tz2naVvwSVVfPleWskgj13MxUFOgxV82bFwwM8340yuFpqPtnA7M6IQjOfWGkFwsrfVt1K7jZ1H-iG0Rl0J9TGPKrHrpQUwA2_mlNgSp4tiMRM_QWOZ9B37CeFow5cWA5p8A%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d36f8f6d0a1c464f957cdf3df96ccbad&_e=XBSjZkOYAndymZ8hudS7Y09GNgNoXxN0ud6qHitXHYN6uSslsGgj7kjrKlPaw-bhzNvvQTUm5CLb49NWTNGiEXB2BdiiIlDdfw8T_eju_jEGefhhSWG69hkpTrZMHBR9bm8StpqbCCbIl8xsVgSf1eywGp-ERm-hH4mxvwFXzop39NVe89Htt5qd37zB2_WWrqZLfwOWuEqDh7mCjUH_1yEkn7mPfpd1Sh5PUFD3qqLlQvVcJS63Q_q4xJ-bQ-6keoIBpBCAE6Qp70VmEsquFZR00rMWQxDQrtwawyETQ8bmVyvU-1tCCzi9wlYFNwUyRNd3RGpAkXSp5YUKl3aEZr2dAs3bbStRcKHeiY3mYEBuYmbUHdyeUM_9V_EllPvSJrAfY_9qPjmRuS0sSHCj5CDZ_SnMPCSYXjRD1EXsP1l6jCvtdi-e6LbbeYYR0qAit7GjWFZiRAZ4qCFxyU51UQ%3D%3D)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250318_trumpvacuts_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250318_trumpvacuts_act]
Team,
The Trump administration is quietly trying to cut 80,000 employees at the Department of Veterans Affairs.
https://apnews.com/article/veterans-affairs-cuts-doge-musk-trump-f587a6bc3db6a460e9c357592e165712 [https://apnews.com/article/veterans-affairs-cuts-doge-musk-trump-f587a6bc3db6a460e9c357592e165712]
The VA provides health care and essential services to millions of veterans who have proudly served our country. These cuts would hurt them and their families. Anyone who has made the sacrifice to defend the United States deserves respect, not to be played like pawns by Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency.
Colorado is home to more than 400,000 veterans. Michael has long pushed to ensure they receive the resources and the quality care they need—for their physical and mental health. In 2022, he helped pass the PACT Act, which expanded health coverage to 3.5 million veterans who were exposed to burn pits and hazardous toxins while serving.
These Trump cuts could jeopardize support for veterans suffering from illnesses from toxic exposure. Disgraceful.
While the Trump administration wants to quietly make cuts to the VA, we will make sure Coloradans know exactly what they are up to.
Michael will never stop working for our veterans. Stand with him. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=X_250318_trumpvacuts_act]
Thank you,
Team Bennet

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Could have proved us wrong. Instead they proved the point.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Still no.
In fact, the same Dems who argue to keep the filibuster “for when we need it” do not, in fact, use it when we need it.
**It’s only used to block Dem policies. Never to block harmful GOP ones.**
**Could have proved us wrong. Instead they proved the point.**
In solidarity,
Alexandria
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria from NY-14 and beyond so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250318.CJ2yIi&refcode=em20250318-8376-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8376%2E2526796%2Ei3qJhP)

name: Alex, United We Dream Action
subject: We are who we’ve been waiting for
body:
Our changemakers are fighting Trump’s mass deportation agenda | | | Peter, **** United We Dream is fighting the Trump administration’s cruel, anti-immigrant agenda by mobilizing and informing our communities through our **Squad Up & Know Your Rights** activation campaign. 📢 The Squad is a group of immigrant youth and allies committed to winning permanent protections for all immigrants. ✊ Through our activation campaign, community leaders are trained to lead local events and actions, apply direct pressure to elected officials, and connect with other immigrant youth and allies who are equally committed to protecting immigrant communities. 🧡 **Trump’s administration and Border Czar have even complained that our Know Your Rights resources are working**** _too_****well at keeping our communities educated. 📚** With the future of DACA more uncertain than ever, and constant headlines pouring in about this administration’s latest attacks on immigrants, our work has never been more important. We are who we’ve been waiting for, and we will be heard loud and clear. 🗣️ **[Our next training is on March 20th, and our fierce group of changemakers is ready to fight back against Trump’s mass deportation agenda. clean_body: Our changemakers are fighting Trump’s mass deportation agenda | | | Peter, ** United We Dream is fighting the Trump administration’s cruel, anti-immigrant agenda by mobilizing and informing our communities through our Squad Up & Know Your Rights activation campaign. 📢 The Squad is a group of immigrant youth and allies committed to winning permanent protections for all immigrants. ✊ Through our activation campaign, community leaders are trained to lead local events and actions, apply direct pressure to elected officials, and connect with other immigrant youth and allies who are equally committed to protecting immigrant communities. 🧡 Trump’s administration and Border Czar have even complained that our Know Your Rights resources are working** toowell at keeping our communities educated. 📚 With the future of DACA more uncertain than ever, and constant headlines pouring in about this administration’s latest attacks on immigrants, our work has never been more important. We are who we’ve been waiting for, and we will be heard loud and clear. 🗣️ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Together, we’ll build power, defend our communities, and show the world that we’re unstoppable. Let’s Squad Up and protect our rights ⚖️ Alex, United We Dream Action P.S. There’s room for all of us in the Squad. If you’d like to join the fight and our community of immigrant youth and allies, . Follow us on: | | | | |

subject: I Officially Filed & I Have an Opponent!

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
#
---
# **Rasoul Files for Re-Election**
---
|
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104071866/534184678/965072234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODQ1MmU4Mi0xMzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7cruVSfjmbE-Kq3D0lxSS8rEpagV7EsuLA7IYssTCg=)
---
**I have filed to be on the ballot for re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates,** and with my new opponent I am not taking anything for granted. We are hitting the ground running with new team members and regular events, but could use your help! As Chairman of the Virginia House Education Committee, and member of the House Appropriations and Public Safety Committees, I am doing everything possible to protect our education system and the citizens of Roanoke from the dangerous policies of this administration. **[**Please contribute to our campaign today to help keep us in the fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104071867/534184679/965072234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODQ1MmU4Mi0xMzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7cruVSfjmbE-Kq3D0lxSS8rEpagV7EsuLA7IYssTCg=)** I have made it my priority to **take care of our schools, lower the cost of living, and advocate for basic human rights, especially in the wake of indiscriminate killing in Gaza with our tax dollars. And with your help, I will continue.**
---

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: Support Hamas? Lose your visa
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA _
body:
Anti-Jewish hatred should never be tolerated in the United States |
---
__

Fellow American,

As a newly sworn-in U.S. Senator, I know that time is short, and there is more news to consume than possible in a day, but I’m writing to ensure you saw a piece that caught my eye in the WSJ, which every major news outlet in the country has now picked up.

In short, President Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio have revoked the green card of a Columbia University student who led the pro-Hamas movement on campus. These student-led “protests” in support of radical Islamic terrorism have destabilized the New York City university since October 2023.

You shouldn’t be able to come to this great nation and reap the benefits of a world-class education while spreading anti-Jewish hatred and openly supporting a terrorist organization, yet some of my colleagues on the other side of the aisle have taken to social media to decry the move by the administration as an attack on free speech; **it’s their new cause celebre.**

body:

Patriot - I've faced some truly difficult challenges before, but I think this could be the toughest mountain I'll have to climb...

I was barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - _a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Patriot!_

As a Christian woman, I wouldn't lie to you. So, believe me when I tell you this is a _**BAD**_ situation! _The fact is, Spanberger has bottomless dark money to pull from._She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers!__

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; [please send in any amount you can to help me and my team make up the fundraising difference:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze6d4b5gijlc0kr80sqb7tjdtco6i9j539uok4i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph61p74c1h2bs)**

I've put everything I've got into winning this race, making history, and continuing to notch conservative victories. But I know I can't do this alone, Patriot; it's going to take all of us, __and I really mean**all of us**__ , to win.

If you are going through a tough time and can't spare to donate even just $19, I'll understand. We are officially on track to set a new record for grassroots support in this district! This is what a people-powered campaign looks like, Peter, and we can't thank you enough for your support. Kicking off on strong footing is so important, and you're helping us prove there's real momentum behind our campaign to bring a working-class voice to WI-03. clean_body: | Peter, We're officially one week into our campaign to elect Rebecca Cooke in WI-03, and the excitement on the ground has already been incredible. Nearly 7,000 individual supporters have chipped in support since our launch, and with an average donation of about $50 , we blew past our $250,000 launch goal. We are officially on track to set a new record for grassroots support in this district! This is what a people-powered campaign looks like, Peter, and we can't thank you enough for your support. Kicking off on strong footing is so important, and you're helping us prove there's real momentum behind our campaign to bring a working-class voice to WI-03. = = = = It’s been a great week, but our work can’t stop now. I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart.
---
For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
**But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up __these__ headlines:**
---
**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_ **
[Source: _MSNBC_]
**“In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” **
[Source: _The New Republic_]
**“...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” **
[Source: _Law & Crime News_]
---
I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – _yours truly._
---
**__And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!__**
---
Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus __state-level__ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely **ABANDONED** , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life.
---
But here’s what the Left will never understand... _America First fighters _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ , and we _NEVER_ _ABANDON_ our fellow patriots._
---
When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcGOmzAURb_G7ED42bFhwSJTilR10o6qptNZRY79nLgDBoGdlH59BWKyPT667-padUPr7FwR-UQArs5MBICwPQGIgf1Sx-NhnNP3f_M-vTPAhRP4tKk3eMheq0J9jq9fv_38O7309Ivvf7_d6EMP84APeTuaYadcu1BZJ6bioKjVCVZUcmB0x3ORXKtzqUuKJd9ZrrgRxpx1USqtAbhQGorEVZDDLme0oALKHc1KYc8MWc5yqTUgJzxfD2V2RAxX599xNMq1c6b7LmmrawjDtBZrCDQT6jhidnd-RLMYBJoxmjm9uNg65V26xJi-S230JpWlYspYRaDhIBAKaYyUhc1BLHmsiaE7BRw7wmobDCUgFqJVNyh38YTVW3u5vXRoXFzsbZwVTn0cNRJW_3g9PX1E9D6gD4TV358PLwTEybfOEFbP9s-F2YkNcYXrn7K6fq73R8XfDslYmeHu2tZNQhKeX9ZtliluFfwPAAD___rtor4)

They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. **_But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone!_**
---
Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – **2,313,757 PATRIOTS** who joined the fight for my freedom and justice!

clean_body: The Democrat prosecutors want me to feel alone, but what they don’t realize is... The Democrat prosecutors want me to feel alone, but what they don’t realize is... | Friend, I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart. For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York... ...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe. ...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up these headlines: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [Source: MSNBC] “In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” [Source: The New Republic] “...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” [Source: Law & Crime News] I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President. You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – yours truly. And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely ABANDONED , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life. But here’s what the Left will never understand... America First fighters NEVER SURRENDER , and we NEVER ABANDON our fellow patriots. When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone! Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – 2,313,757 PATRIOTS who joined the fight for my freedom and justice! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Thom Tillis
subject: #TBT This was my American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now I’m fighting for YOURS

Friend,

When I was a kid, we lived paycheck to paycheck.

My parents worked tirelessly just to put food on the table, and we moved often as they chased work wherever they could find it.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhaiech8spg87qcu3b3m39erknfdqg9vuch42cl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph69o74c9h2bs)
I changed schools every year, lived in trailer parks, and saw firsthand what it's like to struggle at the mercy of the economy.

Life wasn't easy, but my upbringing taught me that you have to fight for the American Dream. Whether you want to earn a degree or buy a home, anything is possible with hard work, determination, and faith.

**[Only in the United States of America can a young boy in a trailer park grow up to be a U.S. Senator--and it's an honor and privilege I don't take lightly.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrbmiddb2s1foofk04ukvnhtfd0vn716dvujembg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph69o74c9h2bs)**

Since taking the oath of office, I've worked tirelessly to advance legislation that will:
* Secure the southern border and fight against dangerous sanctuary city policies.
* Promote a healthy economy and ensure North Carolinians have access to good-paying jobs.
* Strengthen our military and improve the lives of our service members.
* Advance college opportunities for North Carolina's low-income and underrepresented students.
* Prevent taxpayer dollars from going to wasteful programs that don't serve the people.

I'm proud of my track record and my reputation for standing up to the radical Left, but there is still so much to do.

**[My 2026 reelection campaign is already under way, and I'll need your support if we're going to keep North Carolina red and hold our Senate majority.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zop6vlmqp47etlethqoosq7lcrd0ken3cqp72m5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph69o74c9h2bs)**

My fight for your American Dream is far from over--and I hope you'll help me continue the important work we've started.

Sincerely,
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeqkff0i2pb0587v77vq1v88pt7ie95dpc2eord0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph69o74c9h2bs)
Senator Thom Tillis

******************************************************[DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z466mdgfrb3gumdl1r5hm6r7mmv2urjmvnq24jog_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cph69o74c9h2bs)******************************************************
