body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39552%2E3422442%2Elniyya)
We’re going to keep this short, Derek.
It’s been one week since Katie launched her campaign for Governor, and now that her candidacy is official, we’re starting to put together our plans for the rest of the year.
**To put ourselves in the best possible position to win in 2026, we need to know how much grassroots support we can expect to receive.** This will shape our decisions around staffing, advertising, and more.
We’re so grateful to have Porter Supporters like you in our movement, Derek, and we can’t do this without you. **[Will you chip in $5 today to help power us to victory?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250318_1_ak?refcode=em20250318-39552&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39552_3422442_lniyya&akid=39552%2E3422442%2Elniyya)**

Thanks for considering,
Team Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250318-39552&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39552_3422442_lniyya&akid=39552%2E3422442%2Elniyya)**

name: Victor Riches
subject: America’s Next Crisis is HERE
body:
Proposition 312 stops future politicians or bureaucrats from recreating the Zone or anything like it

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/ESCFvYhOQ7d_GJa3D63-OtN_J0-WqVadDbZJ4-fPcC1iuetV4Ju4J4rk-CNpLNy8ph79jV_MLhX615_9wapR0MwaU8OedzPXXCiqt9Xf-JUkPiL62NhE_GA-Toe3xmC_gHfGDp-O1yvGpxhSl6bUCc70UTS64YMd8IEhrn2D4WRjLlXEDdtN4G6PHg3MqCBzZZoiXLWGmLy0Gbu5L2UBLBxrbIu_-jqLs27hkSYR0beDMgXg5n-FtUrCsTdrSbtyO0AEy7YcyODDJuIfOAscZZexMIsiVYbczy0XxpoHIrT8HKBE6XM4EuUeqXKOxIoRNchwbNdVoE1XDcFrj8A2soJN5VVThWmK/vOTXxg68G8OJy25O3_uJ3636cISPVbRC/7)
Friend,

When the city of Phoenix abandoned its responsibility to enforce the law, the Goldwater Institute fought on behalf of residents and business owners to demand action.

The city stopped enforcing the law in “The Zone” – an area of downtown Phoenix plagued by crime and homelessness. As a result, residents were forced to flee, and small business owners were forced to close their doors.

At the Goldwater Institute, we couldn’t sit by and let this happen. We filed a lawsuit against Phoenix’s government, highlighting the failure to enforce laws that led to rampant crime and the destruction of downtown neighborhoods.

We won in court, **forcing the city to clean up The Zone!**

But this was only the beginning. Our next step was the passage of Proposition 312.

Overwhelmingly adopted by Arizona voters, Proposition 312 stops future politicians or bureaucrats from recreating the Zone or anything like it, giving residents back their tax dollars when the government refuses to do its basic duties.

With the successful passage of Proposition 312, the Goldwater Institute is ensuring the government is held accountable by making them compensate property and business owners for damages incurred when the government fails to enforce the law.

_**Now, the Goldwater Institute is taking this groundbreaking policy to states across the nation**_**.**

I’m Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. At the Goldwater Institute, we know that property owners have fundamental constitutional rights, and we are fighting to defend their rights.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am looking for 100 new supporters to step up and help the Goldwater Institute bring our policy solutions across the United States. Join our community of supporters with a generous gift of $10, $35, $50, or more, and help us continue to defend your property rights. Click below to donate today >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/sEDTCXPchJBy6z7rW6nciV7VjOELzXH7kCAQsHPUOa0XugsK6JPDMnncgcsCbBeoqqbcbUQ5efTVTTaFpfJIDcgBO_M0xHMghxhu2sIhyrbtTr6xBjHtV9cK_B_k21e8NizKod-KNMkaxWiFDNvafk43KEyvFcWx0otWHN3Yh5TT5Pu9HlsqFNjjKFbsMce2tYsGAvlKpVB2zDmBh7exerIdAqllP1rKy_bK6rH1vkVm7I9TPkZCgZa8Yxs-q1QdmqvmjuaQ3KzKffGfh_c_QF1i1845hugEuYDCvhx4L0bnlXrpmYsIjrsdy3Ti3jGxVlXmnE2Gmc9MSKxGUpKmukaaWTF-QCuA/ubNpIfEwEstNL9w9Y96SdHtp3eF5KKUS/7)
[Donate Today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/oiCYC5meEUiLEjAoMmOxBysDX5CliH-9hXCvgOuIbvou9RbO1s787sM-dblpnvMf0Hpjy1byOw3uYmgT5fccQhBIfVnRGNUq7Si3SyZRhahiv6HWfqswqEhuIHfhF05g55IEyQcqUAI9MyxVT15j50ou-JVmdgTDVUYTGxdoqM1JeOGNze8yJWlMazIC9zVhIqT02oF10c6vk8iWvS7hWlD5W11YXvnsa29MrwSZZwDUwIjaaVRtaZiv8H-xICGWoL4CsX3S-ImtbtWNQJ2DauobTrHmMJjymVtbvOVxVZwlQaXFYa53cQqAmBWVB6Mw9uY8fkemS4SF45BpltAtEtoEle8cDS52/8-xxlnAN2G1C79InyJCYu20O2WsUSsc8/7)
If there’s one thing the government hates, it’s losing out on our tax dollars.

Sadly, this type of government negligence isn’t limited to Arizona.

Across the nation, we are seeing reckless progressive policies turning once-thriving cities into wastelands.

That’s why the Goldwater Institute is expanding our successful Arizona blueprint nationwide to fight for property rights in all 50 states!

[Please support the Goldwater Institute’s fight to defend property rights in every state.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/hHT5b-1wUFGhNEUp5mZ6z--GASi8AlbaF5WKPuHMvT6srigpdkkAGYBL6XSp6kD_vkCc6H_ZjXidoGzYu_5qngxdT8lx6aPvWcWNzEzyTltTmMC_-eYOMpsl3BC1A_Fl0h64ah9LBNlaqD0CBHfiOyEvjzZgj3kldqi3I_OMxZq1uOgz8B14RtkrZV8xLDrTv2nWAODQbSxVFkgDwybhzoSaBCb171prLmpsfuT62kVyXf_7LnRyuLDa4tobmpxpRfqf6EH5WBFxrT4YqjI4k55w0CGAVRza73fU-j_7hCsEzeLK7NqQrylcairr1KS1MJGD5BOABYALGk6rzrFbNHKGM3__8PmH/MRxEI0PlPt7d0VcE4RfqKUBLa1eCeuFd/7)
[Donate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Up9lz68Zs12qmQMN4SvCRymy26B5eWd_jWNxocVSPM3IVb1qrEO3jmi98kF2piQU1FuFCthcMyK9TkNQvwBm6yocrsA5DCAHUn6EsrGTH95cEaUWRbnhQ_S1JVg_hFiljuRcAY1ZRo4Gii8PmFnYELW_XhIW2YZj7ycs8oMfIjI7hqQ9jE-_81OrGE1aJcwy2Rh-zJ9NCfQ16dlnsK1MV9loywvZU7de8IxohoiQyQ5KAgAfVOczANjT4j_yXX2KpRgsoyntMHX17nkqKlATvaGuMOoSo-LSFBEmfwb9DZqzIRWX1xO_M4Yuf_m7TU6F23XzweVRdM92An8MuUOVJ_qLvLOLHYua/oz1MyyoK-wsxM0h3zIUoJ56RsL9OETuO/7)
In California, the refusal of district attorneys to prosecute crimes caused lawbreakers to roam free with no worry of punishment.

**Despite spending $24 billion on its homelessness crisis over the past five years, California has seen the homeless population increase by about 20%.**

Taxpayers deserve better than the government allowing the violation of their property rights. Politicians are failing to do their jobs, but by expanding Proposition 312 nationwide, we can hold officials accountable.

[Help us protect the rights of property owners across the nation by sending a gift today >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/UnE-B07uEim5dN6Vyzv9nZ8yE5KapuYpV7jgJIRZdtcgqT8gWE6n1H-XJ-Ef47Ua4CqKVbps1UGajsBr36iDrU-9BdS7WIDx5QYZ73eY-IyzyEM1lxeG-l0999xWa8GPpW9MlifXeYu31MpmWKZj15H8tD8ObXRWNT5iUSbZUCoZHdbsM3lbIP7decwErppaTOnxzANVOUsS2GAcubMI32mOpz1TLtnB40AAmkZOK24KOzu2UpvUv7IqkIDhubQPvuIUOYvRRwlcqgjKAhyZQq15tlAUgk9E1dX0zpU7Fxb62jc94pB01A09O-wMYF95b1uCIrm1S09g9NX1STJx_EAG8pz2mUs/ODTI30IP7Jw5VGIJplE-vB9EDonYZ_s_/7)

clean_body: Proposition 312 stops future politicians or bureaucrats from recreating the Zone or anything like it | | | Friend, When the city of Phoenix abandoned its responsibility to enforce the law, the Goldwater Institute fought on behalf of residents and business owners to demand action. The city stopped enforcing the law in “The Zone” – an area of downtown Phoenix plagued by crime and homelessness. As a result, residents were forced to flee, and small business owners were forced to close their doors. At the Goldwater Institute, we couldn’t sit by and let this happen. We filed a lawsuit against Phoenix’s government, highlighting the failure to enforce laws that led to rampant crime and the destruction of downtown neighborhoods. We won in court, forcing the city to clean up The Zone! But this was only the beginning. Our next step was the passage of Proposition 312. Overwhelmingly adopted by Arizona voters, Proposition 312 stops future politicians or bureaucrats from recreating the Zone or anything like it, giving residents back their tax dollars when the government refuses to do its basic duties. With the successful passage of Proposition 312, the Goldwater Institute is ensuring the government is held accountable by making them compensate property and business owners for damages incurred when the government fails to enforce the law. Now, the Goldwater Institute is taking this groundbreaking policy to states across the nation. I’m Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. At the Goldwater Institute, we know that property owners have fundamental constitutional rights, and we are fighting to defend their rights. Here’s how you can help. If there’s one thing the government hates, it’s losing out on our tax dollars. Sadly, this type of government negligence isn’t limited to Arizona. Across the nation, we are seeing reckless progressive policies turning once-thriving cities into wastelands. That’s why the Goldwater Institute is expanding our successful Arizona blueprint nationwide to fight for property rights in all 50 states! In California, the refusal of district attorneys to prosecute crimes caused lawbreakers to roam free with no worry of punishment. Despite spending $24 billion on its homelessness crisis over the past five years, California has seen the homeless population increase by about 20%. Taxpayers deserve better than the government allowing the violation of their property rights. Politicians are failing to do their jobs, but by expanding Proposition 312 nationwide, we can hold officials accountable. Thank you, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Peter, I know in my heart that there are way more good people than bad. And that our best days as Americans are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences. But right now, it’s our worst who have the microphone, and they’re trying to make us pick-and-choose what values to protect, and who to protect. We cannot allow this rhetoric to become normalized in our country. We have to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest. _Everyone must stand up against this._ I'm in Congress to bridge the gaps of hate and create change, but the truth is _we're already getting pummeled by National Republicans seeking to divide our community using nasty, misleading attacks._ IL-17 will be the tightest race in Illinois, and I could use your help to keep the forces of good in this swing seat. We’re aiming to raise $20,000 in online donations by the end of March to not get drowned out by the forces of hate. If we meet our quarterly goals, our FEC numbers will send a clear message about the strength behind our movement. **[With this deadline looming, I'm hoping I can count on you to donate $3 to power our campaign for good. clean_body: | = Peter, I know in my heart that there are way more good people than bad. And that our best days as Americans are when we work together to solve problems, not rip each other apart over our differences. But right now, it’s our worst who have the microphone, and they’re trying to make us pick-and-choose what values to protect, and who to protect. We cannot allow this rhetoric to become normalized in our country. We have to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest. Everyone must stand up against this. I'm in Congress to bridge the gaps of hate and create change, but the truth is we're already getting pummeled by National Republicans seeking to divide our community using nasty, misleading attacks. IL-17 will be the tightest race in Illinois, and I could use your help to keep the forces of good in this swing seat. We’re aiming to raise $20,000 in online donations by the end of March to not get drowned out by the forces of hate. If we meet our quarterly goals, our FEC numbers will send a clear message about the strength behind our movement. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, \- Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

name: Becca Balint
subject: Elon Musk called Social Security a Ponzi scheme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104074342/534193112/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNlNmM3NS0xODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibGxZdV8qZ1qaAWRQLDFzT24apCvLa562GtCiyKGmtA=)

Peter, Social Security and Medicare are a lifeline for so many Americans – my neighbors, my parents, and our communities depend on it. And Donald Trump promised to leave Medicare and Social Security untouched. When Elon Musk claimed otherwise — even calling Social Security _a Ponzi scheme and “the big one” to eliminate_ — Trump was forced to backtrack. Social Security is NOT a Ponzi scheme. It’s a commitment to ensure our elders can retire with dignity. Millions of veterans and seniors depend on these programs, and over the next two years, the Social Security disability backlog is expected to grow by 2.5 million more people. And we see right through it. Republicans aren't after these programs because of "fraud" or "waste." They're after Social Security and Medicare because it's the only way they can pay for tax cuts that will overwhelmingly benefit the rich and powerful. People like... Elon Musk and Donald Trump. These cuts are unfathomable to the folks who depend on these programs. I’m sick of the GOP playing games with people’s lives. And I know you are you too. **[If you can fuel that fight with a donation of any amount, I’d be extremely grateful.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104074346/534193117/-856240149?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNlNmM3NS0xODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibGxZdV8qZ1qaAWRQLDFzT24apCvLa562GtCiyKGmtA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104074350/534193121/-856240149?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWNlNmM3NS0xODA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibGxZdV8qZ1qaAWRQLDFzT24apCvLa562GtCiyKGmtA=)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: ACTION NEEDED: 2025 Spring Survey
body:
Fellow American, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country. |

I go to work every day to fight for _**YOU**_ , Fellow American!

My constituents and supporters are the first and last thing on my mind daily. Today, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country.

**I created the 2025 Spring Survey to do just that. Here is a quick preview of the questions:**

clean_body: Fellow American, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country. | I go to work every day to fight for YOU , Fellow American! My constituents and supporters are the first and last thing on my mind daily. Today, I wanted to take a moment to hear your thoughts, feedback, and ideas about how we can improve your life and our country. I created the 2025 Spring Survey to do just that. Here is a quick preview of the questions: What issues do you think the U.S. Senate should be prioritizing right now? How important is it to you that Donald Trump has a Senate he can count on for his entire term as President? How would you evaluate the job performance of our Republican majority in the U.S. Senate so far? | I hope you will take a moment to complete this survey - your feedback is very important to me. Thank you, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | - We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

Look, you know Trump is unhinged, but look at what exactly he's done in just his first weeks:
1. Threatened to invade THREE different countries.

2. Threatened to annex Canada and make it the 51st state.

3. Slapped 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

4. Worked to dismantle USAID's critical work across the world.

5. Attacked the State Department's work on human rights around the world.

6. Paused crucial military aid to Ukraine after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy spoke up against Trump and Vance lies and bully tactics at the White House

_Trump 's careless antics are absolutely destroying America's reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!_

We think that Donald Trump is the **WORST** Commander-in-Chief we've seen in modern history.

But, we have no clue what Democrats in your area think?!

name: James Comer
subject: I’m not Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
or President Trump

| | | | |
---
Friend, it’s me, James Comer.
I know you’re probably getting a lot of emails and text messages from folks pretending to be Elon Musk or President Trump.
I’ve never done that to you, and I never will.
**_Call me old fashioned, but in my house, the truth matters._**
I sign my name on everything I send out because I’m proud of my record of holding the Biden Crime Family, the corrupt bureaucrats, and the out of control Deep State accountable for their actions.
**You probably remember when I sent criminal referrals to the Department of Justice for Hunter Biden and his uncle Jim Biden...** _as it turns out I was right all along, and in the midnight hour of Joe Biden’s failed presidency he gave them blanket pardons to absolve them of their many crimes against our country._
**You probably remember when I discovered massive amounts of fraud, waste, and corruption in the federal bureaucracy...** _only to have Democrats in the Senate and White House cover it up and smear me for speaking out._
Well, now that Republicans are in charge of the White House and both chambers of Congress, _**[there is nothing stopping my crusade against corruption from cleaning up the mess the Democrats left us in Washington](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSy/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
As you would expect, this isn’t just ruffling some feathers, it is causing a catastrophic crisis for corrupt bureaucrats and their government funded cronies in the private sector.
**This threatens the very existence of their decades long grift of the American people, and they will do and say whatever they think they need to in order to keep the gravy train going.**
[JOIN THE FIGHT](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSy/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
You gave us a mandate in November, and I’m working overtime to get the job done, but with the unhinged attacks from the Left causing constant interference, I’m asking you to stand with me today.
**_[Your support is so important, and I personally thank you for your commitment to saving this country](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSy/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_Truthfully,_
James ComerChairman, House Oversight Committee
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/abSy/?__vbtrk=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgwNjAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

Peter, unelected billionaires and far-right extremists in Washington have gone too far: They're coming for Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid – lifelines that Americans pay into their entire lives so they can retire with dignity.
Just in the last week, Elon Musk called federal entitlements “the big one to eliminate.” And now, this administration wants to fire staff at the Social Security Administration while pushing misleading claims about this critical program.
**The reality is this: They aren't doing this to make the government "more efficient" – they're doing it to pass a tax cut for the ultra-wealthy. **
Let's be clear: Social Security is not a handout and it most certainly is not a "Ponzi scheme." It’s a promise – a program that keeps 22 million Americans out of poverty, including seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.

**_Letitia James will not stand by while they try to dismantle Social Security._**

clean_body: Letitia James will not stand by while they try to dismantle Social Security. | | | = NEWS ALERT: Elon Musk Targets Social Security – Calling It a "Ponzi Scheme" = = | | = | Peter, unelected billionaires and far-right extremists in Washington have gone too far: They're coming for Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid – lifelines that Americans pay into their entire lives so they can retire with dignity. Just in the last week, Elon Musk called federal entitlements “the big one to eliminate.” And now, this administration wants to fire staff at the Social Security Administration while pushing misleading claims about this critical program. The reality is this: They aren't doing this to make the government "more efficient" – they're doing it to pass a tax cut for the ultra-wealthy. Let's be clear: Social Security is not a handout and it most certainly is not a "Ponzi scheme." It’s a promise – a program that keeps 22 million Americans out of poverty, including seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities. | | Donald Trump has started his second term by sending a non-stop parade of dangerous, unqualified nominees before the Senate. The latest is Trump's pick to head up Medicare and Medicaid, Dr. Mehmet Oz. Dr. Oz is a snake oil salesman. For years, he used his popular TV show to uplift for-profit grifters and wellness pseudoscience. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104077106/534199805/-2044921950?refcode=2025-03-18-oz&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=8973b0d2-1b04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTczYjBkMi0xYjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5fHBx_l1FuN7QdIn7yRpuQSEnVRGDp2gLG9QRiCS5A=) Last week, when pressed during a Congressional hearing, Dr. Oz made it clear he's all in on the Republican plan to remove nurses from nursing homes. You read that right: the person nominated to head up the major federal health programs that cover a majority of nursing home beds doesn't think nursing homes need nurses. He doesn't think your mom needs a real nurse to help her get to the bathroom. Or a real nurse to bring your grandpa his meals and chat with him in the evenings. Throughout his career, Dr. Oz has been a good friend to for-profit insurance companies. His answers at last week's hearing indicate he will be a rubber stamp for Trump and Musk's plans to privatize the health care millions of Americans rely on and hand the keys over to private equity firms that will turn the simple act of making a doctor's appointment into an Olympic sport. I've been pressing Trump's nominees from day one about how their plans will hurt families in Oregon and across the country, and I'm not backing down. [**Will you help me keep up the fight by donating $3? Your support helps power our grassroots movement to win more seats and hold Trump and his cronies accountable. name: Rick Larsen
subject: A trail of broken promises and increased prices
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Earlier this month, the President gave a joint address to Congress. Once again, it was a speech filled with lies, misinformation, and disinformation.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104077649/534201166/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzI1NGM4NS0xYzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUImFTINW2kv5Yu45o8BR9ZjevF4LMPHr92Yg8VpbFc=&emci=d6ff3f6f-e1fd-ef11-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=b7254c85-1c04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Earlier this month, the President gave a joint address to Congress. Once again, it was a speech filled with lies, misinformation, and disinformation.** Further, the speech lacked a plan for how he would help lower costs for working Americans. In fact, in a 100-minute speech, he spent less than two minutes talking about the skyrocketing costs that working families are facing. [**This President without a plan is hurting Northwest Washington, and we need to make sure he knows we do not accept his broken promises. Once again, it was a speech filled with lies, misinformation, and disinformation. | | | | Earlier this month, the President gave a joint address to Congress. Once again, it was a speech filled with lies, misinformation, and disinformation. Further, the speech lacked a plan for how he would help lower costs for working Americans. In fact, in a 100-minute speech, he spent less than two minutes talking about the skyrocketing costs that working families are facing. = = President Trump promised to lower costs for the average American family, and he has not followed through. Instead, he has left us with broken promises and strained budgets. In Northwest Washington, I see and hear your concern. We have seen gas prices increase 12% in the 57 days since Inauguration Day. Additionally, egg prices continue to increase. Now, Trump plans to impose tariffs on Canada and Mexico. These Trump tariffs will directly and dramatically raise the cost of food, gas, and manufactured goods in the Pacific Northwest. In response, I supported a resolution that Representative Gregory Meeks from New York introduced to limit President Trump and his unconstitutional "claimed authority." This includes the authority he claims to have to indiscriminately raise tariffs and raise the prices of goods you purchase every day. During the political chaos and confusion of the Trump presidency, I remain focused on defending our values, listening to you, and improving the lives of Northwest Washingtonians. body:
I am sorry some folks don’t even thank you for donating.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.
| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e0fda4d9bbc43739b2fca3798a4a9d3&_e=awGMY3I9du_MDk4qUA4oh-xlT3ec3aj4BRMe3ITeuwiblbRIGQVqMgIRpXSoDouTKG6-rLND3uLsuQoIMNFL3gmdRclQ7IS_s46BV1cel6oP8n69jo1ImmFzkPHwSMqcUjBMAKpg_m01oOvg83OOTL7eiinyGrN9W0XUI9KlOEpxqC-vmDR_X-ET41swiH2oA06Ec6Mel76E9mDU3tvb-aW99-i-FtJJF9wW4WJ-YJxb4sNBanpn_I5SnoFOCa3idvKz4NyeZPObaafJ25s3hXJ9rCjRFAM88g98MP33pDPwFE7coL5aLXJL3wFLwCrN7gSnIBX2NE1JCM6E93tumkVJ41rzGkV3XiaGBiqLvlZ0jkbQE1WHzoEv_z33sQyHHlxxJkopeZObHr0r1AlnlQ%3D%3D "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.

_**[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e0fda4d9bbc43739b2fca3798a4a9d3&_e=awGMY3I9du_MDk4qUA4oh-xlT3ec3aj4BRMe3ITeuwiblbRIGQVqMgIRpXSoDouTKG6-rLND3uLsuQoIMNFL3gmdRclQ7IS_s46BV1cel6oP8n69jo1ImmFzkPHwSMqcUjBMAKpg_m01oOvg83OOTL7eiinyGrN9W0XUI9KlOEpxqC-vmDR_X-ET41swiH2oA06Ec6Mel76E9mDU3tvb-aW99-i-FtJJF9wW4WJ-YJxb4sNBanpn_I5SnoFOCa3iUyHIczMJIcYq_zmvYIe8sdPBLK_wE6sVDDp073fFsQBQk_-PnsG3xmbhulLiXmxsTOCw0ltA4HbCcIiMSfmdiQeEIgmpYDWmVOLQPVECv7FDNgEdnoDpKEYyjME_HBFvMWbqOjT0iNM4OyFSEHygKA%3D%3D "In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.")**_

_If you can 't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating. _

BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.

Our first quarterly deadline is this month, which means we have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.

_**[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final March deadline?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e0fda4d9bbc43739b2fca3798a4a9d3&_e=awGMY3I9du_MDk4qUA4oh-xlT3ec3aj4BRMe3ITeuwiblbRIGQVqMgIRpXSoDouTKG6-rLND3uLsuQoIMNFL3gmdRclQ7IS_s46BV1cel6oP8n69jo1ImmFzkPHwSMqcUjBMAKpg_m01oOvg83OOTL7eiinyGrN9W0XUI9KlOEpxqC-vmDR_X-ET41swiH2oA06Ec6Mel76E9mDU3tvb-aW99-i-FtJJF9wW4WJ-YJxb4sNBanpn_I5SnoFOCa3iyr4j-YBMm975s-VmZONRA8F_vSlFjZPuBSN4fIRqyra2qfATwyM4vE44FZr2habu8ckEAlGKVDc0IMkbjgpTlr_2ZP9ITcoMPKvEs7MU58L8ZHv_7lGZ9xFnjvF1zr9XaLiAO_y2LfZ1oXLzUUJD6Q%3D%3D "So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our final February deadline?")**_

It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.
| | [IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e0fda4d9bbc43739b2fca3798a4a9d3&_e=awGMY3I9du_MDk4qUA4oh-xlT3ec3aj4BRMe3ITeuwiblbRIGQVqMgIRpXSoDouTKG6-rLND3uLsuQoIMNFL3gmdRclQ7IS_s46BV1cel6oP8n69jo1ImmFzkPHwSMqcUjBMAKpg_m01oOvg83OOTL7eiinyGrN9W0XUI9KlOEpxqC-vmDR_X-ET41swiH2oA06Ec6Mel76E9mDU3tvb-aW99-i-FtJJF9wW4WJ-YJxb4sNBanpn_I5SnoFOCa3iarU_LrtKLhWqA33xN9g50iEVrxMzb1LyEexDs7p-vT_HD-cHnJLEgexBIeMHgo7kBdyuAU9HuiSAxahSEJ2fW7_01TBb32jVxmN0beLc-q_4U4JD4FebsUcvL8btADoX-dZ_3m5mddtDk2y46K6Thw%3D%3D "IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE")
---

Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

body:
This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104078033/534201931/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU2OWQzNS0xZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nNaE0YqSouVHseSIKUokpuokahYn5QIs2H_RPljG_7M=&emci=c806a4b9-1304-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c1569d35-1d04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)

Team, I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. **This year, the stakes are just as high.** **Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.** _We can't let them win._ We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got. **[Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and Martin Heinrich? Your support is critical if we want Susan to win this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104078037/534201942/770581358?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU2OWQzNS0xZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nNaE0YqSouVHseSIKUokpuokahYn5QIs2H_RPljG_7M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Judge Susan Crawford and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104078041/534201947/770581358?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTU2OWQzNS0xZDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nNaE0YqSouVHseSIKUokpuokahYn5QIs2H_RPljG_7M=)

clean_body: This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it. Team, I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. This year, the stakes are just as high. Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court. We can't let them win. Friend,
---
I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart.

For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York...
---
...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe.
---
_...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable._
---
**But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up __these__ headlines:**
---
**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_ **
[Source: _MSNBC_]
**“In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” **
[Source: _The New Republic_]
**“...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” **
[Source: _Law & Crime News_]
---
I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President.
---
You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – _yours truly._
---
**__And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!__**
---
Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus __state-level__ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely **ABANDONED** , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life.
---
But here’s what the Left will never understand... _America First fighters _NEVER_ _SURRENDER_ , and we _NEVER_ _ABANDON_ our fellow patriots._
---
When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757.**

clean_body: The Democrat pros The Democrat prosecutors want me to feel alone, but what they don’t realize is... | Friend, I know I’ve written a lot here, but it’s my hope that you’ll spare just a moment to read all that I have to say, because it’s entirely from the heart. For the better part of my life, there was a time when I read the paper in the morning and saw headlines about me taking down the mob in New York... ...About keeping our streets and our citizens safe. ...About successfully defending President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable. But for the past 12 months now, I’ve been forced to wake up these headlines: “Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...” [Source: MSNBC] “In Delicious Twist, Rudy Giuliani Is at Risk of Losing All His Assets” [Source: The New Republic] “...federal judge in Washington, D.C., threatened [Giuliani] with severe sanctions and possible ‘imprisonment’” [Source: Law & Crime News] I’ll be frank, I always knew the price I could one day pay for standing by the truth and the side of my dear friend, our 45th and 47th President. You see, no matter how hard they tried, the Left couldn’t stop Donald J. Trump and the America First movement, so they decided to settle for personally, professionally, and financially DESTROYING his former attorney – yours truly. And now, if the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be locked away in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! Make no mistake, these leftist thugs know exactly what they’re plotting. Their case against me involves bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. And with my case already scheduled to go to trial, the Democrats’ goal is simple but nevertheless sinister. They want me to feel completely ABANDONED , completely hopeless, as I prepare to defend myself in what is no doubt the trial of my life. But here’s what the Left will never understand... America First fighters NEVER SURRENDER , and we NEVER ABANDON our fellow patriots. When I was first wrongfully arrested and booked by the Democrats in one of the most violent jails in America, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757. They had hoped that on that day I would also feel abandoned and isolated. But today, just like on the day I was arrested, I KNOW I’m not alone! Which is why I fully intend to give my booking number a whole new meaning – 2,313,757 PATRIOTS who joined the fight for my freedom and justice! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: BREAKING (protectvoting.org)
subject: re: Hakeem Jeffries’ CALL TO ACTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sign on now! >>
| **_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”** Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88272?t=6&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88272?t=7&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88272?t=8&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in special elections and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88272?t=9&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88272?t=10&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88272?t=11&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19321%2E878179%2ElEak9D)

clean_body: The DECLARATION will remind ALL elected leaders in Washington about the MANDATE delivered by the American people on Election Day. | Fellow American, The DECLARATION will remind ALL elected leaders in Washington about the MANDATE delivered by the American people on Election Day. It will serve to hold their feet to the fire to carry out the will of the voter. President Trump has wasted no time executing the Conservative Mandate delivered to us by the voters. Reversing Joe Biden’s 4 years of WOKE, RADICAL, LEFT-WING policies: ❌ An open & bleeding border ❌ Budget-crippling inflation ❌ Disgusting woke nonsense in our schools ❌ Shameless lawfare to keep Trump out of office (THEY FAILED!) I’ll stop there, as it would take too long to list every single blow to America’s greatness over the past 4 years. When I was elected by my colleagues in 2022 to be the Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), I was given one monumental task: Take back the Senate for Conservatives in 2024. I am proud to say that during my tenure as NRSC Chairman, 4 STRONG Conservative candidates were able to flip Democrat seats in Montana, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia! I learned one thing during my tenure as NRSC Chairman, Conservatives ONLY win when we go on a FULL-FRONTAL, NO HOLDS BARRED ASSAULT with a COMMON-SENSE winning agenda. The mandate DEMANDS that our leaders in Washington D.C. vote for an agenda that will: ✅ SEAL THE BORDER FOR GOOD: Build the wall. Deport the illegals. Cut off the fentanyl. STOP the bleeding. ✅ HONOR FAMILY VALUES: Remove the woke bureaucrats. Protect the unborn. Honor the family! ✅ REVERSE INFLATION: Lower healthcare costs. Make gas cheap again. Affordable eggs and milk for every family. ✅ RESTORE ENERGY INDEPENDENCE: Build the pipelines. Stop buying oil from hostile nations. Cut the red tape. ✅ SLASH THE BUREAUCRACY: Slash regulations. Gut the agencies. Stop the unelected rulemaking. Restore constitutional order! It is crystal clear what Conservatives must accomplish over the next four years. But, as we’ve seen time and time again... too many of our elected leaders wilt in the face of any political resistance and betray the will of the voters. It’s your official message to ALL ELECTED LEADERS in Washington that the America voters have MANDATED that we peel back the Radical Progressive disasters of the past four years under the hapless "leadership" of President Joe Biden. Finally, I’m up for reelection in just over 1.5 years. And this last election earned me a HUGE target on my back. Democrats are foaming at the mouth to take out the Chairman of the NRSC who ousted their Senate Majority. Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT), my newly-elected fellow Montana Senator, saw $178 MILLION spent by the opposition to make sure he lost. Sheehy was outspent by $68 MILLION, yet he still won thanks to the grassroots’ dedication to his victory. The great country you and I love so much is under attack. We cannot afford to have any Conservative sitting on the sideline during this critical political moment. Putting America First, U.S. Senator Steve Daines (R-MT) Former Chairman of the NRSC Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Which is it? Because now we have egg rationing under Donald Trump. Prices are skyrocketing. People are hurting. The corporate stranglehold over our economy is ripping us all off. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The Wisconsin Supreme Court race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This race is going to be close, and our rights and freedoms depend on it.

| Team, I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen—and it all came down to just a few votes. **This year, the stakes are just as high.** **Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in—making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.** _We can't let them win._ We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got. **[Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC? Your support is critical if we want Susan to win this race.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104079702/534206819/1742364266?refcode=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNThmNDA3LTIwMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4_oJdX_-x8P_kComlANcB3a1t7zqhm_KDBrei0cxFIs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**SPLIT $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104079703/534206820/1742364266?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNThmNDA3LTIwMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4_oJdX_-x8P_kComlANcB3a1t7zqhm_KDBrei0cxFIs=) | [**SPLIT $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104079704/534206821/1742364266?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNThmNDA3LTIwMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4_oJdX_-x8P_kComlANcB3a1t7zqhm_KDBrei0cxFIs=)

Reproductive rights, funding for public education, voting rights, and so much more is on the line in this race. It’s already clear that this will not only be one of the closest races in the country, but it will also be the biggest race of 2025—and we know that every dollar makes a difference.
If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent.
**[I hope you’ll join me in supporting Susan Crawford for Wisconsin Supreme Court by splitting a donation with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. If you can, chip in $5, $10, or whatever you’re able to help keep our progressive majority.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104079713/534206829/1742364266?refcode=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.7258f407-2004-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyNThmNDA3LTIwMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4_oJdX_-x8P_kComlANcB3a1t7zqhm_KDBrei0cxFIs=)**

Tammy

body:

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/eK2wH7qvdeNzG9S9tE8fqLNtWy0YZ-lBlwoRS-dT3X5TyZNJnhDER8hqkCsp9KfIkQVA8cz5r2k_RnWSoIPjNvF9Jut22WDTp4ldXlcPtC7wi1kszD7Jjv8CVqXjmJdkxzlJMVMwGT0yM_YAwY-QfCIieFnUrT4NZ8ySwussBr6b9kEUpqj_WpIuN0Z_yQ_1-DTExVDFu8aTWK5I5Igj5EZET7MsBCv4_vtHPz_Q89tsBybLAucbw3AVu1Q9X6oI4_z6aRMjKZKeLz-3QciinpdwkRuvxR_sVcK8JsLpWN2E9qizyyiNZiUDx15nQU2c31mu1njgQc-IQSwRwQbY1upok8T8a-ckjqPEbNIZOrwkcW6AL4cfQUiePZKU_VUCqonKLqeNdxrq1Qoo9qUcrNeaao42WTcvccZVBcTZ7nVc1qw/7QJN4eJWjc-ZRAMU6nYbjTbCoNCUA0dq/7)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/06qs68UB_EkYHFPmZWWSRNoGarZ5qqFrz_diwuyxpuelryjjK07C896fdRnDEoljBkdhyphxwYbZ5Nl61zPSE4IKYH9fTWmtZkEWja4T5SlQeoYHHh1iwisK3E3tmNGGVhUgbbt5lwC4ggStUAa1ErkKUiXwuaMq9udDpgdOVY7seX_omm9AwVF3mWA8koJk00-cJ5QWhJPIrOltSXbAu-eR65mxr_75qBGnxx-MMydmxONFyRQAx1Tv6aQNA4g8dMMNaoBnZFF_WE3meKecIyA-QmyN1h8l0Jv50TYnourvnToLqyDg-kg1V_yetfOtCfk7fKfyKjEt4sFwuocr9y4x1_wAblDwx-6Sq-ZQNY6fcclF3lNwzpiw-F0gWRv_V3Z5M5MtPzLc3lZr8NjvHhIqE2RRgX8zP5Fv8I8qgR0FtQo/UK8JOu4VHBsdRx5EEQs8Uo__39DCueof/7)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Jay Jones
subject: Trump can’t hide the truth, team
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]

Team, it’s Jay Jones, a Democrat running for Virginia Attorney General.

Access to information is one of the key pillars of a thriving democracy. It’s critical that we have the right to know what our leaders are doing so we can hold them accountable.

But Donald Trump is trying to let unelected billionaire Elon Musk and his ridiculous “Department of Government Efficiency” get away with gutting our government without oversight.

He’s given DOGE a special designation that’s designed to shield it from public records requests so the American people can’t inform themselves about the true scope of spending cuts and the impact DOGE will have on our economy and government agencies.

This lack of accountability is dangerous to our democracy, team.

A group of Attorneys General have filed a crucial lawsuit trying to limit Elon Musk’s outsized influence on our country. This lawsuit says he is acting in a position with so much authority that it requires Congressional creation and approval – and if it’s successful, this will be a major blow to Trump’s subversion of our democracy.

But Virginia’s current MAGA-aligned Attorney General, Jason Miyares, didn’t join the lawsuit to stand up to Elon Musk and Donald Trump. It’s clear that he won’t stand up for Virginians being impacted by DOGE’s unjust budget cuts and federal layoffs.

I am running to be Virginia’s Attorney General so that I can stand up for Virginians – and all Americans – against Musk’s attacks on our institutions. If you’re with me, can you make a special donation to help me defeat Jason Miyares? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=15]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=50]

DONATE $200 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=200]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Thank you,
Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: At-home “trick” boosts brain oxygen by 1,000%
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
-------------------------

In 1929, America's top hospitals discovered a gem...

They found oxygen helped fight against more than 114 different
diseases.

After that, oxygen was extensively used...

Until the FDA stepped in.

They deemed oxygen of having "no medical use".

Even today, 91 years later, the FDA's ban still holds.

But that hasn't stopped researchers from fulfilling their Hippocratic
oath...

Doing everything to save patient's lives.

And now, they've found a way to help you maintain good health using
your body's own oxygen.

This "trick" boosts brain oxygen by 1,000%.

Helping everything from age-related memory loss and more.

Without the need for prescriptions, surgeries, or doctor visits.

It can be done from the comfort of your living room couch.

CLICK HERE TO SEE HOW OXYGEN COULD HELP YOU
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/716110468cb247a3ba6cb991e16ac844-011852952a5b47eeb4f9f13167f0a5b7/63].

To Your Good Health,

[Al Sears, MD]

Al Sears, MD, CNS

DCDailyJournal.com

body:

There are only 13 days left in our journey to make a real difference, and every moment is precious. I’m reaching out not just as a candidate, but as someone who believes in the power of our community to uplift one another and work together for a brighter future. I need your support now more than ever.
For me, this isn’t about party lines —it’s about the cause we all care about. Over the past months, I’ve dedicated myself to fighting for:
Stronger Public Services: Ensuring our schools, healthcare, and community services receive the support they deserve.
Economic Opportunity: Advocating for policies that create fair chances for every family to succeed.
Equal Justice and Dignity: Standing up for every person’s right to be heard, respected, and treated with fairness.
As we count down these final 13 days, I invite you to stand with me and help fuel our movement. Your support, whether it’s a donation or simply sharing our message, makes all the difference.
Please consider chipping in $10 today to keep our momentum going strong. Every contribution—no matter how small—brings us one step closer to creating the future our community deserves. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Just weeks away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo
WPR: Group tied to Elon Musk investing in Wisconsin ahead of Supreme Court race
Team: On April 1, Wisconsin voters will decide between progressive Dane County Circuit Court Judge Susan Crawford and conservative former Attorney General Brad Schimel in a race that will determine the ideological balance of the court.
Why is this election important? Wisconsin's Supreme Court elections are nonpartisan, but the ideological balance of the court has widespread ramifications for voting rights, civil rights, and a slew of other state policy implications. State Supreme Courts like this one are also often the final arbiters of election disputes, as we saw in both the 2020 and 2022 elections.
In 2023 progressive judge Janet Protasiewicz won a similar race and flipped the balance of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, giving the state a 4-3 pro-voting rights majority. The outcome of this year's election will determine whether Wisconsin holds that liberal majority moving forward or if the court slides back to the suppressive policies of Wisconsin's past.
Now, news has broken that a political action committee backed by billionaire Elon Musk has scheduled hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of TV ads in Wisconsin. Given everything going on, we can all guess which candidate these ads from the Musk-backed "Building America’s Future" group are going to support.
Team: Turnout is key and we have to get the word out in Wisconsin to make sure every defender of voting rights gets to the polls. Help supercharge our efforts with $25 or whatever you can right now to defend a state Supreme Court that protects voting rights >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo WPR: Group tied to Elon Musk investing in Wisconsin ahead of Supreme Court race Team: On April 1, Wisconsin voters will decide between progressive Dane County Circuit Court Judge Susan Crawford and conservative former Attorney General Brad Schimel in a race that will determine the ideological balance of the court. Why is this election important? Wisconsin's Supreme Court elections are nonpartisan, but the ideological balance of the court has widespread ramifications for voting rights, civil rights, and a slew of other state policy implications. State Supreme Courts like this one are also often the final arbiters of election disputes, as we saw in both the 2020 and 2022 elections. In 2023 progressive judge Janet Protasiewicz won a similar race and flipped the balance of the Wisconsin Supreme Court, giving the state a 4-3 pro-voting rights majority. The outcome of this year's election will determine whether Wisconsin holds that liberal majority moving forward or if the court slides back to the suppressive policies of Wisconsin's past. Now, news has broken that a political action committee backed by billionaire Elon Musk has scheduled hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of TV ads in Wisconsin. Given everything going on, we can all guess which candidate these ads from the Musk-backed "Building America’s Future" group are going to support. Team: Turnout is key and we have to get the word out in Wisconsin to make sure every defender of voting rights gets to the polls. Help supercharge our efforts with $25 or whatever you can right now to defend a state Supreme Court that protects voting rights >> [] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] Other Amount [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: Marine Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’ve lived a full, rewarding life – and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=de7ca0cfb97046fea30fb4764bb0c880&_e=H1zBjDcZICtnsGHZQJUoEgKxWTgi7HQdsh8sM9nxzK0nycexczUY2-YKKfS3Vq77VlgL5t2s5s5sjC0GHC5fT1F2YYrgc1mei5R255VcW_fwUtBFfvsgK5XaMyLXerVreUGEeAywtfIgraxFuZcTsXxDB9RsFIl48FIQfQjUC9FU9o8GD3V4cnzf_yRK-D0UjPKpXZpWmEiKV4RGTK6J6J2wNYxZj3M5a-bBsNCXEvH8pjBG7CDhlmUfMXcB8I_2EfMky0M1xFhg4UmmfSLuMdNeJj3ulA25dhqskppP-cPp2VCv7E0M1Y2EIA85X8m2fU5qvPo2zEQ-87kjlgYUROb50_1sHvZja_NtGzZ1dcKXdim9xn-D_wCFGaW1pbT0cngZM6S_QzOb2UxootClyHeX3VELuC7IO6GC6JJh1Kw%3D)
---
**Semper Fi._Always faithful._** I often get asked, _" Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?"_
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=de7ca0cfb97046fea30fb4764bb0c880&_e=H1zBjDcZICtnsGHZQJUoEgKxWTgi7HQdsh8sM9nxzK0nycexczUY2-YKKfS3Vq77VlgL5t2s5s5sjC0GHC5fT1F2YYrgc1mei5R255VcW_fwUtBFfvsgK5XaMyLXerVreUGEeAywtfIgraxFuZcTsXxDB9RsFIl48FIQfQjUC9FU9o8GD3V4cnzf_yRK-D0UjPKpXZpWmEiKV4RGTK6J6J2wNYxZj3M5a-bBsNCXEvH8pjBG7CDhlmUfMXcB8I_24MvvlHvSdnleH9CkNQIsBKq-ftGm4Yl1T20r_5OjXm5ZBZVD4Gbn77sRPnIreBW0coxLsQeSPEUciRTWFs2fTsmQVRWNY88fEZ-w5RjctT4-8rkcLTlTDrC-SboiPY_GkUlg8PfP8TylwKtkkYvwiwePAbykVBySviDrE32U5ws%3D)
---
And to that, I say **absolutely.** Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, **and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:**-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old.
-I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician.
-I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: _**my story is only possible in America.**_ And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.

_But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children._**Not on my watch. ** _**[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today--even if it's just a few bucks--to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=de7ca0cfb97046fea30fb4764bb0c880&_e=H1zBjDcZICtnsGHZQJUoEgKxWTgi7HQdsh8sM9nxzK0nycexczUY2-YKKfS3Vq77VlgL5t2s5s5sjC0GHC5fT1F2YYrgc1mei5R255VcW_fwUtBFfvsgK5XaMyLXerVreUGEeAywtfIgraxFuZcTsXxDB9RsFIl48FIQfQjUC9FU9o8GD3V4cnzf_yRK-D0UjPKpXZpWmEiKV4RGTK6J6J2wNYxZj3M5a-bBsNCXEvH8pjBG7CDhlmUfMXcB8I_2FT4LwkjKCkjG5ytawrJB5ptgUB9_8BiC2AwoAa0SOcpbswuCSTDNclVbxj2Yjsy97lbujtuEtvqzgyWSx8yqsaTxuIYpcO0uUlDc45BcStr4HDcHELX5k7OGPP5y8kMeHoxdQ5LWCWM-gNuGewvcLY7HwU7spOUuOEkct5UHedo%3D)**_

subject: EMILYs List endorsed Nellie!
body:
This is big, friend

| |
---
Team, Big news: EMILYs List endorsed Nellie for re-election in her Frontline race! **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104081951/534214022/-200729754?amp;refcode=250318_tp_emilyslist_img&ms=250318_tp_emilyslist&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE1MDM5YzQtMjQwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jasIIIs1mKVMVKeMZ9fRpIFOfvWpkdJz1p-tjLtLOLw=)** Racking up key endorsements early is important because Nellie is in one of the most difficult races in the country. Our team wouldn't be bugging you so much about the unless it was critically important to our country's future. Senate Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to support President Trump's agenda and Make America Great Again, but without your cooperation, it could be all for naught. [Watch video](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082015/534214203/-1764445545?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)

Redwoods revival
[Post-fire Big Basin a “forest of hope”](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082017/534214205/-775230010?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
Nearly five years after fires ravaged this beloved state park, the redwoods have sprung back with stunning beauty. Visitors will find tall trees, green undergrowth, uncrowded trails, and a role model for resilience.
[See more](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082018/534214206/-775230010?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)

Our annual redwoods celebration returns to Golden Gate Park for an unforgettable evening of dining, dancing, and connecting with fellow redwood fans—all while raising funds to protect and restore magnificent forests under threat.

[Early spring blooms we love](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082023/534214211/1771369493?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)

[Explore the flora](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082024/534214212/1771369493?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)

[**@savetheredwoods**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082028/534214324/20471953?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551) 💚 Caring for public lands is a shared effort, made possible by dedicated people doing essential work. Protecting our redwood forests—and public lands—takes all of us.

❌ That’s why recent funding cuts and layoffs in the National Park Service, Bureau of Land Management, and U.S. Forest Service hit hard. These individuals protect our forests, restore ecosystems, and help millions experience the beauty of our parks. Their absence will be deeply felt. 🌲

📣We stand with our federal partners in protecting these landscapes for future generations.

➡️ You can help by speaking up for public lands. Let your representatives know that these places—and the people who care for them—matter.

👇Find your representatives:
🔗**[Search here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104082029/534214325/2127295227?utm_campaign=rm-2025-03&utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyM2NiZWNhLTI0MDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HYhpPHeVcPIGy7swfD5eSoff2zhpBm8uA_i5iQC2edI=&emci=8b9c733e-7d00-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d23cbeca-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)**

clean_body: Redwood Matters: News and stories from the League | March 18, 2025 | Let it grow Zachary Noah Piser journeyed from the Bay Area to the Broadway stage, where he now joins Idina Menzel in the original musical Redwood. He spoke with the League about his love for the forest and the importance of “repairing the world.” Redwoods revival Nearly five years after fires ravaged this beloved state park, the redwoods have sprung back with stunning beauty. Visitors will find tall trees, green undergrowth, uncrowded trails, and a role model for resilience. Mark your calendars Our annual redwoods celebration returns to Golden Gate Park for an unforgettable evening of dining, dancing, and connecting with fellow redwood fans—all while raising funds to protect and restore magnificent forests under threat. Flower power From brightly hued Calypso orchids to delicate white milkmaids, early spring flowers are already beginning to unfurl in the redwood forest. Check out 8 of our favorites and start planning your next wildflower walk. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- | | ---|--- 💚 Caring for public lands is a shared effort, made possible by dedicated people doing essential work. Protecting our redwood forests—and public lands—takes all of us. ❌ That’s why recent funding cuts and layoffs in the National Park Service, Bureau of Land Management, and U.S. Forest Service hit hard. These individuals protect our forests, restore ecosystems, and help millions experience the beauty of our parks. Their absence will be deeply felt. 🌲 📣We stand with our federal partners in protecting these landscapes for future generations. ➡️ You can help by speaking up for public lands. Let your representatives know that these places—and the people who care for them—matter. 👇Find your representatives: 🔗 📷 Credits: Max Forster, @maxforsterphotography THE LEAGUE IN THE NEWS PUNCH The Mercury News Support our work Connect with us | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

Under Trump's leadership, the Social Security Administration just announced its intent to eliminate 7,000 jobs, **a move that could delay the delivery of Social Security benefits to _millions of Americans._**

**The impact of these attacks could be catastrophic.** Studies show that 42% of Americans aged 65 and older would not be able to afford basic necessities like food, housing, or clothing without Social Security benefits.

We cannot allow Trump, Musk, and their Republican allies to dismantle this crucial program that delivers earned benefits to millions of Americans.

**[New Dems are taking action NOW to protect the benefits that so many hardworking Americans depend on – can you join us by signing our “Save Social Security” petition now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082191/534214783/485427744?refcode=NDCAF_20250318_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTBmMDllMi0yNDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uy-lQq8y3BqDNV3-RnFG2SD0Nx75TbCQEpUuDufWLXE=&emci=7a97f22e-1104-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7e0f09e2-2404-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)**

name: =?UTF-8?Q?This_is_Steve_Scalise_=E2=80=93?=
subject: I’m sorry. Really, I am.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.
| |
---
| | | I am genuinely sorry, Friend.

Really, I am.

I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.

I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.

I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.

_It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages._

**This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you 've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. _[You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement- and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=14055197a8a54d639e7bb1475ecdeefc&_e=r-8leLxlOvcGzzVlKMbBz6p3uUOI7-ggCXCJX9B7O2nOfCb-RU-lMOl0fh0Tb5lDU7k6KXfxNZOo5L9olphq_g0mfY3yaFA0vBaLWH8bgocyH2fsiIdhqt5lsrJh8v4enVMAh8bGwCR_5Xexyxz2L813_U9nmygIYDtOfTq1clVcLtDNpDjUWdPMC1b0vcs31yS22x5sw5Luap3Sa596chpdseO2PN8gqu0WWt9VvncJdNCt7EbREU11boJFNtM_DiLshTLZLKnNo6UQP-f_olJ3Nfdz0ewArExdw2FmX2SauOYqk8zxTyXw6m_oz9i4_yw5P3XabSQa412jKpfcQQw9CBYkqaK3DTcZuw0_4oHG5fIFwZ0w5zqQzASXalkMJTPH5mnVAQxk5y4Rl9_zjw%3D%3D "You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement – and we only won with your hard work and support.")_ **

Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.

Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.

They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They've ALREADY tried delaying GOP victories by postponing elections. And they're ALREADY dragging President Trump and Elon Musk into court.
