name: Justice Democrats
subject: This administration is blatantly ignoring checks and balances
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Have you seen this, Peter?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250318?refcode=em20250318-36512&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36512_1203867_aPqMjD&akid=36512%2E1203867%2EaPqMjD ][IMG]

Donald Trump and his MAGA officials are now openly defying court orders to
carry out their mass deportation agenda.

Trump’s administration blatantly ignored a federal judge to illegally
deport 237 Venezuelan men and even a teenager to a mega-prison in El
Salvador without any hearing, evidence, or due process.

They did this using the Alien Enemies Act of 1798 — an archaic law used to
detain and deport people without due process during wartime, like the
Japanese American internment camps of World War II.

To make matters worse, the White House put out disturbing propaganda
videos celebrating this mass deportation effort, and have adamantly
declared they “don’t care” what judges say — they’re going to keep
ignoring the judicial branch and deporting people without a fair trial.

This is a massive human rights violation and a direct challenge to our
system of checks and balances. This is a threat to all of us on U.S. soil:
undocumented immigrants, tourists, documented residents, and citizens
alike.

We are in a full-blown Constitutional crisis,
Peter. Democratic leadership
needs to get serious and fight back. But if Sen. Minority Leader Chuck
Schumer's weakness on the budget showdown tells us anything, it’s that we
can’t count on do-nothing Democrats in the establishment to stop this.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250318?refcode=em20250318-36512&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36512_1203867_aPqMjD&akid=36512%2E1203867%2EaPqMjD ]We need to build the resources to elect more progressive candidates who
will fight MAGA fascism with the boldness and urgency it deserves. Can you
give $5 or more to help us recruit and elect the Democratic
leaders we need in the next 2026 primaries?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250318?refcode=em20250318-36512&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36512_1203867_aPqMjD&akid=36512%2E1203867%2EaPqMjD ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250318-36512-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36512_1203867_aPqMjD&akid=36512%2E1203867%2EaPqMjD

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36512%2E1203867%2EaPqMjD

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee.

Donald Trump is dismantling the Department of Education with mass layoffs and funding cuts. This will have devastating effects for North Carolina’s students, and students across the country.

That’s why I was proud to co-sponsor the Department of Education Protection Act to ensure every student receives the education they deserve. [Will you sign my petition to show your support for defending the DOE?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082672/534217037/-639438419?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_031825_DOE_Petition_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTA2ZDhmYi0yNjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPSlUcOujS7FXTlnyLZvLySTxWWrpkH1suDbchwVaqQ=&emci=02d807ba-1104-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7106d8fb-2604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=799895) | [SUPPORT THE DOE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082675/534217041/-639438419?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_031825_DOE_Petition_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTA2ZDhmYi0yNjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPSlUcOujS7FXTlnyLZvLySTxWWrpkH1suDbchwVaqQ=&emci=02d807ba-1104-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7106d8fb-2604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=799895)
---
Peter, our public schools aren’t perfect – but they helped get me to where I am today. Growing up in the midst of the Civil Rights movement meant that I experienced my fair share of discrimination and inequities as a young Black woman. Despite those challenges, I was able to find support from teachers, friends, and faculty who believed in me.

**Now, I’m committed to making our public schools the best they can be for everyone, regardless of their race, religion, or where they live.**

But instead of working to improve our public schools, Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to throw it all away. Decades of progress we’ve made to get here are on the line. [Will you sign my petition to show your support for protecting our essential Department of Education?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082677/534217045/-639438419?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_031825_DOE_Petition_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTA2ZDhmYi0yNjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UPSlUcOujS7FXTlnyLZvLySTxWWrpkH1suDbchwVaqQ=&emci=02d807ba-1104-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7106d8fb-2604-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=799895)

Thank you,

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee. Donald Trump is dismantling the Department of Education with mass layoffs and funding cuts. This will have devastating effects for North Carolina’s students, and students across the country. That’s why I was proud to co-sponsor the Department of Education Protection Act to ensure every student receives the education they deserve. | Peter, our public schools aren’t perfect – but they helped get me to where I am today. Growing up in the midst of the Civil Rights movement meant that I experienced my fair share of discrimination and inequities as a young Black woman. Despite those challenges, I was able to find support from teachers, friends, and faculty who believed in me. Now, I’m committed to making our public schools the best they can be for everyone, regardless of their race, religion, or where they live. But instead of working to improve our public schools, Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to throw it all away. Decades of progress we’ve made to get here are on the line. Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. subject: An ancient specter...
body:
The Hamas massacre in Israel should have shocked the world into moral clarity.

| | | Announcing the release of my newest book from Jihad Watch and the David Horowitz Freedom Center.
---
| |
---
| | _"Had we listened to Robert Spencer and taken heed twenty years ago or even ten years ago, the impact of Islamist-driven antisemitism would not have caught us by surprise. We would have had in place an institutional effort to counter it. Here is another opportunity to pay attention to his important work. Read this book!"_**\- Ayaan Hirsi Ali**
---
Fellow Conservative, Today, I’m asking you to help me take on an ancient specter that has now reared its ugly head once again.
---
| | And that’s why I’m announcing the release of my newest book from Jihad Watch and the David Horowitz Freedom Center: _Antisemitism: History and Myth_. In a moment I want to tell you [**how you can get this critical work for free**.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/DmrpTCufXYMC00oui2SepeJ3sMS7OFyaSj4OkvTqYuIua6dP13DPUOjpSOioOXJ9o9kylkADTnFxqOvmTOuGsRW73GnDnRJ-EBgdmlgvyWlPsIeoKPh00bx-OlzSwxuXXu5Kz_j45Bcdg-4-o7UW-LFQjsBj_bzHX6DYignq8UZ23mdsgiGBkMzzkycflbTzDNxeXx5e-Rn8pv0gzoaIobICjEpZQvCQg-jkpbFj8Pz4P3-5rqiZ9YskuVtkqZYuVZGeLrKtbzHJ6ztRNqcLDPFCZb8cHvIrPsav1ZPW_Iu_CK-LpCJsXcgElLkQpHtGf6kfs-Bb9UMDqWGcRYKhKqMSWqS6jl67myx5ZBBqSqU9SLcRXpkat-vfPNGMyaE9d0_y37BjBsBmPDTQFQXcRYXunZ0DF9T4d2I-MNoc25nCOyvA9k_tKskPGkJeycpGOVpJsxhCYcGlKYYtNq80r9eE_IuviZfNARKRj-8jnSX86Y-b/OzcM7cb71dGi9cL_guOhpIcvOofFy9_j/7)But first, I want to explain why I wrote this book, why I wish I didn’t have to, and why it’s so critical that brave patriots like you read it and share it with those around you. You see, for decades I’ve dedicated my career to exposing the dangers of the **_jihad ideology_** and the **_lies that enable it_**.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/QS1XJXK7Ogbj5E-0WSCcgawBVGbviMKjKlTWRtErPnNKUa5Gb7gzp_P6OR6OSxHHdjBy4rChKrj096KqX9284orYCBxzmO5_H1mmWSnuLbQE5ZjJ5bx5C0QLp088AidsO2x-z01Rj0W9jJuRAPojz3k47dyVxNicXTP66Xe61ksX_4oSxC4fqRGGVgXWbuOWP4g4972htfkj7rnGbeYctUTxoh9G19qVYJuJrb9EKyceFAIZhIf2TFv87TILivE33W3OHRpICKnbV2YxgkwnlnbzMjWUVJl7As55wc-5iqc7hL_UsaprdGA1RnpUkzp7IoBHxFxW0LSHUtvgJXluqPxKvz6Mhel8GF4XNSpOUeqUfasQYLOvlt80k-DTVbFliVPhv1RGx16ReNc5hlunfXH4mZE3cFJRxMQt9qfxxPE8H7AJhbJMoZSfrDJRdgP_BA0sv6B4VYVbtYqAFy57OFwGMzqAzY_tX67u_eyE6vfKriRG/jdGnwnVcVAS3CBWIMkyCMscj4sHe-HR5/7)
---
| | But the events of October 7, 2023, made something chillingly clear: the threat we face is more than jihad alone. It’s an ancient hatred – one that has roared back to life in the streets of our own cities.The Hamas massacre in Israel should have shocked the world into moral clarity. Instead, we saw something horrifying:
---
* Crowds in Western capitals cheering for the terrorists.
* Students chanting for genocide.
* Mobs attacking Jews in broad daylight across the country.
* Even members of Congress attempting to justify and encourage the slaughter.

---
We have seen this before. And it’s why I wrote _Antisemitism: History and Myth_. This book exposes the roots of this enduring evil, the lies used to justify it, and why it has returned with such force today.My friend, maybe you’ve heard the shocking things that even those on the right have begun to murmur...Accusations that a cabal of Jews runs the world, and the banks, and the political systems across the globe.Far-left and far-right conspiracy theorists and sinister “influencers” have been emboldened to spread hatred and vitriol for our Jewish brothers and sisters.I’ve heard it all...and I wish it weren’t happening – I wish this book didn’t have to be written.But it is happening, and we cannot ignore evil. That’s why the Freedom Center is committed to getting this book into the hands of those who need it most – people who recognize the urgency of this moment and refuse to let history repeat itself. **[When you make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or more today, we will send you a copy of Antisemitism: History and Myth at no additional cost.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/Sk3MpAASCa5pSH_fwABvoSGEihHXQIItbKml08COMP1QEnwCpO87NRKGGZCwgGXx62bD-u6VENPOmVH8RaKEiuGPQSStFaq7nnMWUq9YiuRk--BZM2_qZi7mnMAGJJP09wkvZXruh7Ujyosv486fMujkpOClJsoO9g9eP_hUFZKirRLWC9crtxV2Mojc6sEZrl6pd6dPCH5QE1AzV6mtQopB3sdFMHWuzvzW2HgZ5J9s17i9Fq_FLsjUvtO4-r5gmATjYJD9t0mBeDLydd9WKMF1gTFEQw7wAoxl3FpFlo7Iqihy7RemQbNbGuQtL8G96WIJCwAE3f8Da1FrZfLIDbqLG0qN0L5HjOHX3BKcUm1PAIkyHZ57esK6JxUV5C-bfCtb6yKyHub-8MqcP8EW5FQAXoOe29hptJb9OIqNoMMgJ7A86nViu7V66URvnhqxApgYQ34vV0W-YKE8Td_SWbZvldkuthOPA-6OA2YSnFZsCE98/5p82u_ZkpWYO6sHC8HBc1RXp_bgSGBGy/7)**

My friend, to fight back against this specter we must understand it – where it comes from, how it spreads, and where it leads.This is more than just a book – it’s an instruction manual for the battle against a resurgent evil. clean_body: The Hamas massacre in Israel should have shocked the world into moral clarity. | | | Announcing the release of my newest book from Jihad Watch and the David Horowitz Freedom Center. | | | | "Had we listened to Robert Spencer and taken heed twenty years ago or even ten years ago, the impact of Islamist-driven antisemitism would not have caught us by surprise. We would have had in place an institutional effort to counter it. Here is another opportunity to pay attention to his important work. Read this book!"\- Ayaan Hirsi Ali Fellow Conservative, Today, I’m asking you to help me take on an ancient specter that has now reared its ugly head once again. | | And that’s why I’m announcing the release of my newest book from Jihad Watch and the David Horowitz Freedom Center: Antisemitism: History and Myth. In a moment I want to tell you first, I want to explain why I wrote this book, why I wish I didn’t have to, and why it’s so critical that brave patriots like you read it and share it with those around you. You see, for decades I’ve dedicated my career to exposing the dangers of the jihad ideology and the lies that enable it. | | | But the events of October 7, 2023, made something chillingly clear: the threat we face is more than jihad alone. It’s an ancient hatred – one that has roared back to life in the streets of our own cities.The Hamas massacre in Israel should have shocked the world into moral clarity. Instead, we saw something horrifying: Crowds in Western capitals cheering for the terrorists. Students chanting for genocide. Mobs attacking Jews in broad daylight across the country. Even members of Congress attempting to justify and encourage the slaughter. We have seen this before. And it’s why I wrote Antisemitism: History and Myth. This book exposes the roots of this enduring evil, the lies used to justify it, and why it has returned with such force today.My friend, maybe you’ve heard the shocking things that even those on the right have begun to murmur...Accusations that a cabal of Jews runs the world, and the banks, and the political systems across the globe.Far-left and far-right conspiracy theorists and sinister “influencers” have been emboldened to spread hatred and vitriol for our Jewish brothers and sisters.I’ve heard it all...and I wish it weren’t happening – I wish this book didn’t have to be written.But it is happening, and we cannot ignore evil. That’s why the Freedom Center is committed to getting this book into the hands of those who need it most – people who recognize the urgency of this moment and refuse to let history repeat itself. My friend, to fight back against this specter we must understand it – where it comes from, how it spreads, and where it leads.This is more than just a book – it’s an instruction manual for the battle against a resurgent evil. So please take this opportunity to arm yourself with the knowledge to combat this evil. Your support will aid the Freedom Center’s push to spread the word about this resurgence of hate far and wide.And more than that, you will be helping the Freedom Center continue to expose the truth and defend America through all of its critical work. Every dollar you give helps fuel our investigative projects, campus campaigns, and publications including FrontPage Mag and Discover the Networks – and critical books just like this. So please | | Thank you for your support.Sincerely, Robert Spencer, Director,Jihad Watch Shillman Fellow, David Horowitz Freedom Center | | | P.S. Antisemitism isn’t just an attack on the Jewish people – it’s a poison that corrodes society at its core. | | This email is a little longer than usual, but I hope you will take the time to read it. Because we have an important decision to make, and we have to make it now. Democrats across the country are furious at what happened in Congress last week. So am I. Last week I voted against the Republican government funding bill in the House. Was it because I wanted to shut the government down? Of course not. But that bill locks in much of the Trump/Musk strategy of taking a wrecking ball to our Constitution, the rule of law, and the needs of America’s working families. Unfortunately, too many Democratic senators and their leadership folded like a cheap campstool. Don’t get me wrong: I understand their fear that closing down the federal government comes with risk. But history teaches us the price when fear turns into surrender. I won’t be a part of that. If you agree that we can’t just roll over and play dead, **[I need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082912/534217587/1573491360?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjZjMTgxYy0yNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjdzo0V3npedhEY4lHf1OUjVp8t3mSdxGaiMvJJvHR4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082913/534217594/1573491360?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjZjMTgxYy0yNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjdzo0V3npedhEY4lHf1OUjVp8t3mSdxGaiMvJJvHR4=)

---
Here’s something else I won’t do: just complain about what Trump and Musk are doing. Wringing our hands isn’t a strategy. We need to fight back, and here’s what I think the rules should be:
**Call Things What They Are** – Too many people are acting like what’s happening is normal. It’s not. Trump, Musk and their Republican congressional enablers are attacking our Constitution, the rule of law and wrecking our government’s ability to keep us safe, healthy and provide for working people. They are breaking the law and sending very clear signals that when the courts tell them to stop, they may ignore them. The definition of a coup is the overthrow of a lawful government through illegal means. When they cross that red line, we should call it what it is.
**Don’t Back Down** – It’s true that Democrats don’t hold the presidency, the House or the Senate. But what’s most galling about what happened last week is that you cannot move forward in the Senate without Democratic support: it takes 60 votes. We are not helpless, and we should stop acting like we are. **This Continuing Resolution expires in September, and we need Democratic leadership who will not allow us to get rolled again. Period.**
**Don’t Accept False Choices** – Trump, Musk and congressional Republicans are essentially saying we should do something bad to avoid something worse. This is how bullies get their way, and we don’t have to play that game. But that requires offering a different, better choice, which means...
**Don’t Forget Who This is Really About** – America’s working families, the middle class and those who believe we should be a country that gives people the opportunity to succeed and give their children a better future. I have spent my entire public life fighting for working people. That fight is why I show up for work every day, and I will link arms with anyone who will do the same. That is the way we will take back our country.
**[If you agree, please join me today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082923/534217633/1573491360?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjZjMTgxYy0yNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjdzo0V3npedhEY4lHf1OUjVp8t3mSdxGaiMvJJvHR4=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104082925/534217642/1573491360?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjZjMTgxYy0yNzA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tjdzo0V3npedhEY4lHf1OUjVp8t3mSdxGaiMvJJvHR4=)
---
I know that was a lot. But as Democrats, we need a clear vision of how we move forward, and we need it now. Our country is in danger, and I believe we have about 6 months to turn things around.
This is not the last you are going to hear from me. I’ll keep sharing with you specific ideas of what I believe we need to do. And with your support, I’ll keep pushing my colleagues to do what it takes to reset and retake the agenda.
Val

clean_body: | | | | This email is a little longer than usual, but I hope you will take the time to read it. Because we have an important decision to make, and we have to make it now. Democrats across the country are furious at what happened in Congress last week. So am I. Last week I voted against the Republican government funding bill in the House. Was it because I wanted to shut the government down? Of course not. But that bill locks in much of the Trump/Musk strategy of taking a wrecking ball to our Constitution, the rule of law, and the needs of America’s working families. Unfortunately, too many Democratic senators and their leadership folded like a cheap campstool. Don’t get me wrong: I understand their fear that closing down the federal government comes with risk. But history teaches us the price when fear turns into surrender. I won’t be a part of that. If you agree that we can’t just roll over and play dead, = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Here’s something else I won’t do: just complain about what Trump and Musk are doing. Wringing our hands isn’t a strategy. We need to fight back, and here’s what I think the rules should be: Call Things What They Are – Too many people are acting like what’s happening is normal. It’s not. Trump, Musk and their Republican congressional enablers are attacking our Constitution, the rule of law and wrecking our government’s ability to keep us safe, healthy and provide for working people. They are breaking the law and sending very clear signals that when the courts tell them to stop, they may ignore them. The definition of a coup is the overthrow of a lawful government through illegal means. When they cross that red line, we should call it what it is. Don’t Back Down – It’s true that Democrats don’t hold the presidency, the House or the Senate. But what’s most galling about what happened last week is that you cannot move forward in the Senate without Democratic support: it takes 60 votes. We are not helpless, and we should stop acting like we are. This Continuing Resolution expires in September, and we need Democratic leadership who will not allow us to get rolled again. Period. Don’t Accept False Choices – Trump, Musk and congressional Republicans are essentially saying we should do something bad to avoid something worse. This is how bullies get their way, and we don’t have to play that game. But that requires offering a different, better choice, which means... Don’t Forget Who This is Really About – America’s working families, the middle class and those who believe we should be a country that gives people the opportunity to succeed and give their children a better future. I have spent my entire public life fighting for working people. That fight is why I show up for work every day, and I will link arms with anyone who will do the same. That is the way we will take back our country. = = I know that was a lot. But as Democrats, we need a clear vision of how we move forward, and we need it now. Our country is in danger, and I believe we have about 6 months to turn things around. This is not the last you are going to hear from me. I’ll keep sharing with you specific ideas of what I believe we need to do. And with your support, I’ll keep pushing my colleagues to do what it takes to reset and retake the agenda. Val | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . |

body:
With a GOP trifecta in Washington, defending and expanding Democratic power in state legislatures is crucial to protecting our rights against Trump, Musk, and MAGA legislators in the states. | | |

| |

With a GOP trifecta in Washington, defending and expanding Democratic power in state legislatures is crucial to protecting our rights against Trump, Musk, and MAGA legislators in the states. **Here are three ways you can help:** | 🗳️ **There are dozens of special elections on the books, including a tie-breaking race in Pennsylvania**. Each special election marks a critical opportunity for Democrats to counter MAGA Republicans.

By [donating $7 today](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxD-0Fr2Pgyy2ET802uj5Jd30_D1FS9nuPbDna_WQxFpJCsNa_eWdPxrctWhV1q_p89qGijD7st_qaCMcgVT5aE7xPECflHyDyznK92NR66TcOOLP5B7LVFo9Az81XqsEiKRy0Li4ZP6mNgZ01ka65AcEvrm6_PsoK9FzQCEv-dIbKK5V9VEaA-xzNlJAUx81bHnBHdBMsJdaN74UxFG8X-fhBS8nnorCdSYIAGKU74i1d_YQ8gLsZIW1i9YtOZEbMI08Gfu1rsbsluMP4-hI7nK2rCvNknprdw73_LxUWdOGQzSBVGZixHtvhdxu1tV-y0gt317IJdy2d39k9a5dS7JOwChudGaLT2xcM0v_rSf2M/4ew/9sa-t-5nSn-ot14OGfMe3w/h0/h001.1BrOOvKWzwgLn1lxPGrXQEg2_RFJCVbaW_7eJSJjoxw) you can give Democratic candidates the resources they need to compete and win in upcoming elections nationwide.

With a [one-time gift of $10 or more](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDjvJxr0wveTyrb35cvOzXQC5S2H9VmPtL9_fXCgUSipoMazpLSAi7laygZY8L6g9ye-Lb7ztTyGw0oHDZ8rkxDhlIB6zFvk_0edqVfZvGDkaf6V58E3lOCtMyJ2k2FgatR2gfjyn10exXsSkXBwcKMz8QbGSwP4HMWHd9g-Cbkg4s-79_VFMTGJv89HKYnUNn6QKdBYIXc_ESjoNyWYKl9cBvFXQz07cxd95J9kgOgd1Rq1L78RvW3v_Ph42CSquvPbwBuBErwKAuQSbvVl7kqfZMl5sje79IpqzD0GHYG-yzVRiCy821JPMqASyqqh5mtPKozvRRYJPogY-ceQsfvEhkUpQkj0rleenC6Ehk86BcdpxiAxyodatzVDWgsMFf/4ew/9sa-t-5nSn-ot14OGfMe3w/h1/h001.OB8Wu9IAKDTQ4oJRc3Tlaff723C_ycjYJA5w3787koE), you can join our fight to expand Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide. We’ll even send you a personalized 2025 member card.

🛍️ **Our DLCC store is stocked with exclusive merch** perfect for showing off your Democratic pride all year round!

Each of our items is 100% union-made, and when you [shop our merch collection at store.dlcc.org](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtcyezAGX40G77DE8gQDHSAlxYrWFkk8eLAhSa2D-EWYGOkq58Ar13aiCcCrNF1v8auoS3WrFGgftQYHI6oaWZ1RNtmGuoHJmXubXcPolBqI0uMy1EI4mpxEUleyPqsXb1L1k_8eITk2GquzSZK1DEHG3mhfwPfTy4hqzwUFZoNV6xW4C3b8NPvsuzr2AurnIacB180uV5330Vp9wEgHWYWKxi0RUfnnkPV3rA85x6gW_RhAX7WpevFs0iYzb_UUztC0lsZXFVCjk2S8OAZsVUI5CLY71POKW4y9meXTAgbwDFXpwOFEDHgwBeB61v1VvkM-CJP_A8-rM3mU144H0AM0MXWSOECyGpuJzeSLEP_Xy/4ew/9sa-t-5nSn-ot14OGfMe3w/h2/h001.jZemJJ2gHJ8yRMzV-qSBG1vv5t3CqVJb79vlwFWBeBw), you’re helping fuel our work to build Democratic majorities in places like yours.

3️⃣ But the polls don’t close until 7PM, so we still have time to boost voter turnout!
That’s why we need to hit our final $10,000 fundraising goal so that we can reach out to voters and get them to the polls in these final hours.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Our veterans and soldiers deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, I served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan.

In the Army, I was proud to fight alongside some of the finest men and women I’ve known. When you’re in the fight, your fellow soldiers don’t care about your gender, race or who you love.

If someone wants to put on the uniform and fight for America, we should welcome that and reward their sacrifices after service.

But instead, Donald Trump is using his executive power to gut programs our veterans depend on.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s reckless purge of thousands of federal workers reached the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs. They plan to shrink the already thin workforce by over 80,000 employees , and Republicans can’t guarantee that these sweeping cuts won’t affect veterans’ benefits and care.

The sacrifices of all service members should be respected and rewarded. Donald Trump’s recent executive actions are a slap in the face to soldiers and veterans.

I am committed to standing by all of our service members and will continue to advocate for their rights, benefits, and dignity.

Flipping the House will be critical in delivering for our veterans and soldiers, who deserve better than what this administration has offered. I’m fighting on both fronts. Will you back me up with a $5 donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25?amount=5]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Jason

**"Supreme Court candidate Brad Schimel welcomes a hypothetical endorsement from Donald Trump"**
— _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ Peter, Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Brad Schimel just came out and said it: He wants President Donald Trump’s help to win what looks to be among the most impactful elections of the year. We already know that Elon Musk's political action committee and other allies are pouring millions into defeating the NDRC’s endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford. **That’s all you need to know about how high the stakes are. This single election will determine which side controls Wisconsin's highest court — with serious implications for fair maps, free elections, and our fundamental freedoms. ** [**We have less than 3 weeks to keep Trump, Musk, and MAGA extremists from wreaking more havoc on our democracy. clean_body: We might be outspent, but we’ll never be outworked or out-organized — as long as we have you with us. | "Supreme Court candidate Brad Schimel welcomes a hypothetical endorsement from Donald Trump" — Milwaukee Journal Sentinel Peter, Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Brad Schimel just came out and said it: He wants President Donald Trump’s help to win what looks to be among the most impactful elections of the year. We already know that Elon Musk's political action committee and other allies are pouring millions into defeating the NDRC’s endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford. That’s all you need to know about how high the stakes are. This single election will determine which side controls Wisconsin's highest court — with serious implications for fair maps, free elections, and our fundamental freedoms. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The far-right has already made it clear they’ll spare no expense to try and secure this open seat and flip control of this highly influential court. But here’s the thing: We know how to win in the Badger State. In 2023 — building on our work in the 2018, 2019, and 2020 races — our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. Musk and his friends think they can just spend more to beat us this time around. It’s time to prove them wrong. While we might be outspent, we’ll never be outworked or out-organized — as long as we have you with us. = — NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. Team,

The MAGA majority is hanging on by a thread, and we have a unique opportunity to deliver a blow that could send their entire operation into disarray. With each race becoming more critical, **the special election we’re facing in Florida is one of the most pivotal we’ve seen in a long time.**

The numbers are razor-thin, and every vote will count. **This is a make-or-break moment, and the outcome of this race could have a ripple effect far beyond our district.**

A victory here would shake up the Republican establishment and show that the people are not going to allow a few billionaires and special interests to take control of our government. It would be a monumental setback for Trump and his cronies.

**This is not just about one seat; it’s about the future of our democracy.** Winning this race could send shockwaves throughout the Republican party and stop Trump’s extremist agenda in its tracks. But to do that, we need your help.****

|
---
**[Will you step up and help us stop MAGA in its tracks? name: Marine Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Always faithful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I’ve lived a full, rewarding life – and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America.
I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely.
| |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40025e7d7b0242e0a68f138994fff3d8&_e=sNg4wo05-YY56cjGFiLrkuyl-CFhxsNgU374T30Xyla0LAJ2oZapPqnVx2QQ0qnl0rJKlbiTbLbvNMxPNv0RAikhOuE5eGTyZimngUHjWJDSrFwJjiaMA3Rg49JMvC9lQBS5O3OjuW4V2omxIaNHhxA1sXOo1t82alr6XhHXkSGzYFuBBzUR1inld90nblFUqrLCPeo9N6De64cp2pp3jQSk-sBj6DDTmtHRuMt-64Ot3MdpDsvyFWGVsR13DOSoqkKpcHufY2MeYV2FyOZaoFvbPNVSurSzK9bu0i4cLkt9DL8l9MTquLn9qDjnFTo8zsz8LkQvwcpT73MPIAv4GZfnbPvvJCsZlMCKQ4n4GvL_opA5-L8FKuq5iZ1mjEF5BecqWcWjKbYAe5vMHbIISQ%3D%3D)
---
**Semper Fi._Always faithful._** I often get asked, _" Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?"_
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40025e7d7b0242e0a68f138994fff3d8&_e=sNg4wo05-YY56cjGFiLrkuyl-CFhxsNgU374T30Xyla0LAJ2oZapPqnVx2QQ0qnl0rJKlbiTbLbvNMxPNv0RAikhOuE5eGTyZimngUHjWJDSrFwJjiaMA3Rg49JMvC9lQBS5O3OjuW4V2omxIaNHhxA1sXOo1t82alr6XhHXkSGzYFuBBzUR1inld90nblFUqrLCPeo9N6De64cp2pp3jQSk-sBj6DDTmtHRuMt-64Ot3MdpDsvyFWGVsR13DOSoVyaYUOLjtcV2SOe2c_k90pXqmnHk1awjlTatocAzxlW9I10yfz2RAq2roPKpBAe_dFl6R2fnq56AsJ_lzxJkQHdI6tfJLuKxaVMT9ofyc916s_An7YZLc6f_qvrsDIg0WZKZ8H55TyN1caFAtxZROw%3D%3D)
---
And to that, I say **absolutely.** Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, **and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:**-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old.
-I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician.
-I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: _**my story is only possible in America.**_ And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope.

_But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children._**Not on my watch. ** _**[So, consider this a humble invitation to join my campaign: Will you chip in today--even if it's just a few bucks--to ensure that we have the means needed to beat my Democrat opponent and win this thing?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40025e7d7b0242e0a68f138994fff3d8&_e=sNg4wo05-YY56cjGFiLrkuyl-CFhxsNgU374T30Xyla0LAJ2oZapPqnVx2QQ0qnl0rJKlbiTbLbvNMxPNv0RAikhOuE5eGTyZimngUHjWJDSrFwJjiaMA3Rg49JMvC9lQBS5O3OjuW4V2omxIaNHhxA1sXOo1t82alr6XhHXkSGzYFuBBzUR1inld90nblFUqrLCPeo9N6De64cp2pp3jQSk-sBj6DDTmtHRuMt-64Ot3MdpDsvyFWGVsR13DOSo4f_CcWy6kG6taq17-ikVvFSNbIGZBnO5fb2g7xTCbxYi23WmFARG18XajIP8JAjnexl85xnBin6ZsB22uCJgfg4T7_JUgvTWkRZ85ZIc8DGLmByX4at39LHTJhYVPEQ1SyEzmzboaXrQEd3cpP3Stg%3D%3D)**_
---
[ **CHIP IN HERE >>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=40025e7d7b0242e0a68f138994fff3d8&_e=sNg4wo05-YY56cjGFiLrkuyl-CFhxsNgU374T30Xyla0LAJ2oZapPqnVx2QQ0qnl0rJKlbiTbLbvNMxPNv0RAikhOuE5eGTyZimngUHjWJDSrFwJjiaMA3Rg49JMvC9lQBS5O3OjuW4V2omxIaNHhxA1sXOo1t82alr6XhHXkSGzYFuBBzUR1inld90nblFUqrLCPeo9N6De64cp2pp3jQSk-sBj6DDTmtHRuMt-64Ot3MdpDsvyFWGVsR13DOSoMx72d2nRoG6D9aQwmVFqN_bDedkJwV9M9wLcuYL7pH7weCbYkdLWNQ5pE44wkKwx75jK6lzbuSIX24Emb5VxLqIS1rwzoH1Ix-DFWT9UCwMqjpioFW25epNRjgU-aFJ-oHf_ws_wr1Acs2w5W7FxoQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’ve lived a full, rewarding life – and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. I often get asked, "Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. | | | | | | | | | Semper Fi.Always faithful. I often get asked, " Were you really willing to put your life on the line for a country you weren't even born in?" And to that, I say absolutely. Friend, my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. I don't often make promises, but I can promise you this: I'm not your typical politician, and I 'm not like the others who normally send you these messages:-I immigrated to the US from Jamaica with my family when I was six years old. -I served in the Marine Corps as an electrician. -I ran a women's homeless shelter and a men's prison ministry.I've lived a full, rewarding life - and I owe it all to this country. In a world of so much uncertainty, I know one thing to be 100% true: my story is only possible in America. And now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia - to make certain that the same country that let a poor, black woman ascend to the highest levels of politics remains that way - a beacon of hope. But the reality we have to confront is that those on the Left are actively trying to tear this down. They aim to destroy the middle class, strip away our 2nd Amendment rights, and brainwash our children.Not on my watch. We have a long journey ahead of us, but we will be better off with you on our side. Thank you & God Bless, Winsome Earle-Sears Candidate for Governor of Virginia | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! name: Gay Valimont
subject: The arrogance of MAGA knows no bounds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Team, I have some infuriating news.

My MAGA opponent and his allies think this race is already over . They assume this district is a done deal for the GOP. They assume we can’t pull off an upset. They assume you won’t step up.

They are dead wrong.

We have two weeks to prove them wrong, but we can’t afford to fall behind. We’re building momentum every single day, but we need to keep up the pressure.

That’s why I’m asking you right now: Can you donate $15, $25, or whatever you can -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us flip this seat and send a massive wake-up call to the GOP? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]This campaign is powered by people – not billionaire donors, not special interests, and certainly not the far-right extremists who backed Matt Gaetz.

But we are running out of time . Every single contribution goes straight to reaching voters, knocking doors, and proving that this race is far from over.

We need to hit our daily fundraising goal if we want to keep our budget intact to ensure we’re doing everything possible to win this race. Can I count on you to chip in -- split with Seth Moulton -- and help us close the gap? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Let’s show them what we’re made of.

— Gay Valimont

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx) [**_Do you understand what’s happening with the Constitutional Amendment to overturn _Citizens United_? _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60232?t=3&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx)

* Because here’s the truth: _Citizens United_ has [**corrupted our Democracy for 15 years! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60232?t=5&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx)

* In fact, Elon Musk just spent [**$330 million of his personal money**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60232?t=6&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx) to get Trump back into the White House.

* Republicans know they would never win another election without all the unlimited Dark Money _Citizens United_ allows them to spend. So they are [**dead set on blocking our efforts**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60232?t=7&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx) to do away with _Citizens United. _

* We launched a [**MASSIVE effort**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60232?t=8&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx) to help pass the Constitutional Amendment!

* If you all step up now and support our campaign to help our Democrats, [**we can crush Republicans in future elections and restore our democracy**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60232?t=9&akid=22934%2E4449941%2E5WNkvx) — a dream come true!

name: Survey Dept. [Heritage Action]
subject: What government agency do you want to cut waste, fraud, and abuse from next?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l9eg3hkdun02gqac0lgk7kmjthpfs3qfmdqohr0c791labccqinjvzn9d30lvkqqs18r07mmqjl7wu63j1&__stmp=stc3ia&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfvzizcc47vqyle7yhxes4r5lauyd8yv4tjclsyoz83b7jp7l56gss23y0qobzlxgv2sop5q0nxt9ug5s5329cp1tb48evd4c9r7u6ett1z00fr74ra5c6wnct1bbtzsxzau2rjkvf16g1hyp7jf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dfvzizcc47vqyle7yhxes4r69nx2l0wpir56ayllfwbw2835bog0yluxevu269qzcs4eoix92lrexyw09m6jioye6xj7bu24z0m2oaf3ftaund4q6odep66xrqnz6n70jjpggiwkqgcinckjmip2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stc3ia&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Rob Bonta
subject: It’s official!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
I’m running for re-election as California’s Attorney General in 2026.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250318&t=1&akid=1698%2E1088799%2EdKJa3N)
It’s official: **I’m launching my re-election campaign for Attorney General of California today!**
**[If I have your support, will you pitch in to become a founding donor of our 2026 campaign now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250318?refcode=em20250318-1698&refcode2=1698_1088799_dKJa3N&akid=1698%2E1088799%2EdKJa3N)**
It’s been the honor of a lifetime to serve as Chief Law Enforcement Officer for the last four years, fighting for justice and progress for all, and protecting public safety across our state. As I shared last month, I’m dedicated to carrying out this impactful job, especially during these uncertain and concerning times.
Part of this role is protecting the basic rights of Californians and preventing any person, administration, or greedy corporation from trampling on them — lately that’s included Donald Trump and Elon Musk. I’ve already filed eight lawsuits against the Trump administration — ranging from blocking attempts to end birthright citizenship to preventing DOGE from accessing Americans’ private data — and will continue doing so as long as the administration tries to overstep its authority, break the law, and harm people.
Plus, I’m keeping up all of my other important work to make our communities safer, protect working families and consumers from being ripped off, address the climate crisis, create more affordable housing, protect our neighborhoods from gun violence, and a whole lot more. Regardless of who is in the White House, my goal is to keep you safe and keep California on a path of progress and prosperity.
As the son of union members, **I’m honored to already have the endorsement of Service Employees International Union (SEIU) California** , which represents more than 750,000 workers in our state. Organized labor remains a foundational element of our democracy, and I will continue fighting every day to ensure workers’ rights are upheld and workers across California have a voice at the bargaining table.
I know next year’s election may feel far away, especially with so many challenges facing us each day, here and now. But if we’re going to win this re-election race and keep California leading the way as a role model for the rest of the nation, _we need to start preparing today._
**[Will you make a grassroots contribution of $5 or more to keep me fighting for you as California’s Attorney General?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250318?refcode=em20250318-1698&amount=5&refcode2=1698_1088799_dKJa3N&akid=1698%2E1088799%2EdKJa3N)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250318?refcode=em20250318-1698&amount=5&refcode2=1698_1088799_dKJa3N&akid=1698%2E1088799%2EdKJa3N)**
We will rise together or not at all. Thank you for your support as we look ahead to 2026.
In solidarity,
Rob

clean_body: I’m running for re-election as California’s Attorney General in 2026. It’s official: I’m launching my re-election campaign for Attorney General of California today! It’s been the honor of a lifetime to serve as Chief Law Enforcement Officer for the last four years, fighting for justice and progress for all, and protecting public safety across our state. As I shared last month, I’m dedicated to carrying out this impactful job, especially during these uncertain and concerning times. Part of this role is protecting the basic rights of Californians and preventing any person, administration, or greedy corporation from trampling on them — lately that’s included Donald Trump and Elon Musk. I’ve already filed eight lawsuits against the Trump administration — ranging from blocking attempts to end birthright citizenship to preventing DOGE from accessing Americans’ private data — and will continue doing so as long as the administration tries to overstep its authority, break the law, and harm people. Plus, I’m keeping up all of my other important work to make our communities safer, protect working families and consumers from being ripped off, address the climate crisis, create more affordable housing, protect our neighborhoods from gun violence, and a whole lot more. Regardless of who is in the White House, my goal is to keep you safe and keep California on a path of progress and prosperity. As the son of union members, I’m honored to already have the endorsement of Service Employees International Union (SEIU) California , which represents more than 750,000 workers in our state. Organized labor remains a foundational element of our democracy, and I will continue fighting every day to ensure workers’ rights are upheld and workers across California have a voice at the bargaining table. I know next year’s election may feel far away, especially with so many challenges facing us each day, here and now. But if we’re going to win this re-election race and keep California leading the way as a role model for the rest of the nation, we need to start preparing today. We will rise together or not at all. Thank you for your support as we look ahead to 2026. In solidarity, Rob

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 📣 Act Now Stop Ohio's $2.5B Bond Issue
body:
📣 Help us fight against this damaging bond issue. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=140a37443f&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=28df48046e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**CALL TO ACTION!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
|
We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3ea3d8d39f&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS IN ABOUT 2 WEEKS!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a565682556&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d1c874e2c5&e=5c740fa3e2)

**BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**

It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ab53573fae&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| | ** **
**HB78 UPDATE!
DANGEROUS DIGITAL
OHIO DRIVER'S LICENSE
VOTER ID LEGISLATION!**

---
| **UPDATE ON HB78!**

**Thank you** for participating in last week's call to action on HB78! **It worked!**

We have agreement from one of the bill's sponsors, Ohio House of Representatives Member Thomas Hall (R), to work with a crack team of Ohio's election integrity activist community to rewrite the bill to completely & unquestionably (meaning if challenged in court) exclude digital driver's licenses from being used as an approved form of voter ID in Ohio.

**Now we'll be watching to make sure Ohio legislators don't try to pull a fast one & sneak HB78 language into the massive state budget bill currently being debated.**

If you're new to this topic, check out last week's newsletter [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b392a9bf9b&e=5c740fa3e2) and watch this video:

**EPISODE: "Ohio Republicans are Pushing Surveillance-State Legislation"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cf7e88a966&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
| |
**PLEASE BE SURE YOU'RE
RECEIVING GFI'S
TEXT ALERTS!**

---
| **JOIN OUR FREE TEXT ALERT SERVICE!

Didn't know** we had a **text alert** capability for informative & urgent communication?

Not receiving our texts?

Want to be on our text service?

It's simple and **FREE**.

**Text "JOIN" to 833-935-4657 and you're on the list.**

Pass the word on to everyone you know so they can stay informed too!

**Do it now!**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c5e56219a8&e=5c740fa3e2)

(Download image above [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5e5d17a4c1&e=5c740fa3e2))

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b753715a00&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f42d90849d&e=5c740fa3e2)**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=a09bdfb63f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=a09bdfb63f).

## ICYMI: My full conversation with Karoline Leavitt...
This is what makes my show so unique - I can talk to Karoline about working for President Trump, being the press secretary, the relationship with the press and more. Don't miss this one...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/73bbd4dc-c8d1-4737-a0dc-7b48838df3c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Subscribe now](https://substack.com/redirect/e06581cb-21de-441f-890f-ad41bc644db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Wellness update
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center. If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me.
## Stories I'm Reading...
[Schumer Postpones Book Tour Amid Backlash to Voting With Republicans ](https://substack.com/redirect/c5cb3432-1d98-4129-8314-bb649cb72355?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via New York Times
[Trump nominates Republic Airways CEO Bryan Bedford to lead the FAA, appoints new military academy boards](https://substack.com/redirect/cc57f5de-7f5e-4ee7-b8c1-087ab7359fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via Fox News
[DOGE lease cancellations: Which government offices could be closed this year and when](https://substack.com/redirect/220948bd-a382-43c4-93c1-478eff2c7948?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via AP News
## No Dinner For You
No this isn't a Seinfeld episode.
This past weekend the President, Vice President, National Security Advisor and many Trump White House senior staff members including Chief of Staff Susie Wiles, Communications Director Steven Cheung and Press Secretary Karolne Leavitt all turned down the invitation of the DC elite Gridiron Club to appear at their annual dinner.
This came on the heels of Karoline breaking news on my show Friday by stating she would not be attending the White House Correspondents Dinner in April.
Good for them.
For too long these dinners have used Republicans as props. They pretend they are bipartisan offenders. They are not. The "jokes" aimed at Republicans are mean and personal. The ones aimed at Democrats are lame and goofy.
These left wing journalists detest conservative values and more specifically Donald Trump and his agenda.
Why on earth would anyone go?
Let me speak as a recovering dinner goer.
It was always hyped up to be the cool place to be - the "it" place. Sure, you would have suffered through attacks on Republicans but hey, you might get to rub elbows or grab a selfie with a D list celebrity like Billy Eichner (google him because most normal people could not ID him).
But here is the deal...

clean_body: Again... and I have a feeling this won't be the last time. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Again... and I have a feeling this won't be the last time. | | | Mar 18| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ICYMI: My full conversation with Karoline Leavitt... This is what makes my show so unique - I can talk to Karoline about working for President Trump, being the press secretary, the relationship with the press and more. Don't miss this one... Wellness update If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center. If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me. Stories I'm Reading... -- via New York Times -- via Fox News -- via AP News No Dinner For You No this isn't a Seinfeld episode. This past weekend the President, Vice President, National Security Advisor and many Trump White House senior staff members including Chief of Staff Susie Wiles, Communications Director Steven Cheung and Press Secretary Karolne Leavitt all turned down the invitation of the DC elite Gridiron Club to appear at their annual dinner. This came on the heels of Karoline breaking news on my show Friday by stating she would not be attending the White House Correspondents Dinner in April. Good for them. For too long these dinners have used Republicans as props. They pretend they are bipartisan offenders. They are not. The "jokes" aimed at Republicans are mean and personal. The ones aimed at Democrats are lame and goofy. These left wing journalists detest conservative values and more specifically Donald Trump and his agenda. Why on earth would anyone go? Let me speak as a recovering dinner goer. It was always hyped up to be the cool place to be - the "it" place. Sure, you would have suffered through attacks on Republicans but hey, you might get to rub elbows or grab a selfie with a D list celebrity like Billy Eichner (google him because most normal people could not ID him). But here is the deal... Keep reading with a 7-day free trial Subscribe to Sean Spicer to keep reading this post and get 7 days of free access to the full post archives. name: Andrea Salinas
subject: our leaders need to fight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104087329/534230954/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2Y2JkMy0zMDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hijGkq4FlJeMETh7_4zcQC75HDpyxnl6qxA8CXRf4d4=) Team, last night, I participated in a town hall meeting with workers affected by the Trump administration’s disastrous economic policies. **And the message I heard loud and clear was this: people want leaders who will fight back. And that’s exactly what I intend to do.** That’s why I voted NO on Republicans’ appalling government-funding bill, which cut funding for crucial programs that serve veterans, young families, kids, and more. It’s why I’m fighting tooth and nail to save Social Security and public schools from DOGE’s attacks. It’s why I’m getting the word out every way I possibly can about Republicans’ proposed cuts to Medicaid — so that we can exert maximum public pressure on them to abandon their disastrous proposal to strip millions of Americans of affordable health care. (And, not for nothing, it’s also why I walked out on Trump’s State of the Union — because I have better things to do than listen to an angry, lie-filled rant.) **Team,****I can’t promise you that we will win every fight. But I can promise that I will never give up, that I will use the privilege of serving in Congress to stand up for our democracy, and that I will _always_ have the backs of working families when billionaires like Elon Musk come after your livelihood.** **[If that’s the kind of public service you’d like to see from your Democratic representatives, then I am humbly asking you to pitch in — even just $5 would go a long way — to help me keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104087331/534230956/-533866197?refcode=email_031825_leadership&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2Y2JkMy0zMDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hijGkq4FlJeMETh7_4zcQC75HDpyxnl6qxA8CXRf4d4=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104087332/534230958/-533866197?refcode=email_031825_leadership&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmU2Y2JkMy0zMDA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hijGkq4FlJeMETh7_4zcQC75HDpyxnl6qxA8CXRf4d4=)

Andrea

subject: Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!
body:

| | **Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f4960de251&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| We’re excited to invite you to the **Autism Health Summit** , hosted by Autism Health Inc., a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to improving the lives of individuals and families affected by autism. This transformative event will take place from **April 11-13, 2025, at the beautiful Town and Country Resort in sunny San Diego, CA.** Join us for an incredible weekend filled with knowledge, inspiration, and community. The Autism Health Summit will feature a lineup of renowned speakers who are leaders in autism health and wellness, including **Dr. Peter McCullough, Del Bigtree, Dr. Sabine Hazan, Dr. Brian Hooker, Dr. Dayan Goodenowe****, and enjoy special performances by DPAK and multi-platinum artist Geoff Sewell.** Whether you're a parent, practitioner, or advocate, this event offers something for everyone. We believe that access to valuable resources and education should be available to all. That’s why **Scholarships** are available for low-income families who wish to attend. If you or someone you know qualifies, just fill out the online application [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=80132f8dcd&e=3a42edfdc4). Take advantage of our special offer: **Save $50** on your ticket with promo code **AHS50** at checkout. Don’t wait... this exclusive discount won’t last long, and ticket prices will go up soon. This is your opportunity to gain valuable insights, connect with like-minded individuals, and leave feeling empowered and hopeful for the future. And with San Diego’s beautiful weather and the stunning Town and Country Resort as our host venue, you’ll enjoy not just the event, but also the vibrant surroundings. **Discounted Room Rate Ends This Friday. Click [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=c1a76a32c1&e=3a42edfdc4) to book your room.** **Continuing Medical Education (CME)** are available! Just register under the Professional Track to receive 14 CME credits for medical professionals. Secure your spot today! Click [HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=60d5f466d6&e=3a42edfdc4) to buy your tickets now and join us for a weekend of learning, growth, and inspiration. We look forward to welcoming you this April! Warm regards,
The Autism Health Team
**Autism Health Inc.**

name: Patriot
subject: Polls show this race is tied, but now Soros is getting involved…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session.

| | | | | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d0d65fcaf8034b1495b477af0c34222f&_e=Wa0rI7HTWpGrORtlgvT-dNeuMTzRJmYTqUz1NwZJ8lHGqOysoFzE_J_-UjJbli9oyJfjQN8voh-GeRG49zSWklBbqmgNndTEdWkOsbtBTMB4CLEwzQFR_rRrWaWXlJfCQ1yiTqbECFr74QcZLyQaR9-1x3UTswkKN3ks-LultQzSjp002MI7txBimZvfWZ0ZUJGbCkJO9rFw9hELTXqyhNmRmkArrT6qWLR2SP5vxS2gQBOOsgPvzE1JdHVlu0whTasTpdCz25wVmUbxHd7vuFEeEFsrhxl6bpT2UZqEeRvrUdFaIVHxedx9aDFN51hdFGTmyrUpBy3u3pZ_FqbYFhPuTgXhHIwLMFwSLxS2H3TrjeHdxBoG3p0O5JvFT1BHEB6ll3HDzx3_a4YPi59uIaNK6Umr5hjdMYUzxKIq99Q_xYnlXwN-X_n6opO9vyZPZuQAw6UYNC1LgMcokFLedbCj73R-Fn1BTffH29lbQJeGcmiWiVTpeZ5UaVo4yZPP)
---
Patriot - I've faced some truly difficult challenges before, but I think this could be the toughest mountain I'll have to climb...

I was barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - _a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Patriot!_

subject: Re: The two biggest races in the country >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA
body:
When we selected our Republican nominees for the special elections in FL-01 and FL-06, I asked if you could step up and help them retain our two RED seats that were up for election on April 1st. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

When we selected our Republican nominees for the special elections in FL-01 and FL-06, I asked if you could step up and help them retain our two **RED** seats that were up for election on April 1st. * * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

clean_body: | Peter — While Republicans try to unravel our progress to stop climate change and move toward a greener future, Yassamin is fighting back. = We can count on Yass to stand up to oil lobbyists and the fossil fuel industry. = | = As a climate policy expert, Yassamin has pushed for international solutions to climate change at the United Nations and led bold efforts to clean up our air and water in Phoenix. On the City Council, she passed the city’s landmark Climate Action Plan and helped reduce carbon emissions. Yassamin has the bold plans and experience our country needs to address the climate crisis — and she’s going to hold Republicans’ feet to the fire when they put our planet’s future at risk to get more campaign money from oil lobbyists. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — Yassamin for Congress Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Running the postal service into the ground
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

The news about the United States Postal Service has been alarming, to say
the least. Take a look at some recent headlines:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-202503-usps?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]The Washington Post:Trump expected to take control of USPS, fire postal
board, officials say. CNN:Trump wants to shake up the US Postal Service.
The NYT'S:Concerns grow over postal service independence. Labor notes:
Postal service workers brace for Trump's wrecking ball. The Guardian: US
Postal Service faces murky future.

And earlier this week, Elon Musk called for it to be privatized:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-202503-usps?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]NBC News: Elon Musk suggests the U.S. should privatize the Postal
Service and Amtrak During a remote appearance at a technology conference
in San Francisco, Musk told attendees the U.S. should privatize 'as much
as possible'.

For years, thousands of other grassroots supporters like you have joined
me in calling for USPS Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to resign.

Louis DeJoy was bad. Privatizing the Postal Service would be far worse.

If Trump and his ultra-wealthy advisors have it their way and privatize
the Postal Service, it would end government support of this vital and
quintessential American service. Seniors who depend on the postal service
for medicine, small businesses who depend on it to deliver their packages,
veterans who work for the postal service — all would be devastated,
Derek. And
Trump’s cronies would benefit by taking over the work and profiting from
it.

We need a fully functional USPS that delivers mail and packages on time at
an affordable price — not a private company that will gouge millions of
Americans way more for its services or cut off delivery altogether for
rural areas.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202503-usps.tMu2kg&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]Join me in voicing your strong opposition to Trump’s plans to privatize
the United States Postal Service. We need to protect the USPS from DeJoy,
from Trump, and from an administration hell-bent on running the Postal
Service into the ground.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202503-usps.tMu2kg&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]PROTECT THE USPS

Thank you for adding your name in support of this important cause.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5115?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5155?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]DONATE

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=8372%2E5257348%2EHhO5o7 ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

We’re furious, Peter — Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s DOGE dorks are putting Social Security on the chopping block. While Democrats are sounding the alarm to protect the benefits that 72.5 million Americans rely on, Trump’s team is pushing massive federal spending cuts that could gut Social Security as we know it. **Sign our petition NOW to tell Republicans: Hands off Social Security!** **[✍️ ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104088096/534233292/1649877919?ms=em_UTC_ORG_SocialSecurityPetition_031825_RESEND&utm_channel=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjYTgyN2U2LTMyMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxnLnjv69yMJmd8rVAFybSlGo-_me2mk7dYaYhSLXeY=&emci=42e663e1-3000-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7ca827e6-3204-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16951753)** **Here’s what’s happening:** ❗ **Musk’s team gained access to Treasury Department systems** that process Social Security payments, raising alarms about the security of your benefits. ❗ **Trump’s advisors floated plans to slash federal spending** — and with Social Security making up a significant portion of the budget, experts warn that it’s an inevitable target. ❗ Last month, Senate Democrats rallied outside the Social Security Administration to send a clear message: **Hands off our benefits!** **Social Security isn’t a handout — it’s a lifeline that Americans have paid into their entire working lives.** And now, Trump and Musk are playing dangerous games with millions of retirees, disabled Americans, and working families who depend on it. That’s why Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to defend Social Security and stop Trump’s reckless cuts — but we need your voice in this fight, too. **Tell Republicans loud and clear: HANDS OFF OUR SOCIAL SECURITY!** **[✍️ ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104088097/534233293/1649877919?ms=em_UTC_ORG_SocialSecurityPetition_031825_RESEND&utm_channel=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjYTgyN2U2LTMyMDQtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rxnLnjv69yMJmd8rVAFybSlGo-_me2mk7dYaYhSLXeY=&emci=42e663e1-3000-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7ca827e6-3204-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16951753)** Thanks for taking a stand, \- Team Unite the Country
| Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you!

clean_body: This is the American peoples’ money. Period. | We’re furious, Peter — Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s DOGE dorks are putting Social Security on the chopping block. While Democrats are sounding the alarm to protect the benefits that 72.5 million Americans rely on, Trump’s team is pushing massive federal spending cuts that could gut Social Security as we know it. Sign our petition NOW to tell Republicans: Hands off Social Security! Here’s what’s happening: ❗ Musk’s team gained access to Treasury Department systems that process Social Security payments, raising alarms about the security of your benefits. ❗ Trump’s advisors floated plans to slash federal spending — and with Social Security making up a significant portion of the budget, experts warn that it’s an inevitable target. ❗ Last month, Senate Democrats rallied outside the Social Security Administration to send a clear message: Hands off our benefits! Social Security isn’t a handout — it’s a lifeline that Americans have paid into their entire working lives. And now, Trump and Musk are playing dangerous games with millions of retirees, disabled Americans, and working families who depend on it. That’s why Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to defend Social Security and stop Trump’s reckless cuts — but we need your voice in this fight, too. Tell Republicans loud and clear: HANDS OFF OUR SOCIAL SECURITY! Thanks for taking a stand, \- Team Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on every Democrat to join Unite the Country in this fight. = | = = Follow along: Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
