name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: URGENT: Trump SLASHES environmental programs — and threatens deeper cuts. We need your help.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIyNjYxNzIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE4MDI3OTEwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
PRESIDENT TRUMP SIGNS LAW SLASHING ENVIRONMENTAL PROGRAMS — RENEW YOUR LCV MEMBERSHIP TODAY FOR JUST $5 https://links.messages.lcv. BREAKING — late Friday night, President Trump signed into law extreme cuts to
critical programs that help families and protect our environment. These cuts will mean dirtier air and water, fewer environmental protections, and
job losses for people who protect our communities from pollution. That’s not
all. According to a Fox News report, the Trump administration is planning to make even deeper cuts than those he just signed into law — and that’s ILLEGAL. Trump’s plan would let DOGE run wild — it’s unconstitutional, and it would be devastating for the environment. We need your help to respond.LCV is escalating our efforts to protect our public lands, protect critical
environmental safeguards, and stop Trump’s illegal power grabs — but we rely on
support from our members to make our campaigns work. Peter — a group of donors have put together a triple match fund to
support our work. We’re asking for your help: Peter, please renew your LCV membership today while your impact is TRIPLED. Right now, $5 is all it takes to renew. We need all hands on deck >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_ The stakes for our environment couldn’t be higher: Trump’s EPA administrator has
already shuttered all federal effortsto regulate pollution affecting low-wealth communities and communities of color. These cuts come as EPA administrator Zeldin has announced dozens of actions to
roll back or rescind the most significant federal environmental safeguards going
back decades. If he succeeds, it would mean allowing more toxic pollution from
power plants, increasing tailpipe emissions from cars and trucks, and ending
programs that ensure our drinking water and produce is safe to eat. LCV is fighting to reverse the Trump administration’s escalating attacks on the
environment, but it’s going to take all of us standing together to limit the
damage. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. We can do this, Peter. In fact, we’ve done it before. In Trump’s first term, our movement was able to stop some of the worst attacks
on the environment. We blocked pipelines. We saved public lands. We advanced
clean energy — and we did it with supporters like YOU. EVEN with Trump in office. Each and every day, we go toe-to-toe with MAGA Republicans and corporate
polluters’ army of lobbyists — and we win, thanks to support from LCV’s members
like you. Please, don’t miss this opportunity to renew your LCV membership and TRIPLE your impact for just $5 today. Your support will make an immediate impact in the fight for people and our planet >> https://links.messages.lcv. Thank you for standing with us, Peter. Onward, LCV Rapid Response This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Thom Tillis
subject: #TBT This was my American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now I’m fighting for YOURS

Friend,

When I was a kid, we lived paycheck to paycheck.

My parents worked tirelessly just to put food on the table, and we moved often as they chased work wherever they could find it.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/dmfz6uW3BRePHAkSQPanUWQMgfYIqkiUZK4CbQHnqutqQOgClz7vA4hyL6qdoukeHghO0gvcoqfNBaFAB5xg4pCEDBTUKlqVCd1YWgzyhPLG-qlBv4fNaw3YnPK2OMZiCyVLFw3yOuna-0kK1IebRbhLJtHAW0vrVPLGTwWDH_uBUoMUNMiN0OljEAYcHYbmLKLUthVre1ZWZiNvpFwtPt0B2fmosj02odzYDJMaGJsqfQWs6voQjZOw3uZKEU4RtDLQB8ViTrsT_-UgJyIJZaBcgujt8F-t6tm0dJ5TgYO1Sc4riOqBOmALdJagXb-P6I1seugwmmBXpzuhs0CdBPoEG67mIuvmmYWfqLIlPBwtSNj-RzZYmR0Aw91CMiYVU2D-4RdqBSmECPLJGUCmKFIU5AzAG7pos5vnxzpD91JsEaMUHO-AWRGZLhszMsCpRyxYapgCwmRzoDvFyxSn-ykVcQ6r5PMtes6BeBoXelvuRhMX34BcWZY21WmjB8NlnDgJOeJMBOl7Y3ma4A1CGkahq5P97eyxcUU/4TXFQdbAtlkBtXMCNzOckfNOZ3C0Ibq_/7)
I changed schools every year, lived in trailer parks, and saw firsthand what it's like to struggle at the mercy of the economy.

Life wasn't easy, but my upbringing taught me that you have to fight for the American Dream. Whether you want to earn a degree or buy a home, anything is possible with hard work, determination, and faith.

**[Only in the United States of America can a young boy in a trailer park grow up to be a U.S. Senator--and it's an honor and privilege I don't take lightly.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/-HPOHyu_7A5zEF-YwptY0rjdejzwScT5xXB1u-eGJwNFjnm_Gnf9793Dbd5sMVj8KPwyb3XG7tqfOrSlVDc7VFCKJSdj_vJJkTAt6eI6PfLl6ax8enwb3NGr02ngfeB2KsNuw_-WF9LQGg24zfG0CeWce-HYS-KktDRmd93gRa1uSNRMGjjAZvMSEdAQ4ZDDVMrCoJ6o8j3l1ieNAZrkg6io_Cz4uTSqgfFFGvcbRJ_VFgm5v7qNQe0xNMBJ6C0brEg47S58a-wyYhfnopCaowwPfLe16i_x9jAIjEtcSkyT7qn_wTuNBVI60MjJLWdvHmG-rMtQgKPsuDzd5lrfbVv_zn5I61VB_yVvFehwyXJziEEpRkUzhTkw7Au5YlcDof7Y2aNCumkUdtICCSfguNLPvLbkNaw_PTmhGMkIiRKXU6AnnBcR30KxN4cQ6rCeeGY6vF_4owm6-XXikL6naSqMyZkXgGq-QE0lYHbCoJSC0jjcMQCAlZTM9HUd5XMErKxASvGJsXZ8_HL5yNCB626Csn-_mfQpCIU/AzODTDMRiPf0XNx5PsMU53g2BZvJJZfo/7)**

Since taking the oath of office, I've worked tirelessly to advance legislation that will:
* Secure the southern border and fight against dangerous sanctuary city policies.
* Promote a healthy economy and ensure North Carolinians have access to good-paying jobs.
* Strengthen our military and improve the lives of our service members.
* Advance college opportunities for North Carolina's low-income and underrepresented students.
* Prevent taxpayer dollars from going to wasteful programs that don't serve the people.

I'm proud of my track record and my reputation for standing up to the radical Left, but there is still so much to do.

**[My 2026 reelection campaign is already under way, and I'll need your support if we're going to keep North Carolina red and hold our Senate majority.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/_OoonXfy39M7PoI9xdoGdNV5NdXtbQTDoIwmKhbESvE223FjSMqjvpQ3A59NC4ba-Mp-8SIrjLGKIMvknjCUBy9SrA7-4ZfRunpk0h7jHYVB-fwlC3LxFOFDKbvpGogn8av9JRQRtXVJUMGlQ0sdfiyDRBU18MJXH-ekqAG-8CO-XjJJNXQneGuILrEUUJGE4L5ZrDf4Dnu4Vf3G79Buna3XtXwUPsnEZ31tC6vhpdp96OO5kyL3gTESQe5n-DvRI5u8VDgek8DIKRGCI40PlPCoqDdRHPR-rTydHhBT61daR1c03PV1jWRvkXR6XFUbEbwTNgKsLIMgVEYSj0ix_NB35xamwruv7JCt00xvGIbKhpWCyUfnoNwUUSTBtXJMKEW6NGROQuY7uoB90cM8jhy6pPOAHhDMnQlvIVtUYwwnbcFgXlXm1sKwnideGsew7OFcIQ6lYECJfUUdcpeC5bXXOYkcxp_oiPTzlAGG6LDuKHkx8o2zulyPlTRkwMEqWSaC9R7qUl7GXa-wwlnqncO2WjxgpAqg7u4/ktvvR8fCBrbu8abrsH5ZTqpXg-Yh4SWj/7)**

My fight for your American Dream is far from over--and I hope you'll help me continue the important work we've started.

Sincerely,
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/goBNTF6mTtWKDXbBFC_8BV88Uce5pDG3teUYY_XcRic50bFc6cc2D3kspTE6qaJtSIgg770ne-O38cRPAtdO0rgk2TrmkjGkzEgyuVkyYroA-IZIFzqX_XzM3EgHb4rNAVYfyzTEOHchbH98CmNsxNFfcWGZ6VmEc_c8XZrCK5XTY6fLLTtzqN43QGCB5D8mwoW5BCc0NZKQEO08mgUVTKkaWFqXxAmp3jC4IRlQBogu3mDOx63tbXhkRa-pCyiIB8kCBT3yw1uGG2iutGLPQE5l6xIcfrr89iu9lTlclJzgbyXUi72HDPCavN-2vk0uUZgYqZevRc9D6L8FyhpC83QAgCIeEviO2QyC4gSw9UguhOjOULMyC3TdJqzuooiOvVuE5u0O3ODyKFVtiKOHyBV4GGFBQwv4euHFfWBQ3fiUv-GXzAL4_qZBu6XyC8oGHPsXg7tPUmAGztvAuYgeWux6YT0j1859jgXkIEwokJzIKzO5p3EyNUiDTA3YJpdEB2bO4Um0YfkE2vMgTMxGIQ1Tgm6usjGNpME/H3Q3E1vG8Ltj4L9cqNsw3LAFuyjGn26x/7)
Senator Thom Tillis

Promote a healthy economy and ensure North Carolinians have access to good-paying jobs. Strengthen our military and improve the lives of our service members. Advance college opportunities for North Carolina's low-income and underrepresented students. Prevent taxpayer dollars from going to wasteful programs that don't serve the people. I'm proud of my track record and my reputation for standing up to the radical Left, but there is still so much to do. My fight for your American Dream is far from over--and I hope you'll help me continue the important work we've started. Sincerely, Senator Thom Tillis ****************************************************************************************************** | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Pop Acta Media | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

clean_body: Former President Joe Biden’s pardons provide little to no legal value as they do not pardon a specific crime or action. | | | BREAKING NEWS... | | | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. | | Source: "The man was grossly incompetent. All you have to do is take a look, he signs by autopen. Who was signing all this stuff by autopen? Who would think to sign important documents by autopen?" Trump asked reporters. | | ---|--- | | Background Notes from Judicial Watch []() | | | | 12/02/204 Source: Joe Biden’s execrable pardon of Hunter perfectly fits the Biden family’s arc of corruption. The pardon seems to be all about protecting Joe Biden and helping ensure his son will be less likely to testify against him. | | ---|--- | February 19, 2025 Source: Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: Former President Joe Biden’s pardons provide little to no legal value as they do not pardon a specific crime or action. They are “null & void” and unenforceable. | | ---|--- | December 09, 2024 Source: Judicial Watch suing the Justice Department for details of the meeting between AG Garland and General Milley concerning President Trump. name: Tammy Baldwin

body:
This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight.
| | |
---
I’m no stranger to how close statewide races in Wisconsin can be. Last fall, my race was the most expensive Senate race our state has ever seen — and it all came down to just a few votes. **This year, the stakes are just as high.**

**Right now, right-wing special interests are pouring millions into Wisconsin to try to buy a seat on our Supreme Court. And now, Elon Musk has weighed in — making it clear that the far right is all-in on flipping control of the court.**

_We can't let them win._ We have a chance to elect Judge Susan Crawford, a dedicated public servant who will protect our rights and uphold the law. But with the GOP’s megadonors opening their checkbooks, we have to fight back with everything we’ve got.

[**_Can you split a donation between Susan Crawford’s campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand? If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent.

[**_I hope you’ll join me in supporting Susan Crawford for Wisconsin Supreme Court by splitting a donation with Kirsten Gillibrand. If we all step up now, we can counter right-wing spending and keep Wisconsin’s Supreme Court fair and independent. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Susan Crawford and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | {&refcode=LOCEMFR2025.03.18Susan-Crawford-SplitB1F1S1C145ACN-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGJjMmM0MS0zNTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nLcMAGZJpUBuWsqb883wcHQg9XjJ-yaRb1gOjq5qs= | | = Thank you, Tammy | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb2c5931beac4c87813d286c4f95a923&_e=9QTpVTScCTofWMUWp91365mL4WwZURH1VyyhaqT58T5Cy2RoRhw-otEwFugxcMETUB6y5CbuZdVHtEB0BGocyNjM3ZEcG924UTyO3OMVJ7b-eexJibqNCLHnEkCApPOSUufx0ydyXKhvsVujbBa6Vgm3jxKE9PFFkr9E3uRab1Drwk1JyOEzLB7dQiDOeoD62Un_lPDLzRit3Sy3icdMcr9JdUCOJTnRoWWNMl0mDsTdPX7HPkNEBn6NaPlg-sh8o0cPO38x71W1TPPAfEnbrCL4-Ycb1iZKUob79Uce8YbYhqH3sfiKj_9_zSXAXXqEh84I8Lhwp-1mIforbAe_dzqGNKfmuiKhErspAu0FOPRQCv_n4hF-NRfwAqBwjRTEC_896m74ELI_keRigGG2xsPMF1M08UYeG_YHMXbdUqHKBWiloT1NP-vJ-mrvINMp)
---
My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**
---
| | [ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb2c5931beac4c87813d286c4f95a923&_e=9QTpVTScCTofWMUWp91365mL4WwZURH1VyyhaqT58T5Cy2RoRhw-otEwFugxcMETUB6y5CbuZdVHtEB0BGocyNjM3ZEcG924UTyO3OMVJ7b-eexJibqNCLHnEkCApPOSUufx0ydyXKhvsVujbBa6Vgm3jxKE9PFFkr9E3uRab1Drwk1JyOEzLB7dQiDOeoD62Un_lPDLzRit3Sy3icdMcr9JdUCOJTnRoWWNMl0mDsTdPX7HPkNEBn6NaPlg-sh8o0cPO38x71W1TPPAfEnbrCL4-Ycb1iZKUob79Uce8YYjXTkg74B2oMaVS1meK00ItCEzxA5CMZ_vejyHOkg8rROI9NJR6GljFgramzQY65Wc-Tqp5dMQk2wK7liJepoztErr9e1Tx4GwAAycSLWg4_kEzz5fkJs-xZeq6pN92J7_DAcCnmsstNvusAfhzMHc)
---
Without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I **know** we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. **[I'm not asking you to cut a big check, all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to help support me and my team in this crucial battle!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb2c5931beac4c87813d286c4f95a923&_e=9QTpVTScCTofWMUWp91365mL4WwZURH1VyyhaqT58T5Cy2RoRhw-otEwFugxcMETUB6y5CbuZdVHtEB0BGocyNjM3ZEcG924UTyO3OMVJ7b-eexJibqNCLHnEkCApPOSUufx0ydyXKhvsVujbBa6Vgm3jxKE9PFFkr9E3uRab1Drwk1JyOEzLB7dQiDOeoD62Un_lPDLzRit3Sy3icdMcr9JdUCOJTnRoWWNMl0mDsTdPX7HPkNEBn6NaPlg-sh8o0cPO38x71W1TPPAfEnbrCL4-Ycb1iZKUob79Uce8YZKnme2ZixD2iUoUbW1Zda-oZoH18P7vVDf6MCrUJIe-dzYGLSbNH_Tp6HRY1Jhdo97Na9krjFGy6_b-Hpr7hscRcatyvRALXc1on-E0Yu2LvZlLf5GbM3y0ZT1hSaX20WaaiY21Tw880BmzR5uU_w_)**

Immigrant.

Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=eb2c5931beac4c87813d286c4f95a923&_e=9QTpVTScCTofWMUWp91365mL4WwZURH1VyyhaqT58T5Cy2RoRhw-otEwFugxcMETeJONuV_7ZuQ1lT6MGN07LssHe5Ziq3jDDdZJ-CveRGMOsFAahYiDfVTRhsbqlNz1NK_VXQoNNSrXG7FsCpalvSq9n7YitBqAEX0eXYa-XGwrFBf_bheAfG9srwjtHRlkzuqJ6vTmUmAUo4JsJ0ZFeu8q04nHYWHOI9I6QsimMH4BOlop0CFMF5clKhaEoRfwOq5XO7xRFfu6cw9jJ_eOt6ForvDSCLtkdkppcgynZTbf21GWrIzP9YXMLxwZFaKvUMgBEIFgNq55-AuYMwJx2Bfznvk_lK2gFLJEUPbCokbDIV0XgZCEp0FDzkN6o7QO27hwUcvROqhq4OzUdr5HeA%3D%3D)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

clean_body: I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!| | | My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 -- |

name: JW4C
subject: sacred and fighting dirty
body:
If we win here, we are one step closer to flipping the House and stopping Trump.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nD7Sc9QnBiuB5dOiZaSLLWYT8OZbtfteu2q9Pij6yREskew-65PkiOWtsy-Rnc-PAiNtytHO5agiceB_yc3YuWVIVOthXNsv7pPavnCKb4Rfuy0XDkJOPPzVyYLwQCQtuK967cYH5PXvWSjJ3EQrvCqunJ387LUPproA-5xJFfC8VOS3w4cbXA7oAATkoM1pPcZxHfnnT9iGMW_0_FjpFgaOqEEigroY&c=fD9UXZ0N_gffthggCCyekrvDNh-wQlzqL5FJoa8Q6YA1A3h7IVArmg==&ch=n6RwCDbortWuB7n1zX4C1WvruCUKHP9ZK4b04Ye0CiGe3mQMH3X-ug==)
---
| | | | Team,
In case you missed it, our MAGA opponent in this special election in Florida has resorted to some truly wild accusations and dirty attacks against Democrat Josh Weil:

* He has labelled him "Jihad Josh" Weil
* After embracing Elon Musk's DOGE attacks on Social Security, he claims we're lying to voters about his support for undermining Social Security and Medicaid
* He has said Josh is "disingenuous" for fighting to bring down grocery costs
* He has falsely and maliciously claimed that Josh has a "history of supporting Muslim terror"

All of these dirty lies only expose how desperate MAGA is getting as we get closer to Election Day.
---
| | | | They are worried for good reason--when Josh first kicked off this campaign, he was just a teacher and community leader asking for support to stop MAGA and Project 2025. And now, he is standing up for every single one of us who are resisting Trump's fascist takeover of America.
We can only do this because our supporters have shown up in a HUGE way. People all over the country understand how important this race is and are pitching in to help Josh defeat these lies and win--for all of us.
---

Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | | == | | | | Team, In case you missed it, our MAGA opponent in this special election in Florida has resorted to some truly wild accusations and dirty attacks against Democrat Josh Weil: He has labelled him "Jihad Josh" Weil After embracing Elon Musk's DOGE attacks on Social Security, he claims we're lying to voters about his support for undermining Social Security and Medicaid He has said Josh is "disingenuous" for fighting to bring down grocery costs He has falsely and maliciously claimed that Josh has a "history of supporting Muslim terror" All of these dirty lies only expose how desperate MAGA is getting as we get closer to Election Day. | | | | They are worried for good reason--when Josh first kicked off this campaign, he was just a teacher and community leader asking for support to stop MAGA and Project 2025. And now, he is standing up for every single one of us who are resisting Trump's fascist takeover of America. We can only do this because our supporters have shown up in a HUGE way. **Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat and DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f59a271763a546a4984eb23980e5ca40&_e=yvDiDKC7EHFQkQQ8JfhnDpNq2wCPZrkCgYDnid0-OpVfy8styGNSB8r0Y3k_FC3t6C3XQ3KKdHdCs4SR-Bq4qcCYDodqNfJFiOaZatUpRQrwQ126zvxXp6_GL08iwQZe0Ywpf2PnNF7J6c0Hhwob5KNhru7LDw9kzBu9B64O9QRdqcZZpv-jilhcxJT0q8V9ZlXZ6qouVJAS-uFRLldvJ4aiW2XS3ikmDUtcbyhpDcHLtZklMbA9UTWDFAMYjth4KeYYS6zWOUJvgBKFdsD_OtWH8capccKHR2nH_22Gimf6jLtRTcrpNqsiIqwDCXkIHYYrlC0gXj0veWncfrcK9v0EGtUoUnH1Va7ngO4V5liW9r3idpJJF9LzkwZiZycmz_P5wjUv6W4PWUNKim7QStw0IqUCrA1YWLzAGr7Bhr0%3D "Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f59a271763a546a4984eb23980e5ca40&_e=yvDiDKC7EHFQkQQ8JfhnDpNq2wCPZrkCgYDnid0-OpVfy8styGNSB8r0Y3k_FC3t6C3XQ3KKdHdCs4SR-Bq4qcCYDodqNfJFiOaZatUpRQrwQ126zvxXp6_GL08iwQZe0Ywpf2PnNF7J6c0Hhwob5KNhru7LDw9kzBu9B64O9QRdqcZZpv-jilhcxJT0q8V9ZlXZ6qouVJAS-uFRLldvJ4aiW2XS3ikmDUtcbyhpDcHLtZklMbA9UTWDFAMYjth4KeYYS6zWOUJvgBKFdsD_Om6H37xaQiPUBakxfyrK_-8sITYhtktlu72jx2Or66ISgheK1lg36n5yBbKi6csoC7J9p2jiT-SD7OpE4Sux9mvAgEbmLq5s-yvo6RWzvWw7EYTd4h1De9kDpk_icrJS3pllET4Ga83wQW4Mh3Cl14k%3D "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_

name: Sarah McBride
subject: We need to talk about farmers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Here’s the bottom line.
#
Hi, this is Sarah. I’d love to take just a moment of your time today to talk about something that’s vital to Delaware — and to all of us: our farmers.
Agriculture is the backbone of Delaware’s economy and much of the U.S. economy. It’s how we feed our families here at home and around the world, and it’s a jobs engine with wide-reaching effects in our daily lives.
Anyone who knows a thing or two about farming knows this: **Farmers operate on thin margins.** They depend on federal partners to provide stability when the market is volatile.
So when the Trump administration illegally froze programs that purchase products from farmers, shut down funds to help farmers lower their energy bills, and halted bird flu monitoring, they felt the rug pulled out from under them.
**All of this resulted in higher costs for farmers and higher prices at the grocery store for folks like you.**
**The bottom line is this: Republicans here in Washington are putting our farmers at risk. I’m fighting back because when we fail farmers, we fail all Americans.** That’s why I stood up for farmers on the House floor and voiced my opposition to any action that threatens our farmers.
**Our movement isn’t powered by billionaire megadonors. Grassroots contributions from supporters like you are what gives me the ability to do this work.** **[If you’re able, please consider pitching in any amount today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250318-1?refcode=em20250318-1827&amount=5&refcode2=1827_21716_XAyXDZ&akid=1827%2E21716%2EXAyXDZ)**
---
Thank you for your time.
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250318-1&t=1&refcode2=1827_21716_XAyXDZ&akid=1827%2E21716%2EXAyXDZ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1827%2E21716%2EXAyXDZ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1827%2E21716%2EXAyXDZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1827%2E21716%2EXAyXDZ)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

clean_body: Sign the petition to tell Trump to get his butt in gear. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Team, Donald Trump promised to bring prices down on Day 1. Well, it’s been 58 days, and while he’s found plenty of time to go to the Super Bowl and the Daytona 500, how many times do you think he’s actually stepped foot in a grocery store? Americans are feeling the squeeze, whether it’s groceries, rent, or gas. But instead of doing anything about it, Trump and his MAGA allies are peddling for their billionaire buddies. If Trump really cared about working families, he’d spend less time on the golf course and more time in the Oval Office making life affordable. | Your voice matters. It helps us cut through the Republican nonsense and hold Trump accountable for his broken promises. Let’s make sure the real struggles of American families are front and center. name: Katie Porter
subject: Tariffs = higher housing costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39553%2E3422442%2EAkOpPj)
Derek,
We are short millions of homes in this country—with most estimates putting the exact number at somewhere between 4 and 7 million. That’s keeping homeownership out of reach for more and more Americans and forcing workers to commute farther and farther to their jobs. It’s not sustainable.
**To fix this supply crisis, government needs to make it cheaper and faster to build all sorts of quality housing.**
Instead, Trump’s harmful tariffs are moving us in the exact wrong direction. Take a look at this headline from this week:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250318_2_ak?refcode=em20250318-39553&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39553_3422442_AkOpPj&akid=39553%2E3422442%2EAkOpPj)
The economics aren’t that complicated: making construction more expensive means that less housing is going to get built. This would supercharge our nation’s housing shortage.
Families are counting on our government to take urgent action to bring down housing costs. Their budgets are already being stretched thinner and thinner from decades of underinvestment in housing.
A multi-million unit housing shortage is bad enough; Trump’s economic policies are setting us even further back.
We need leaders who understand our housing challenges and have the expertise and backbone to fight for the solutions we need.
**As a consumer protection attorney prior to going to Congress, I studied the housing market and sounded the alarm on the predatory practices that ultimately led to the foreclosure crisis.** As Governor, I’m going to be laser-focused on bringing costs down for families, including tackling the high cost of housing. Will you support my campaign with a donation today?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250318_2_ak?refcode=em20250318-39553&refcode2=39553_3422442_AkOpPj&akid=39553%2E3422442%2EAkOpPj)
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250318-39553&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39553_3422442_AkOpPj&akid=39553%2E3422442%2EAkOpPj)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39553&t=4&akid=39553%2E3422442%2EAkOpPj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39553)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39553&t=5&akid=39553%2E3422442%2EAkOpPj)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

Hi, we’ll get right to it.

The most important thing to Derek (and all of us, here on Team Tram) is ensuring that we’re fighting for the issues that matter most to you.

From lowering costs, defending reproductive freedoms, holding big corporations accountable, standing up to Trump and Elon Musk, and more, we’ve listened to everything you’ve shared and are working towards solutions.

But with so much happening every day in Washington, DC, we want to make sure we have an up-to-date read on your top priorities for Congress to work on this year.

[**How can Derek best serve you? Please, let us know by selecting the issues that matter most in our March Priorities Survey. →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104090902/534242964/-929361244?refcode=em_eng_2025.03.18_b1_tt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2FmZWVhZTktM2MwNC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VJ_BKaqCtBYA6sfVixctbnHAiQsITnuHPuMfOqIpvmw=&emci=8998b354-3204-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cafeeae9-3c04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=27336212)

body:
I would know.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104091020/534243548/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWE2MWEwZC0zZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yBW49tJrTpbpiUMoSgAZ2JOI4Bvo6oYzXZPWxUXpWI=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. My personal connection to Donald Trump began long before he ran for office in 2016. [(You can click here to see what I mean.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104091021/534243549/562834949?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250318_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWE2MWEwZC0zZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yBW49tJrTpbpiUMoSgAZ2JOI4Bvo6oYzXZPWxUXpWI=)

I grew up in the _Throggs Neck Houses,_ a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump’s golf course in the Bronx. While the city shoveled over $100 million to develop this course, families like mine lived across the street in hunger and poverty.

So when he ran on the promise that he’d help working class families like mine, I knew better than to believe him.

**Peter, Donald Trump promised to lower taxes and lower costs.**

**→ He lied:** He is throwing around tariffs left and right that will mean _higher_ taxes on you and _higher_ prices for the goods and groceries you consume.

**Donald Trump promised to fight for working class families.

→ He lied:** He is delivering tax cuts for folks like Elon Musk by _slashing_ critical social safety nets like Medicare and Social Security for hardworking Americans.

**Donald Trump promised to strengthen our standing on the world stage.

→ He lied:** He is delivering _blow after blow_ to some of our longest standing allies, he gutted USAID, and he’s making a mockery of American politics.

**Donald Trump has done nothing but _hurt_ working class Americans, _dismantle_ critical agencies like the Department of Education, and _ignore_ the very principles of our Democracy. So much for _promises made, promises kept._**

[Peter, the greatest way that Democrats can fight back is give special elections in the House _everything_ we’ve got. That’s why I’m urgently rounding up support to flip seats from NY-21 to FL-6. Will you rush $3 to help us flip the House and limit the damage Trump can do? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104091022/534243550/562834949?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250318_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWE2MWEwZC0zZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yBW49tJrTpbpiUMoSgAZ2JOI4Bvo6oYzXZPWxUXpWI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104091029/534243557/562834949?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250318_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWE2MWEwZC0zZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yBW49tJrTpbpiUMoSgAZ2JOI4Bvo6oYzXZPWxUXpWI=)**

Friend,
House Republicans have stopped holding town halls in their districts because they know they can't defend the actions of Donald Trump and Elon Musk. It’s such cowardly behavior. Instead of listening to their constituents, these so-called Representatives are choosing to align themselves with Trump and Musk at the expense of the people they’re supposed to serve.

That’s why Robert is hitting the road—doing what these Republicans refuse to do. He will be holding town halls in Republican districts, listening directly to the people. Democrat, Republican, or Independent—it doesn't matter. Every voice deserves to be heard.

Next week, Robert will kick off his tour in Republican Orange County. And this is just the beginning. Robert is committed to reaching as many of these districts as possible, ensuring that people have the opportunity to speak up, especially when their Representatives refuse to listen.

[Can you chip in to help us offset the travel costs for this crucial tour? Your support will ensure Robert can travel to as many districts as possible, making sure the voices of the people are heard, loud and clear.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104091148/534244024/2133160978?refcode2=9dca639e-3e04-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&refcode=em250318&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGNhNjM5ZS0zZTA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlxoIp9x7X8Am9fDKYi-T_CWaKTP7FBj5ofoEFPrs2M=)

body:
| | | Hey team -- It's Nate, your new digital fundraising director at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out today to introduce myself, and to **[ask if you can spare $5 as we work to flip the Senate.>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250318-Nate-NateFirstFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250318-Nate-NateFirstFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19834%2E9716520%2EGtR-N4)**

As you can imagine, it's been a busy start to the year. Trump and his MAGA loyalists are creating so much havoc, and I don't have to tell y'all how dangerous their plans are.

So here's one question I've gotten a lot lately: **How do we fight back?**

We have to get to work and **strengthen our Democratic coalition, pool our resources ASAP, and get ready to work like hell on the road ahead to flip the Senate.**

**How successful we'll be depends on _you_.** Truly -- I'm not just saying that. Democrats from Pennsylvania and all over need to decide that the future of our country is too important to sit this one out.

And that road ahead I just mentioned? Well, it's being paved right now -- by this team.

So far, we're off to a pretty good start -- but our next big fundraising deadline is coming up at midnight. We don't have any wiggle room to fall short of our $50,000 goal, so I gotta ask: **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help Democrats take back the Senate? It'd make a _massive_ difference to have this team behind me from the jump!](https://go.dscc.org/go/20854?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250318-Nate-NateFirstFR-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250318-Nate-NateFirstFR-ETG-sl1&akid=19834%2E9716520%2EGtR-N4)**

name: Team Sharice
subject: National Republicans couldn’t be more wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
In KS-03 alone, Medicaid covers 41,000 children and 11,000 seniors

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104091335/534244878/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGU0Y2RkZC0zZjA0LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mp1I8iCFs3p771Yfxp7DgtzyqCLZQg2enGgk6ea_4uM=) Let’s be clear: House Republicans are taking the position that Medicaid is a waste. They think that thousands of children, seniors, and families across Kansas shouldn’t have access to the care they need to stay healthy. **They couldn’t be more wrong.** Sharice, like the vast majority of Americans, understands that Medicaid is _not_ a waste. It’s a critical program that over 400,000 Kansans rely on every day to stay healthy. In KS-03 alone, it covers 41,000 children and 11,000 seniors. Without Medicaid, these Kansans would be forced to either pay exorbitant amounts for care — or forgo health care altogether. Every day, millions of Americans rely on Medicaid to access affordable emergency room visits, dental care, long-term care for loved ones, and so much more. National Republicans may see that as wasteful — but Sharice knows the truth: **Medicaid is a life-saving program that should be _protected_ — not gutted to pay for the costs of the GOP’s ultra-wealthy tax giveaway.** [_**If you agree, sign your name to Sharice’s new petition calling on Congress to OPPOSE the National GOP’s plan to gut Medicaid. They think that thousands of children, seniors, and families across Kansas shouldn’t have access to the care they need to stay healthy. They couldn’t be more wrong. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

---
**Featured Experts:**
* **Captain Seth Keshel**
* **Background:** Former Army Captain, Military Intelligence, Afghanistan veteran.
* **Expertise:** Election forecasting; critic of RCV as a threat to election integrity.
* **Contribution:** Analysis of how RCV undermined election integrity in Alaska.
* **Dr. Chris Mattmann**
* **Background:** Chief Data and AI Officer at UCLA, former NASA JPL CTIO.
* **Expertise:** AI, big data, and election data complexities.
* **Contribution:** Insights on RCV’s technical challenges and voter disenfranchisement risks.
* **RC Maxwell**
* **Background:** Investigative journalist, formerly with Project Veritas, now with Newsmax.
* **Expertise:** Exposed political manipulation surrounding RCV in Alaska.
* **Contribution:** Revealed strategic efforts to influence Alaska’s elections using RCV.
* **Former Alaska Attorney General Kevin Clarkson**
* **Background:** Former Alaska Attorney General with legal expertise in RCV challenges.
* **Expertise:** Legal complexities of RCV and voter rights concerns.
* **Contribution:** Detailed analysis of Alaska's legal battles over RCV.
* **Former Lt. Governor Mead Treadwell**
* **Background:** Former Alaska Lt. Governor who oversaw state elections.
* **Expertise:** Election management and administrative challenges tied to RCV.
* **Contribution:** Insights on RCV’s impact on voter trust and election administration.

**Summary:**
These experts collectively provide a comprehensive view of RCV's legal, political, and technical flaws, highlighting the system's impact on Alaska’s electoral process and voter confidence.
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
**Starting a film project for Amazon Prime, YouTube, etc. – Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process, Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**
---
|
---
**I have three petitions coming soon.****My competition spends millions to do a project that costs me 0.1% what they spend. Of course I’m going to continue.****1\. Voter ID / US Citizenship requirements / Election Integrity****2\. Ban foreign funding of ballot initiatives****3\. Remove voting machines for State and Federal elections in Alaska**
---

### A case study of how corporate democrats have ruined our party and must be ousted for the party--and democracy--to survive
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Mar 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

Does this make any sense to you? At just 21%, Democrats have the worst approval rating in history. Meanwhile, Trump and Republican ratings are at historic highs.
The man in the White House is a fascist and aspiring autocrat yet sits at 47%, his entirely complicit party sits at 40%, and yet, Democrats are at an abysmal 21%. This is no accident and we must understand how we got here. Simply blaming the GOP is not a strategy. The American people, particularly the Democratic Party's base, is sick and tired of the hypocrisy in politics in general and in our own Party specifically. And until we change, the Democratic Party--and our republic--will continue to fall.
We must name the culprits who got us here, and then work to overcome their obstructionism--corporate Democrats. **Let 's Address This.**
**I 'm doing everything in my power to hold powerful politicians accountable. I cannot do it alone. Join our movement and subscribe below.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fhe0sYRZ-qwdi0ZvKiKwZStDihH0BHy4w42qfYBYOBU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=159331266)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/61c344ec-7967-4b53-b472-4bbc8c2af52d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Bill Foster, working hard in Congress. [Photo Credit: Foster's Twitter Account]
## What Democrats Believe
Let's start with some basic facts.
* More than 90% of Democrats believe climate change is real and caused by human activity, particularly by big oil corporations like Exxon.
* More than 90% of Democrats believe civil rights are sacred and should never be compromised for corporate profits.
* More than 90% of Democrats believe banks should be regulated and taxpayers should stop bailing out major corporations.
* More than 90% of Democrats believe corporate money has no place in politics, and want politicians to be people funded, not corporate or superPAC funded.
* More than 70% of Democrats believe healthcare is a human right, want to join every developed nation on Earth to ensure universal healthcare.
* More than 70% of Democrats believe in an end to the arms trade--indeed 77% wanted the Biden administration to stop arming Netanyahu.

While not an exhaustive list, each of these are wildly popular policies among Democratic voters, that every Democratic politician should support. Thus ,this article is not about theory. Instead, I provide a clear case study of a corporate Democrat who is virtually indistinguishable from the Republicans he claims to oppose. And sadly, he's not alone. Too many corporate Democrats follow this model, and it is unsustainable. These saboteurs are complicit in the collapse of our Republic because they betray Democratic party principles, side with MAGA Republicans at critical moments, and give Republicans cover to claim that their cruel (sometimes fascist) policies have "bipartisan" support.
As you read this, I ask you to consider why we tolerate such politicians in our party, how such politicians are the cause of the distrust voters have with the Democratic Party, and how much longer we will tolerate them before demanding they leave the party altogether, resign from their seats, or retire?
So in our case study, I present to you Congressman Bill Foster, a corporate funded multi-millionaire politician who is on the wrong side of each of these policies, and has actively worked with Republicans to undermine our basic civil rights and human rights.
## Bill Foster (IL-11): The Corporate Democrat Who Betrays Our Values
Corporate Democrats like Bill Foster, who turns 70 this year, aren't just a problem for the Democratic Party--their policies are a threat to our democracy. This is not hyperbole, it's a factual observation of his 8 terms in Congress. Foster's voting record, his financial ties, and his outright refusal to stand for core Democratic principles reveal the truth: he's effectively a Republican hiding behind a blue label.
But don't take my word for it. Let's break down Foster's disgraceful record.
## Healthcare: A Corporate Puppet Hurting Working Families
Democrats believe healthcare is a human right--Bill Foster's voting record doesn't.
At first glance, it's encouraging that Bill Foster voted in 2009 to pass the Affordable Care Act (ACA). Mortifying, however, is that afterwards he accepted hundreds of thousands in campaign contributions from Big Health, then voted at least three times with Republicans to gut the ACA. Specifically, he voted to gut the part of the ACA that protects people with pre-existing conditions (HR3350), the part that bans charging women more than men (HR3522), and the part that protects seniors (HR1190). Had these bills that Bill Foster supported passed, it would have meant that children like my daughter, who has an incurable disease that is fatal if not treated, would be denied care. Worse, Foster opposes guaranteed healthcare, and calls it unrealistic--even though every developed nation on Earth has implemented it at half the cost we are forced to spend on for profit insurance.
One of Foster's beloved donors? UnitedHealth--yes, the same company caught using AI to deny more than 90% of Medicare claims for senior citizens. Foster took their money, never returned it, never apologized, and continues cashing their checks.
How can we trust a man who is quite literally paid by the very corporations exploiting our most vulnerable?
**Finding value in this article? Join our movement as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fhe0sYRZ-qwdi0ZvKiKwZStDihH0BHy4w42qfYBYOBU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=159331266)
## Climate Justice: A Scientist Who Sides With Climate Deniers
Democrats believe climate change is real--Bill Foster's voting record doesn't.
Foster loves to tout his PhD in physics, claiming that his background as a scientist makes him uniquely qualified to lead on climate policy. But his voting record says otherwise. He voted with Republicans to expand offshore drilling, he supports fracking, and he pushes the junk science of carbon capture--the same nonsense Exxon and Big Oil use to justify continued pollution.
Speaking of Exxon, Foster has happily taken thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from Exxon. We are in a climate catastrophe but perhaps Bill Foster is too busy counting Exxon's dollar bills in his campaign account to notice.
If a scientist like Foster gives climate destruction a stamp of approval, it lets corporations like Exxon say, "See? Even the scientists support us." That's not just hypocrisy--that's complicity in climate disaster.
## Foreign Policy: Blood Money from War Profiteers
Democrats believe in ending the arms trade--Bill Foster's voting record doesn't.
Foster is funded by defense contractors and pro-war PACs. While the world condemned Netanyahu for war crimes in Gaza and while Americans overwhelmingly demanded an immediate ceasefire, Foster refused to act. Instead, he continued to vote to continue to arm Netanyahu. Despite 77% of Democrats demanding an end to arming Netanyahu, and despite our own State Department affirming that Netanyahu is committing war crimes in violation of international law and our own U.S. Leahy Laws, Foster refused to speak up and demand an end to arming Netanyahu.
If he can't even stand up against war crimes when the International Criminal Court and International Court of Justice both confirm them, then what does he actually stand for?
## Economic Justice: Protecting the Wealthy, Betraying the Working Class
Democrats believe in fighting for working people--Bill Foster's voting record doesn't.
Foster is worth $20 million--and unsurprisingly, his policies prioritize the wealthy at the expense of working families. We see a similar pattern in his voting record as we did with his healthcare hypocrisy.
Foster voted for Dodd-Frank bank regulation under Obama. Then he took absurd amounts of money from major banks. And then in 2017 he voted with Trump to deregulate banks. Hypocrisy notwithstanding, what does it say about a person's ethics and intelligence if he trusts Donald Trump--the convicted felon and known bank fraudster--on banking and finance? This deregulation directly contributed to the near-collapse of Silicon Valley Bank (SVB), which Biden then bailed out on the taxpayer's dime.
And yet, while Foster fights for bank bailouts, he refuses to support student debt cancellation. So when billion-dollar banks need help after his deregulation lets them run wild, taxpayers foot the bill. But when working-class students, crushed under predatory loans, ask for relief, suddenly, the government can't afford it. What else would you expect from a politician who takes campaign contributions from Amazon? Yep, while Amazon avoids taxes and exploits its workers, Bill Foster is happy to cash their campaign contributions.
And don't even get me started on Foster's refusal to co-sponsor HR 40, a bill to merely study reparations for Black Americans. Apparently, even voting for research into economic justice for Black Americans is too much for the scientist.
Americans [trust Republicans over Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/42851102-026a-43f2-ae75-22b8b68c2642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the economy, in large part due to corporate Democrats like Foster who refuse to prioritize the needs of working families.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fhe0sYRZ-qwdi0ZvKiKwZStDihH0BHy4w42qfYBYOBU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159331266)
## Civil Rights: Undermining the ADA and Expanding the Surveillance State
Democrats believe civil rights are sacred--Bill Foster's voting record doesn't.
Foster's betrayal doesn't stop with healthcare, climate, and economic justice. He has actively undermined civil rights by co-sponsoring a bill with Republicans to weaken the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA). H.R. 620, which was misleadingly called the "ADA Education and Reform Act of 2017," would have eroded what the ACLU called "a key tenet of that landmark [1990] civil rights law." And Bill Foster chose to co-sponsor this cruel bill with Republicans in hopes that Donald Trump sign it into law. Again, a similar pattern. Foster brags about his father writing the Civil Rights Acts, then Foster took thousands from a lobbyist group that wanted to avoid making their businesses ADA-compliant, then Foster voted to gut the ADA.
Yes, Bill Foster--the same guy who brags that his father helped write civil rights legislation--actively worked to make life harder for people with disabilities. Foster apparently believes disabled Americans have too much power in this country, and he made it his mission to stop this grave injustice. _(Satire, obviously --because what else could justify his cruelty?) _As you see Trump gut civil rights, know that he can point to corporate Democrats like Bill Foster as among his ardent bipartisan supporters.
And gutting the ADA notwithstanding, Foster also voted to extend the Patriot Act, continuing the mass surveillance and erosion of civil liberties that both progressives and libertarians oppose. Again, as you see the Trump regime arbitrarily arrest Mahmoud Khalil and deport documented immigrants, know that the groundwork for such extremism was perpetuated by voting to renew grotesque bills like the Patriot Act, thanks to corporate Democrats like Bill Foster.
## A Career of Meaningless, Empty Leadership
Democrats believe in getting things done--Bill Foster's voting record doesn't.
Adding insult to all of the above injury, Bill Foster has never passed a single actual meaningful piece of legislation. His greatest legislative achievement after 8 terms in Congress? Renaming a post office after Ronald Reagan. Yes, Reagan--the racist, homophobic architect of trickle-down economics who gutted public education, slashed social programs, and made the rich richer while the rest of us suffered.
And this is Foster's hero?
That tells you everything you need to know.
## The Hard Truth: We Cannot Afford Corporate Democrats Like Foster
Some will argue that _any_ Democrat is better than a MAGA Republican. But is that really the standard we're willing to live with? It's that standard that got Democrats to a 21% approval. And let's be honest--what's the difference anyway when Foster repeatedly votes with Republicans to gut healthcare, deregulate banks, expand fossil fuel destruction, enable war crimes, and undermine civil rights? His actions give MAGA extremists bipartisan cover to push their corrupt, corporate-driven agenda. If Democrats continue protecting these frauds, we may as well hand MAGA Republicans another term on a silver platter. We cannot let that happen.
Bill Foster is not just a bad Democrat--he's actively destructive to our party and our democracy. His policies hurt working people, gut critical protections, and embolden MAGA extremism. Corporate Democrats like Foster will never save us from Trumpism because, at their core, they operate under the same corrupt, pay-for-play system as Republicans.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fhe0sYRZ-qwdi0ZvKiKwZStDihH0BHy4w42qfYBYOBU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159331266)
## Conclusion
If I only listed out Bill Foster's record but without naming him, you would justifiably believe he's a MAGA Republican. And that's fundamentally the problem. It's no wonder that after Schumer capitulated to Trump on the budget bill, a poll asking registered voters what they thought of our party revealed the below word cloud--with the most prominent word being WEAK.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43765fe0-36d8-4c4e-acb2-504c2ee9e159?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Corporate Democrats like Bill Foster are weak. They are weak on passing legislation, they are weak on protecting working people, they are weak on upholding principles, and they are weak when fighting against MAGA extremism. Why? Because it's difficult for them to fight against an opposition party, when they so fundamentally agree with that opposition party on so much.
And to be sure, this is not a purity test. Four out of five Americans are screaming at the Democratic Party that your corporate Democrat strategy is failing. And while corporate Democrats like Bill Foster are funded much too handsomely by billion dollar corporations and SuperPACS to care what the American people think--that's the beauty of our republic. If we can't change his mind, we can change his seat. It's time to vote out corporate Democrats once and for all, and revive the Democratic Party built by and for working people.
That's how we form a more perfect Union and protect our Republic, with meaningful liberty and justice for all.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fhe0sYRZ-qwdi0ZvKiKwZStDihH0BHy4w42qfYBYOBU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159331266)
## Bonus Thoughts
Perhaps if there is interest from readers, I'll analyze the records of other corporate Democrats who continue to align with MAGA Republicans to undermine our party and our democracy. This includes the 10 House Democrats who voted to censure Rep Al Green for standing up to Trump on gutting Medicaid. Or the 10 Senate Democrats who joined Schumer to give Trump the exact budget he wanted, that guts critical social welfare programs to pay for a $4.5T tax cut for billionaires. If readers feels this is of benefit to helping them becoming more informed voters, name the politician and I'll pursue a series going forward.
| | POLL
---
Would you value a series analyzing the records of corporate Democrats?
| [Yes](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWFzaW1yYXNoaWQuY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.7Vc4UT0nK8uYMilDMArO8NOmyYDStYAa49AufF4RCDk?)
---
[No](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWFzaW1yYXNoaWQuY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.nvl4hE6WUsdraoaP1rH6hL4PKx84wOX-w_d1ay0D3xU?)
For now I'm reminded of the sage words of Professor Tan Nahisi Coates' in a recent interview, where he said about the Democratic Party:
> We are at a moment right now where people are asking themselves why can't the Democratic Party defend this assault on democracy . . . and I would submit to you that if you can't draw the line at genocide, you probably can't draw the line at democracy.
Professor Coates' words are stinging as they are true. And to offer nuance, I would draw his ire specifically towards corporate Democrats in the Party who, while railing against Trump and his fascism, accept funding from the same corrupt corporations and PACS, embrace the same corrupt policies, and make the same corrupt excuses for why change is not possible.
Meanwhile, we have some amazing leaders in the Democratic Party. While no one is perfect, we see the brilliance of Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, Congresswoman Jasmine Crocket, Congresswoman AOC, Congressman Jamie Raskin, Congressman Mark Pocan, Congressman Andre Carson, Congresswoman Delia Ramirez, and the list certainly goes on. I have hope in these leaders because they live their values and are honest with the American people. If these leaders represented our Party's leadership and main body, MAGA Republicans would never have a chance at grasping power. Sadly, such fighters are too few, and weak corporate Democrats like Bill Foster are too many. Until that flips, the Democratic Party will continue to suffer, it will continue to fail to serve as a meaningful opposition party to MAGA extremism, and worse of all, it will continue to fail to earn the trust of the American voter.
Foster and corporate Democrats like him are why our party has a 21% approval rating. But let's not pretend ridding ourselves of such corporate bought politicians is easy. Corporate Democrats use the same underhanded, racist, and unethical tactics as Republicans to cling to power. _I 'll address that in a future piece._
For now, one thing is clear: if we want to reclaim our democracy, we must reject Bill Foster and every corporate Democrat like him. Our movement is bigger than any one politician--but it starts with holding them accountable.
The question is: are we willing to fight, or will we keep letting corporate shills like Foster sell us out?
It's long past time to choose.
